id=\"div_1\"><span class=\"akn-act\" data-contains=\"singleVersion\" data-name=\"act\"><section class=\"akn-preface\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Delhi Municipal Corporation Act, 1957</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Delhi Act <a class=\"akn-ref\" data-eid=\"preface__p_2__ref_1\" data-href=\"/akn/in-del/act/1957/66\" href=\"/doc/115807286/\" id=\"preface__p_2__ref_1\">66 of 1957</a></span><span class=\"akn-p\">An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the Municipal Government of Delhi.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Be it enacted by Parliament in the Eighth Year of the Republic of India as follows:\u0097</span></section><span class=\"akn-body\"><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter I<br/>Preliminary</h2>\n<section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_1\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/127956123/\">1.</a> Short title, extent and commencement.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_1.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/88994896/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">This Act may be called the Delhi Municipal Corporation Act, 1957.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_1.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/24086914/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Except as otherwise provided in this Act, it extends only to Delhi.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_1.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/68629468/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The provisions of this Act, except this section which shall come into force at once, shall come into force on such [date] [[Section 2, Chapter II, sections 54, 55, 56, 57, 58, 59, 89 and 97, Chapter XXIII, sections 485, 487, 488, 491, 500, 509, 513 and 515 came into force on 2-1-1958, vide Notification No. F. 20/3/58/SR (R), dated 31st December, 1957, published in the Government of India (Delhi Gazette) Extra., Pt. IV, P.19.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Section 510 came into force on 15-2-1958, vide Notification No. F. 20/3/58/SR (R) dated 11th February, 1958, published in the Government of India (Delhi Gazette) Extra., Pt. IV, p. 77.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">All the provisions of the Act (other than those which have already been brought into force) came into force on 7-4-1958, vide Notification No. F. 20/3/58/SR (R), dated 5th April, 1958, published in the Government of India (Delhi Gazette) Extra., Pt. IV, p. 135.]] as the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span> may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act and any reference in any such provision to the commencement of this Act shall be construed as a reference to the coming into force of that provision.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_2\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/68573541/\">2.</a> Definitions.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12214065/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ \"Administrator\" means the Lieutenant Governor of the National Capital Territory of Delhi;] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 2, for clause (1) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.1A\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/127567363/\">(1A)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ \"Annual value\" means the annual value of any vacant land or covered space of any builidng determined udner section 116E;] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 3 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.1B\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/178575532/\">(1B)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ \"Appellate Tribunal\" means an Appellate Tribunal constituted under section 347A;] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1984, section 2 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/137586091/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"budget-grant\" means the total sum entered on the expenditure side of a budget estimate under a major head and adopted by the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span> and includes any sum by which such budget-grant may be increased or reduced by transfer from or to other heads in accordance with the provisions of this Act and the regulations made thereunder;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/86125171/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"building\" means a house, out-house, stable, latrine, urinal, shed, hut, wall (other than a boundary wall) or any other structure, whether of masonry, bricks, wood, mud, metal or other material but does not include any portable shelter;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/89165367/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"bye-law\" means a bye-law made under this Act, by notification in the Official Gazette;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15218200/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"casual vacancy\" means a vacancy occurring otherwise than by efflux of time in the office of a councillor or an alderman or in any other elective office;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/130947792/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ \"Commissioner\" means the Commissioner of the Corporation] [[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 3(a), for clause (6) (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). Clause (6), before substitution, stood as under</span><span class=\"akn-p\">\"(6)\" Commissioner\" means the Commissioner of the Corporation.\"]]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/81234006/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ Corporation\" means the Municipal Corporation of Delhi established under this Act;] [[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 3(b), for clause (7) (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). Clause (7), before substitution, stood as under:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">\"(7)\" Corporation\" means the Municipal Corporation of Delhi established under this act.\"]]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.8\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/59287198/\">(8)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"corrupt practice\" means any of the practices specified in section 22;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.9\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/76722175/\">(9)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"dangerous disease\" means\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.9.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/127811834/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">cholera, plague, chicken-pox, small-pox, tuberculosis, leprosy, enteric fever, cerebrospinal meningitis and diphtheria; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.9.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/76769146/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any other epidemic, endemic or infectious disease which the Commissioner may, by notification in the Official Gazette, declare to be a dangerous disease for the purposes of this Act;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.10\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/7669209/\">(10)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"Delhi\" means the entire area of the Union territory of Delhi except New Delhi and Delhi Cantonment;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.11\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/169943371/\">(11)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"Delhi Cantonment\" means the area for the time being within the local limits of the Delhi Cantonment Board;</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Clause (12) omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 2 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Clause (13) omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.r.e.f. 3-11-1971).]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Clause (14) omitted by act 67 of 1993, section 2 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Clause (14A) omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 2 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). Earlier clause (14A) was inserted by Act 55 of 1974, section 2 (w.e.f. 10-1-1975)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.15\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/67159376/\">(15)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"drain\" includes a sewer, a house drain, a drain of any other description, a tunnel, a culvert, a ditch, a channel and any other device for carrying off sewage, offensive matter, polluted water, waste water, rain water or sub-soil water;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.15A\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/85341890/\">(15A)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ \"Election Commission\" means the Election Commission of the National Capital Territory of Delhi referred to in section 7;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.15B\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/28859208/\">(15B)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"Election Commissioner\" means the Election Commissioner of the National Capital Territory of Delhi appointed by the Administrator under section 7;] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 2 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.16\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/169038264/\">(16)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"entertainment\" includes any exhibition, performance, amusement, game or sport to which persons are ordinarily admitted on payment;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.17\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/191121839/\">(17)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"factory\" means a factory as defined in the Factories Act, 1948 (63 of 1948);</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.18\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/65554352/\">(18)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"filth\" includes offensive matter and sewage;</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Clause (19) omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 2 (w.e.f. 1-10-1933)]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Clause (20) omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.r.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.21\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/127937066/\">(21)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"goods\" includes animals;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.21A\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/197720219/\">(21A)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ \"Government\" means the Government of the National Capital Territory of Delhi;] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 2 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.22\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/51800048/\">(22)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"house-gully\" or \"service passage\" means a passage or strip of land constructed, set apart or utilised for the purpose of serving as or carrying a drain or affording access to a latrine, urinal, cesspool or other receptacle for filth or other polluted matter, by municipal employees or other persons employed in the cleansing thereof or in the removal of such matter therefrom;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.23\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/142673802/\">(23)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"hut\" means any building which is constructed principally of wood, bamboo, mud, leaves, grass, cloth or thatch and includes any structure of whatever material made which the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span> may declare to be a hut for the purposes of this Act;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.24\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/23541694/\">(24)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"land\" includes benefits to arise out of land, things attached to the earth or permanently fastened to anything attached to the earth and rights created by law over any street;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.25\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/110449492/\">(25)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"licensed architect\", \"licensed draughtsman\", \"licensed engineer\", \"licensed plumber\", \"licensed surveyor\" and \"licensed town planner\" mean respectively a person licensed under the provisions of this Act as an architect, draughtsman, engineer, plumber, surveyor and town planner;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.26\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/125948358/\">(26)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"market\" includes any place where persons assemble for the sale of, or for the purpose of exposing for sale, meat, fish, fruits, vegetables, animals intended for human food or any other articles of human food whatsoever, with or without the consent of the owner of such place notwithstanding that there may be no common regulation for the concourse of buyers and sellers and whether or not any control is exercised over the business of, or the person frequenting, the market by the owner of the place or by any other person;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.27\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15696975/\">(27)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"member\" in relation to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span> means a councillor;[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words or an alderman therorf omitted by act 67 of 1993, section 2 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.28\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/148755088/\">(28)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"municipal authority\" means any of the municipal authorities specified in section 44;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.29\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/50928352/\">(29)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"municipal market\" means a market vested in or managed by the [a Corporation]; <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), for the Corporation (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.30\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/171891825/\">(30)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"municipal slaughter house\" means a slaughter house vested in or managed by the [a Corporation;] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), for the Corporation (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">[\"Municipal Taxation Tribunal\" means the Municipal Taxation Tribunal constituted under section 169;] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 3 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">[\"Municipal Valuation Committee\" means the Municipal Valuation Commoittee constituted under section 116] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Clause (31) omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 2 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.32\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/150409842/\">(32)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"New Delhi\" means the area within the boundaries described in the First Schedule;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.33\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/17437059/\">(33)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"nuisance\" includes any act, omission, place, animal or thing which causes or is likely to cause injury, danger, annoyance or offence to the sense of sight, smell, or hearing or disturbance to rest or sleep, or which is or may be dangerous to life or injurious to health or property;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.34\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/5818205/\">(34)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"occupier\" includes\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.34.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/48682693/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any person who for the time being is paying or is liable to pay to the owner the rent or any portion of the rent of the land or building in respect of which such rent is paid or is payable;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.34.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/135565382/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">an owner in occupation of, or otherwise using his land or building;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.34.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/69191227/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">a rent-free tenant of any land or building;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.34.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/122439896/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">a licensee in occupation of any land or building; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.34.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/63885000/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any person who is liable to pay to the owner damages for the use and occupation of any land or building;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.35\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/76527495/\">(35)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"offensive matter\" includes animal carcasses, kitchen or stable refuse, dung, dirt and putrid or putrefying substances other than sewage;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.36\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/64623378/\">(36)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"Official Gazette\" means the Official Gazette of the Union territory of Delhi;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.37\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/186032507/\">(37)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"owner\" includes a person who for the time being is receiving or is entitled to receive, the rent of any land or building whether on his own account or on account of himself and others or as an agent, trustee, guardian or receiver for any other person or who should so receive the rent or be entitled to receive it if the land or building or part thereof were let to a tenant and also includes\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.37.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/193330180/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the custodian of evacuee property in respect of evacuee property vested in him under the Administration of Evacuee Property Act, 1950 (31 of 1950); and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.37.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/49903366/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the estate officer to the Government of India, the Secretary of the Delhi Development Authority, constituted under the Delhi Development Act, 1957 (<a class=\"akn-ref\" data-eid=\"chp_I__sec_2__subsec_37__para_b__p_1__ref_1\" data-href=\"/akn/in-del/act/1957/61\" href=\"/doc/128121466/\" id=\"chp_I__sec_2__subsec_37__para_b__p_1__ref_1\">61 of 1957</a>), the General Manager of a railway and the head of a Government department, in respect of properties under their respective control;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.38\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/83678681/\">(38)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"premises\" means any land or building or part of a building and includes\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.38.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/179053702/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the garden, ground and out-houses, if any, appertaining to a building or part of a building; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.38.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/151584382/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any fittings affixed to a building or part of a building for the more beneficial enjoyment thereof;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.39\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45717722/\">(39)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"private street\" means any street, which is not a public street and includes any passage securing access to two or more places belonging to the same or different owners;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.40\"><span market;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.41\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/173538380/\">(41)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span whether it is actually used or enjoyed by the public or not;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.43\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a Corporation;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.44\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/138940806/\">(44)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span Corporation (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span> as a public street or the soil below the surface of which vests in the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), for the Corporation (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span> or which under the provisions of this Act becomes, or is declared to be, a public street;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_2.44A\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/132646150/\">(44A)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span whethesr managed by Government or otherwise.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 3 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"reside\",\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_2.49.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45396248/\">(a)</a></span><span of seats shall be on the basis of the population of</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Delhi as ascertained at that census and shall be determined by the Central Government by notification in the Official Gazette and the number of seats to be</span><span class=\"akn-p\">reserved for the members of the Scheduled Castes shall, as nearly as may be, bear the same ratio to the total number of seats as the population of Scheduled</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Castes bears to the total population of Delhi:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the total number of seats shall in no case be more than two hundred and fifty and the number of seats in the Corporation shall be determined by the Central Government at the time of the establishment of the Corporation:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that the determination of seats as aforesaid shall not affect the then composition of the Corporation until the expiry of the duration</span><span class=\"akn-p\">of the Corporation:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided also that the seats reserved for the Scheduled Castes may be allotted by rotation to different wards in such manner as the Central Government</span><span class=\"akn-p\">may, by order published in the Official Gazette, direct.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_3.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a in the Official Gazette, direct in this behalf.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_3A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/117393799/\">3A.</a> [ Division of the area of a Corporation into zones and wards. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 7, for section 3A (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). Section 3A before substitution, stood as under: \"3A. Division of Delhi into zones. - (1) Delhi shall be divided into the number of zones specified in column (1) of the Fourteenth Schedule and each zone shall be known by the name specified in column 2 of that Schedule and each zone shall extend to the areas comprised in the wards specified against that zone in column (3) of the said Schedule. (2) The Central Government may, after consultation with the Government, from time to time, by notificaion in the Official Gazette, alter the names, increse or diminish the area or any zone specified in column (3) of the Fourteenth Schedule.\"]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_3A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/119240528/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The area of every Corporation shall be divided into a number of zones and each zone into a number of wars as specified in the Fourteenth schedule</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_3A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/116337713/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, alter the number or the name, and increase or diminish the area of any zone or ward specified in the Fourteenth Schedule.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_4\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/117168137/\">4.</a> [ Duration of] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 5, for section 4 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). the provisions of this Act and the rules and orders made thereunder before such date as may be specified in the notification:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no election shall be held to fill a casual vacancy occurring within [six months] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 19, for \"four months\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_14\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/5318324/\">14.</a> [ Publication of result of election. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 5, for section 7 (w.e.f. 10-1-1975)]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">Disputes regarding elections</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_15\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/82611651/\">15.</a> Election petitions.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_15.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/96247450/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No election of a councillor [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words or an alderman omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 22 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span> shall be called in question except by an election petition presented to the court of the district judge of Delhi within fifteen days from the date of the publication of the result of the election under section 14.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_15.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/183370907/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ An election petition calling in question any such election may be presented under any of the grounds specified in section 17 by any candidate at such class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/37409025/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An election petition\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" verified in the manner laid down in the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 (5 of 1908), for the verification of pleadings.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_16\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/128176735/\">16.</a> Relief that may be claimed by the petitioner.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_16.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/48269041/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A petitioner may claim\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_16.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/48407278/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">a declaration that the election of all or any of the returned candidates is void, and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_16.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/96372954/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">in addition thereto, a further declaration that he himself or any other candidate has been duly elected.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_16.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/102282456/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The expression \"returned candidate\" means a candidate whose name has been published in the Official Gazette under section 14.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_17\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/187401408/\">17.</a> Grounds for declaring elections to be void.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_17.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/102660235/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Subject to the provisions of sub-section (2) if the court of the district judge is of opinion\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_17.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/68425811/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that on the date of his election a returned candidate was not qualified or was disqualified, to be chosen as a councillor [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words \"or\" as the case may be as an alderman omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 23 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> under this Act, or (b) that any corrupt practice has been committed by a returned candidate or his agent or by any other person with the consent of a returned candidate or his agent, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_17.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15421856/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that any nomination paper has been improperly rejected, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_17.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/124521079/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the result of the election, in so far as it concerns a returned candidate, has been materially affected\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">by the improper acceptance of any nomination, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">by any corrupt practice committed in the interests of the returned candidate by a person other than that candidate or his agent or a person acting with the consent of such candidate or agent, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">by the improper acceptance or refusal of any vote or reception of any vote which is void, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iv)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">by the non-compliance with the provisions of this Act or of any rules or orders made thereunder, the court shall declare the election of the return candidate to be void.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_17.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/26827800/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If in the opinion of the court, a returned candidate has been guilty by an agent of any corrupt practice, but the court is satisfied\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_17.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/150454193/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that no such corrupt practice was committed at the election by the candidate, and every such corrupt practice was committed contrary to the orders, and without the consent of the candidate;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_17.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/166878766/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the candidate took all reasonable means for preventing the commission of corrupt practices at the election; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_17.2.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/75904176/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that in all other respects the election was free from any corrupt practice on the part of the candidate or any of his agents, then, the court may decide that the election of the returned candidate is not void</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_18\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/110573935/\">18.</a> Procedure to be followed by the district judge.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The procedure provided in the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 (5 of 1908), in regard to suits shall be followed by the court of the district judge as far as it can be made applicable, in the trial and disposal of an election petition under this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_19\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/138621855/\">19.</a> Decision of the district judge.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_19.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/167879576/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">At the conclusion of the trial of an election petition, the court of the district judge shall make an order\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_19.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/190762898/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">dismissing the election petition; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_19.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/104378701/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">declaring the election of all or any of the returned candidates to be void; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_19.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/168331756/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">declaring the election of all or any of the returned candidates to be void and the petitioner and any other candidate to have been duly elected.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_19.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/75221394/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any person who has filed an election petition has, in addition to calling in question the election of the returned candidate, claimed declaration that he himself or any other candidate has been duly elected and the court or the district judge is of opinion\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_19.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/91680544/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that in fact the petitioner or such other candidate received a majority of the valid votes, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_19.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/16532367/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that but for the votes obtained by the returned candidate the petitioner or such other candidate would have obtained a majority of the valid votes, the court shall, after declaring the election of the returned candidate to be void, declare the petitioner or such other candidate, as the case may be, to have been duly elected.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_20\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/136045315/\">20.</a> Procedure in case of equality of votes.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If during the trial of an election petition it appears that there is an equality of votes between any candidates at the election and that the addition of a vote would entitle any of those candidates to be declared elected, then, the court of the district judge shall decide between them by lot and proceed as if the one on whom the lot falls had received an additional vote.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_21\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/74109761/\">21.</a> Finality of decisions.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_21.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/187432181/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An order of the court of the district judge on an election petition shall be final and conclusive.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_21.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/67081296/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An election of a councillor [***] [[The words \"or\" an alderman omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 24 (</span><span class=\"akn-p\">w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]] not called in question in accordance with the foregoing provisions shall be deemed to be a good and valid election.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Corrupt practices and electoral offences</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_22\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/2977811/\">22.</a> Corrupt practices.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\u0097 The following shall be deemed to be corrupt practices for the purposes of this Act:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_22.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/120043121/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Bribery as defined in clause (1) of section 123 of the Representation of the People Act, 1951 (43 of 1951).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_22.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/110507713/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Undue influence as defined in clause (2) of the said section.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_22.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/14955537/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The systematic appeal by a candidate or his agent or by any other person, to vote or refrain from voting on grounds of caste, race, community or religion or the use of or appeal to, religious symbols or, the use of or appeal to, national symbols such as the national flag or the national emblem, for the furtherance of the prospects of that candidate's election.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_22.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/89212472/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The publication by a candidate or his agent or by any other person of any statement of fact which is false, and which he either believes to be false or does not believe to be true, in relation to the personal character or conduct of any candidate, or in relation to the candidature, or withdrawal from contest of any candidate being a statement reasonably calculated to prejudice the prospects of that candidate's election.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_22.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/171968873/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The hiring or procuring whether on payment or otherwise of any vehicle or vessel by a candidate or his agent or by any other person for the conveyance of any elector (other than the candidate himself, and the members of his family or his agent) to or from any polling station provided in accordance with the rules made under this Act:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the hiring of a vehicle or vessel by an elector or by several electors at their joint costs for the purpose of conveying him or them to or from any such polling station shall not be deemed to be a corrupt practice under this clause if the vehicle or vessel so hired is a vehicle or vessel not propelled by mechanical power:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that the use of any public transport vehicle or vessel or any tramcar or railway carriage by an elector at his own cost for the purpose of going to or coming from any such polling station shall not be deemed to be a corrupt practice under this clause.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation.\u0097In this clause the expression \"vehicle\" means any vehicle used or capable of being used for the purpose of road transport whether propelled by mechanical power or otherwise and whether used for drawing other vehicles or otherwise.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_22.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/11314969/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The holding of any meeting in which intoxicating liquors are served.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_22.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/35253029/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The issuing of any circular, placard or poster having a reference to the election which does not bear the name and address of the printer and publisher thereof.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_22.8\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/7901073/\">(8)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any other practice which the Central Government may by rules specify to be a corrupt practice.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_23\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/187110826/\">23.</a> Maintenance of secrecy of voting.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_23.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/179453297/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every officer or clerk, agent or other person who performs any duty in connection with the recording or counting of votes at an election shall maintain and aid in maintaining the secrecy of the voting and shall not (except for some purpose authorised by or under any law) communicate to any person any information calculated to violate such secrecy.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_23.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/126000969/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person who contravenes the provisions of sub-section (1) shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extent to three months, or with fine, or with both.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_24\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/146009763/\">24.</a> Officers, etc, at elections not to act for candidates or to influence voting.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_24.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/26616564/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person who is a returning officer, or an assistant returning officer or a presiding officer or polling officer at an election, or an officer or clerk appointed by the returning officer or the presiding officer to perform any duty in connection with an election or a member of a police force shall in the conduct or management of the election do any act (other than the giving of votes) for the furtherance of the prospects of the election of a candidate.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_24.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/55639363/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No such person as aforesaid shall endeavour\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_24.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/196862051/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to persuade any person to give his vote at an election; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_24.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/160258078/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to dissuade any person from giving his vote at an election; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_24.2.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/35357918/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to influence the voting of any person at an election in any manner.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_24.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/50273939/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person who contravenes the provisions of sub-section (1) or sub-section (2) shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_25\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/107054227/\">25.</a> Prohibition of canvassing in or near polling station and of public meeting on election day.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-blockList\"><span class=\"akn-listIntroduction\">- No person shall, on the date or dates on which the poll is taken at any polling station, commit any of the following acts within the polling station or in any public or private place within a distance of one hundred yards of the polling station, namely:\u0097</span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(a)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">canvassing for votes; or</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(b)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">soliciting the vote of any elector; or</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(c)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">persuading any elector not to vote for any particular candidate; or</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(d)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">persuading any elector not to vote at the election; or</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(e)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">exhibiting any notice or sign (other than official notice) relating to the election.</span></span></span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_25.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/124099914/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall convene, hold or attend any public meeting within any ward on the date or dates on which a poll is taken for an election in that ward.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_25.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15821758/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person who contravenes the provisions of sub-section (1) or sub-section (2) shall be punishable with fine which may extend to two hundred and fifty rupees.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_25.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/175507354/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An offence punishable under this section shall be cognizable.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_26\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/152229070/\">26.</a> Penalty for disorderly conduct in or near polling station.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_26.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/52997271/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, on the date or dates on which a poll is taken at any polling station\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_26.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/132739387/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">use or operate within or at the entrance of the polling station or in any public or private place in the neighbourhood thereof any apparatus for amplifying or reproducing the human voice, such as a megaphone or a loud-speaker; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_26.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/30385484/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">shout or otherwise act in a disorderly manner, within or at the entrance of the polling station or in any public or private place in the neighbourhood thereof, so as to cause annoyance to any person visiting the polling station for the poll, or so as to interfere with the work of the officer and other persons on duty at the polling station.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_26.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/37690025/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person who contravenes or wilfully aids or abets the contravention of the provisions of sub-section (1) shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three months, or with fine, or with both.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_26.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/43374998/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the presiding officer of a polling station has reason to believe that any person is committing or has committed an offence punishable under this section, he may direct any police officer to arrest such person, and thereupon the police officer shall arrest him.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_26.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45654851/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any police officer may take such step and use such force, as may be reasonably necessary for preventing any contravention of the provisions of sub-section (1), and may seize any apparatus used for such contravention.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_26.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/53537832/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An offence punishable under this section shall be cognizable.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_27\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/29179486/\">27.</a> Penalty for misconduct at the polling station.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_27.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/165222998/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person who during the hours fixed for the poll at any polling station, misconducts himself or fails to obey the lawful directions of the presiding officer, may be removed from the polling station by the presiding officer or by any police officer on duty or by any person authorised in this behalf by such presiding officer.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_27.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/60880865/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The powers conferred by sub-section (1) shall not be exercised so as to prevent any elector who is otherwise entitled to vote at a polling station from having an opportunity of voting at that station.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_27.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/189548691/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any person who has been so removed from a polling station, re-enters the polling station without the permissions of the presiding officer, he shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three months, or with fine, or with both.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_27.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/16734859/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An offence punishable under sub-section (3) shall be cognizable.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_28\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/88732303/\">28.</a> Breaches of official duty in connection with election.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_28.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/191020179/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any person to whom this section applies, is without reasonable cause guilty of any act or omission in breach of his official duty, he shall be punishable with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_28.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/49287635/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No suit or other legal proceeding shall lie against any such person for damages in respect of any such act or omission as aforesaid.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_28.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/121558213/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The persons to whom this section applies are returning officers, assistant returning officers, presiding officers, polling officers and any other person appointed to perform any duty in connection with the election; and the expression \"official duty\" shall for the purposes of this section be construed accordingly.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_29\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/142969231/\">29.</a> Removal of ballot papers [or ballot boxes or the voting machines] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 10 of 2002, section 3 (w.e.f. 18-2-2002)]</span> from polling station to be an offence.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/93137848/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person at an election fraudulently takes or attempts to take a ballot paper [or a ballot box or a voting machine or a part thereof] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 10 of 2002, section 3 (w.e.f. 18-2-2002)]</span> out of a polling station, or wilfully aids or abets the doing of any such act, shall be punishable with imprisonment for term a which may extend to one year, or with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees or with both.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/109963352/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the presiding officer of a polling station has reason to believe that any person is committing or has committed an offence punishable under sub-section (1), such officer may, before such person leaves the polling station, arrest or direct a police officer to arrest such person and may search such person or cause him to be searched by a police officer:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that when it is necessary to cause a women to be searched, the search shall be made by another woman with strict regard to decency.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/164552964/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any ballot paper found upon the person arrested on search [or a ballot box or a voting machine or part thereof found being carried away by a person outside the polling station] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 10 of 2002, section 3 (w.e.f. 18-2-2002)]</span> shall be made over for safe custody to a police officer by the presiding officer or when the search is made by a police officer, shall be kept by such officer in safe custody.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/190912990/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An offence punishable under sub-section (1) shall be cognizable.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_29A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/153607884/\">29A.</a> [ Prohibition of going armed to or near a polling station. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 10 of 2002, section 3 (w.e.f. 18-2-2002)]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/69227871/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person, other than the returning officer, the presiding officer, any police officer and any other person appointed to maintain peace and order at a polling station who is on duty at the polling station, shall, on a polling day, go armed which arms, as defined in the Arms Act, 1959 (54 of 1959), of any kind within the neighbourhood of a polling station.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/35062387/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any person contravenes the provisions of sub-section (1), he shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years or with fine, or with both.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29A.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/103608243/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Notwithstanding anything contained in the Arms Act, 1959, where a person is convicted of an offence under this section, the arms as defined in the said Act found in his possession shall be liable to confiscation and the licence granted in relation to such arms shall be deemed to have revoked under section 17 of that Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29A.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/22556714/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An offence punishable under sub-section (2) shall be cognizable.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_29B\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/114681637/\">29B.</a> [ Offence of booth capturing. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 10 of 2002, section 3 (w.e.f. 18-2-2002).]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whoever commits an offence of booth capturing shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than one year but which may extend to three years and with fine, and where such offence is committed by a person in the service of the Government, he shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than three years but which may extend to five years and with fine.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation.-For the purposes of this section \"booth capturing\" includes, among other things, all or any of the following activities, namely:</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_29B.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/180962366/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">seizure of a polling station or a place fixed for the poll by any person or persons making polling authorities surrender the ballot papers, used ballot box or boxes or voting machines, use and doing of any other act which affects the orderly conduct of elections;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_29B.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/120792939/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">taking possession of a polling station or a place fixed for the poll by any person or persons and allowing only his or their own supporters to exercise their right to vote and prevent others from free exercise of their right to vote;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_29B.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/62535682/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">coercing or intimidating or threatening directly or indirectly any elector and preventing him from going to the polling station or a place fixed for the poll to cast his vote;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_29B.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/79031744/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">seizure of place for counting of votes by any person or persons making the counting authorities surrender the ballot papers or voting machines and the doing of anything which affects the orderly counting of votes;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_29B.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/27042289/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">doing by any person in the service of Government of all or any of the aforesaid activities or aiding or conniving at, any such activity in the furtherance of the prospects of the election of a candidate.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_29C\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/59794488/\">29C.</a> [ Liquor not to be sold, given or distributed on polling day. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 10 of 2002, section 3 (w.e.f. 18-2-2002).]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29C.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/130307815/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No spirituous, fermented or intoxicating liquors or other substances of a like nature shall be sold, given or distributed at a hotel, eating house, lavern, shop or any other place, public or private, within a polling area during the period of forty-eight hours ending with the hour fixed for the conclusion of the poll for any election in that polling area.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29C.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98146581/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person who contravenes the provisions of sub-section (1) shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term, which may extend to six months or with fine which may extend to two thousand rupees, or with both.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_29C.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/46705117/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where a person, is convicted of an offence under this section, the spirituous, fermented or intoxication liquors or other substances of a like nature found in his possession shall be liable to confiscation and the same shall be disposed of in such manner as may be prescribed.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_30\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/184699075/\">30.</a> Other offences and penalties therefor.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_30.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/169921740/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A person shall be guilty of an electoral offence if at any election he</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_30.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/115061956/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">fraudulently defaces or destroys any nomination paper; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_30.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/78891312/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">fraudulently defaces, destroys or removes any list, notice or other document affixed by or under the authority of the returning officer; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_30.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/56472508/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">fraudulently defaces or destroys any ballot paper or the official mark on any ballot paper; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_30.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/173818253/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">without due authority supplies any ballot paper to any person or receives any ballot paper from any person or is in possession of any ballot paper; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_30.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/124659774/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">fraudulently puts into any ballot box anything other than the ballot paper which he is authorised by law to put in; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_30.1.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/180787319/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">without due authority destroys, takes, opens or otherwise interferes with any ballot box or ballot paper then in use for the purposes of the election; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_30.1.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/175391465/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">fraudulently or without due authority, as the case may be, attempts to do any of the foregoing acts or wilfully aids or abets the doing of any such acts.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_30.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/54605328/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person guilty of an offence under this section shall</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_30.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/123949286/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if he is a returning officer or an assistant returning officer or a presiding officer or a polling officer or any other officer or clerk employed on official duty in connection with the election, be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years or with fine, or with both;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_30.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/176721049/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if he is any other person, be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or with fine, or with both.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_30.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/111013239/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">For the purposes of this section, a person shall be deemed to be on official duty if his duty is to take part in the conduct of any election or part of an election including the counting of votes or to be responsible after an election for the used ballot papers and other documents in connection with such election.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_30.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/197262257/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An offence punishable under clause (b) of sub-section (2) shall be cognizable.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_30.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/162183220/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No court shall take cognizance of any offence under section 24, or under section 28, or under clause (a) of sub-section (2) of this section unless there is a complaint made by order of, or under authority from, the [Election Commission]. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 25, for \"Director of Municipal Elections\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">Power to rupees.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Councillors</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_32\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/28238375/\">32.</a> [ Oath or affirmation. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 27, for section 32 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_32.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/156128807/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every councillor and every person nominated under sub-clause (i) of clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3, before taking his seat, make and subscribe at a meeting of the[a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> an oath or affirmation according to the following form, namely:\u0097</span><span class=\"akn-p\">\"I, A.B. having been elected as councillor of the Municipal Corporation of Delhi nominated under sub-clause (i) for clause (b) of the Municipal Corporation of Delhi nominated under sub Clause (i) of clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3 as representative in the Municipal Corporation of Delhi, do swear in the name of God/solemnly affirm that I shall bear true faith and allegiance to the Constitution of India as by law established and will faithfully discharge the duty upon which I am about to enter\"</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_32.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98934608/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If a person sits or votes as a councillor or sits as a representative before he has complied with the requirements of sub-section (1), he shall be liable in respect of each day on which he sits or votes, as the case may be, to a penalty of three hundred rupees to be recovered as arrears of tax under this Act.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_32A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/126637073/\">32A.</a> [ Declaration for assets. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 28 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_32A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12332707/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every councillor shall, not later than thirty days after making and subscribing the oath or affirmation under sub-section (1) of section 32 and before the last day of the same month in each succeeding year, file with the Mayor a declaration in such form as may be prescribed by rules by the [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"for Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, of all the assets, owned by him and members of his family and such declaration shall form part of the record of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation.- For the purposes of this sub-section, \"Family\" means the spouse and dependant children of the councillor.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_32A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/36795988/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_32A.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/80874775/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if he fails a declaration under that sub-section which is either false or which he knows or believes to be false.]</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_32B\"><h3><a 1-10-1993)]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No Councillor shall be a member both of] [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and Parliament or the Legislative Assembly and if a person is so chosen, then at the expiration of fourteen days from the date of the publication in the Gazette of India, or as the case may be, in the Official Gazette, whichever is later that he has been so chosen, that person's seat in Parliament or the Legislative Assembly shall become vacant unless he has previously resigned his seat in <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 28 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> [a Corporation]. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_33\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/98452843/\">33.</a> Vacation of seat.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_33.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/138500056/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If a Councillor [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\"
