referred for the decision of the Administrator and his decision shall be final.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 29, for sub-section (3) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_33.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/38235255/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ Before giving any decision on any such question, the Administrator shall obtain the opinion of the Election Commission and shall act according to such opinion.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 29 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_33A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/145691191/\">33A.</a> [ Powers of Elections Commission.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 30 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_33A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/197032119/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where in connection with the tendering of any opinion to the Administrator under sub-section (4) of section 33, the Election Commission considers it necessary or proper to make an inquiry, and the commission is satisfied that on the basis of the affidavits filed and the documents produced in such inquiry by the parties concerned of their own accord, it cannot come to a decisive opinion on the matter which is being inquired into the Commission shall have, for the purpose of such inquiry, the powers of a civil court, while trying a suit under the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 (5 of 1908, in respect of the following matters, namely:-</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_33A.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/119153241/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">summoning and enforcing the attendance of any person and examining him on oath;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_33A.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/54868513/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">requiring the discovery and production of any document or other material object producible as evidence;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_33A.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/102264012/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">receiving evidence on affidavits;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_33A.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/145691034/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">requisitioning any public record or a copy thereof from any court of office;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_33A.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/16592622/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">issuing commissions for the examination of witnesses or documents;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_33A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/157019940/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commission shall also have the power to require any person, subject to any privilege which may be claimed by that person under any law for the time being in force, to furnish information on such points or matters as in the opinion of the Commission may be useful for, or relevant to, the subject-matter of the inquiry.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_33A.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/77047287/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commission shall be deemed to be a civil court and when any such offence, as is described in section 175, section 178, section 179, section 180 or section 228 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860), is committed in the view or presence of the Commission, the Commission may, after recording the facts constituting the offence and the statement of the accused as provided for in the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 (2 of 1974), forward the case to a magistrate having jurisdiction to try the same and the magistrate to whom any such case is forwarded shall 0proceed to hear the complaint against the accused as if the case had been forwarded to him under section 346 of the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973, (2 of 1974).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_33A.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/62487693/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any proceeding before the Commission shall be deemed to be a judicial proceeding within the meaning of section 193 and section 228 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860).]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_33B\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/99555222/\">33B.</a> [ Statements made by persons to the Election Commission. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 30 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No statement made by a person in the course of giving evidence before the Election Commission shall subject him to, or be used against him in, any civil or criminal proceeding except a prosecution for giving false evidence by such statement:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the statement\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_33B.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/192374086/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">is made in reply to a question which he is required by the Commission to answer; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_33B.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/52187777/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">is relevant to the subject-matter of the inquiry.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_33C\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/50815061/\">33C.</a> [ Procedure to be followed by the Election Commission. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 30 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Election Commission shall have the power to regulate its own procedure (including the fixing of places and times of its sittings and deciding whether to sit in public or in private).]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_33D\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/131494922/\">33D.</a> [ Protection of action taken in good faith. - No suit, prosecution or other legal proceedings shall lie against the Commission or any person acting under the direction of the Commission in respect of anything which is in good faith done or intended to be done in pursuance of the foregoing provisions of sections 33A to 33C or of any order made thereunder or in respect of the tendering of any opinion by the Commission to the Administrator or in respect of the publication, by or under the authority of the Commission of any such opinion, paper or proceedings.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 30 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>\n</h3></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_34\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/18631235/\">34.</a> Payment of allowances to [councillors and the persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section 3 of section 3.] <span id=\"section_40.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/108798968/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Each committee constituted under this section shall elect one of behalf.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter III<br/>Functions of the [A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Municipal authorities</span></span><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_44\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/4052724/\">44.</a> [ Enumeration of municipal class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the Commissioner.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_45\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/190297293/\">45.</a> Constitution of the Standing Committee.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-blockList\"><span class=\"akn-listIntroduction\">- [(1) The Standing Committee shall consist of\u0097</span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">six members elected by the councillors from among themselves at the first meeting of the [a Corporation];</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">one member each elected by the members of each Wards Committee from among themselves at the first meeting of the Wards Committee; after each general election or as soon as possible at any other meeting subsequent thereto.]</span></span></span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_45.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/19726788/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">On and [from such date as may be determined by the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 39 for from the date of such election (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> by resolution] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 39, for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> the Standing Committee shall be deemed to have been constituted.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_45.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/140355824/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ One-half of the members referred to in clause (i) of sub-section (1) and one-half of the members referred to in clause (ii) of that sub-section shall retire on the expiration of one year from the date of the constitution of the Standing Committee after the commencement of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 1993, and for that purpose they shall be selected by lot from amongst their respective categories before the said expiration in such manner as the Chairman of the Standing Committee may determine.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 39, for sub-section (3)(w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_45.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/102605834/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">During each succeeding year the members who have been longest in office shall retire therefrom:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that in the case of a member who has been re-elected the term of his office shall for the purpose of this sub-section be computed from the date of his re-election.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_45.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12998539/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ The [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 39, for sub-section (5)(w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> or the concerned Wards Committee, as the case may be, shall in a meeting held immediately before the occurrence of the vacancies, caused by the retirement of the members under sub-section (3) or sub-section (4), elect the requisite member or members from amongst the councillors or from amongst members of the Wards Committee, as the case may be, to fill up those vacancies.]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_45.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/116962706/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any councillor [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words or alderman omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 39 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> who ceases to be a member of the Standing Committee shall be eligible for re-election.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_46\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/139714426/\">46.</a> Casual vacancies.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_46.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/8155423/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When a casual vacancy occurs in the office of a member of the Standing Committee, the [Corporation or, as the case may be, Wards Committee shall] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 40, \"for Corporation\" shall (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> fill up the vacancy, as soon as may be after, and in any case within one month of the occurrence of the vacancy, by the election of another councillor or [persons referred to in sub-clause (i) of clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 40, for \"alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_46.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/183804930/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A member elected to fill a casual vacancy shall be elected to serve for the remainder of his predecessor's term of office.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_47\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/146662601/\">47.</a> Chairman and Deputy Chairman of the Standing Committee.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_47.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/6172550/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Standing Committee shall at its first meeting in each year elect one of its members [who is a Councillor] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 41 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> to be the Chairman and another member to be the Deputy Chairman.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_47.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/173469835/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Chairman or the Deputy Chairman of the Standing Committee shall hold office from the date of his election until the election of his successor in office unless in the meantime he resigns his office as Chairman or Deputy Chairman or his term of office as member of the Standing Committee is in any manner determined or unless in the case of the Deputy Chairman he is elected as Chairman.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_47.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/159985428/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">On the occurrence of any casual vacancy in the office of the Chairman or the Deputy Chairman, the Standing Committee shall within one month of the occurrence of such vacancy elect one of its members [who is a Councillor] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 41 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> as Chairman or Deputy Chairman, as the case may be, and the Chairman or the Deputy Chairman so elected shall hold office for the remainder of his predecessor's term.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_48\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/21244741/\">48.</a> Resignation of Chairman and members of the Standing Committee.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_48.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/13666330/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any member of the Standing Committee may resign his office by writing under his hand addressed to the Chairman; and the Chairman may resign his office by writing under his hand addressed to the Mayor.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_48.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/62397301/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A resignation under sub-section (1) shall take effect from the date specified for the purpose in the writing referred to in that sub-section, or if no such date is specified, from the date of its receipt by the Chairman or the Mayor, as the case may be.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_49\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/39890243/\">49.</a> Functions of the Standing Committee.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Standing Committee shall exercise such powers and perform such functions as are specifically conferred or imposed upon it by or under this Act.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">The Wards Committees <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 42, for the heading \"The Delhi data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_54.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/190296274/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner so appointed shall hold office for a term of five years in the first instance:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that his appointment may be renewed from time to time for a term not exceeding one year at a time:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that where the Commissioner holds a lien on any service under the Government, the Central Government may at any time after reasonable notice to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> replace his services at the disposal of that Government.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_54.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/62647178/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Central Government\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_54.3.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/72446396/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">shall remove the Commissioner from office if at a special meeting of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> called for the purpose a resolution for such removal has been passed by a majority of not less than three fifths of the total number of members;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_54.3.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/30147480/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">may remove the Commissioner from office at any time if it appears to that Government that he is incapable of performing the duties of his office or has been guilty of neglect or misconduct in the discharge of such duties which renders his removal expedient.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_54.4\"><span sanction of the Central Government and of the [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_55\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/121610347/\">55.</a> Salary and allowances of the Commissioner.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner shall be paid out of the Municipal Fund such monthly salary and such monthly allowances, if any, as may from time to time be fixed by the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), for 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and may be given such facilities (if any) in relation to residential accommodation, conveyance and the like as may from time to time be fixed by that Government:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the salary of the Commissioner shall not be varied to his disadvantage after his appointment.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_56\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/52744308/\">56.</a> data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall appoint another person to officiate as Commissioner in his place.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_57\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/34157860/\">57.</a> Appointment of officiating Commissioner in case of death, resignation or removal of Commissioner.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If any vacancy occurs in the office of the Commissioner on account of death, resignation or removal, the Central Government may appoint another person to officiate as Commissioner in his place for a term not exceeding two months, pending the appointment of a Commissioner under section 54.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_58\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/178067226/\">58.</a> Service regulations of Commissioner.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_58.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/9200573/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the Commissioner is an officer in the service of the Government, the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall make such contribution towards his leave allowances, pension and provident fund as may be required by the conditions of his service under the Government, to be paid by him or for him, as the case may be.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_58.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/105065042/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the Commissioner is not an officer in the service of the Government, his leave and leave allowances, his superannuation or retirement, his gratuity or pension and the proportions of his pensionary or provident fund contribution payable respectively from his salary and from the Municipal Fund shall be governed by rules:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_58.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/166729226/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the amount of any such leave and leave allowances, gratuity or pension shall in no case, without the special sanction of the Central Government, exceed what would be admissible in the case of Government servants of similar standing and status; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_58.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/155950810/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the conditions under which such allowances, gratuity or pension are granted or any leave, superannuation or retirement is sanctioned shall not without similar sanction be more favourable than those for the time being prescribed for such Government servants.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_59\"><h3><a purpose of carrying out the provisions of this Act [<b class=\"akn-b\">*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words \"other than those pertaining to the Delhi Electric Supply Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.r.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> and of any other Act for the time being in force which confers, any power or imposes any duty on the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, shall vest in the Commissioner who shall also\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_59.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/19494551/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">exercise or natural calamity involving or likely to involve extensive damage to any property of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, or danger to human life, take such immediate action as he considers necessary and make a report forthwith to the Standing Committee and the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> of the action he has taken and the reasons for the same as also of the amount of cost, if any, incurred or likely to be incurred in consequence of such action, which is not covered by a budget-grant;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_59.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/130339679/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span &lt;SPAN class=amd1&gt;&lt;A TITLE =]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_66.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/172596829/\">(1)</a></span><span data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 52, for \"and alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>, convene a special meeting of the [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" date, and an adjourned meeting may be further adjourned in like manner.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_73\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/162921817/\">73.</a> First results of the election [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words of aldermen omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 53 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> under section 14 and shall be class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- A list of the business to be transacted at every meeting except at an adjourned meeting shall be sent to the address of each councillor [and the persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 54, for \"and alderman\" (w.e.f. has been so given:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that any councillor [or the persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 54, for \"or aldermen\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> may send or deliver to the Municipal Secretary notice of any resolution going beyond the matters mentioned in the notice given of such meeting so as to reach him at least forty-eight hours before the date fixed for the meeting and the Municipal Secretary shall with all possible dispatch take steps to circulate such resolution to every councillor and the person referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3 in such manner as he may think fit.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_75\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/144261142/\">75.</a> Quorum.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_75.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/71999079/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The quorum necessary for the transaction of business at a meeting of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be one-fifth of the total number of 1993, section 55 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_75.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/10748149/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If at any time during a meeting of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> there is no quorum, it shall be the duty of the Mayor or the person presiding over such meeting either to adjourn the meeting or to suspend the meeting until there is a quorum.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_75.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/70051078/\">(3)</a></span><span 76\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_77.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/43914869/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">at a meeting for the election of a Mayor the Administrator shall nominate a councillor [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words \"or an alderman\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 57 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> who is not a candidate for such election to preside over the meeting;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_77.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/142498874/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if during the election of Mayor it appears that there is an equality of votes between any candidates at such election and that the addition of a vote would entitle any of those candidates to be elected as Mayor, then, the person presiding over the meeting shall decide between them by lot to be drawn in the presence of the candidates and in such manner as he may determine, and the candidate on whom the lot falls shall be deemed to have received an additional vote.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_78\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/10204297/\">78.</a> Method of deciding questions.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_78.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/59966874/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Save as otherwise provided in this Act, all matters required to be decided by the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be decided by the majority of the votes of the [members and persons referred to in sub-clauses (ii), (iii) and (iv) of clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 58, for \"members\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> present and voting.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_78.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/135170960/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The voting shall be by show of hands, but the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, subject to such regulations as may be made by it, resolve that any question or class of questions shall be decided by ballot.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_78.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/105710375/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">At any meeting, unless voting be demanded by at least four [members and persons referred to in sub-clauses (ii), (iii) and (iv) of clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 58, for \"members\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> a declaration by the presiding officer at such meeting that a resolution has been carried or lost, and an entry to that effect in the minutes of the proceedings shall, for the purposes of this Act, be conclusive evidence of the fact without proof of the number or proportion of the votes recorded in favour of or against such resolution.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_78.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/123458580/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If voting as aforesaid is demanded, the votes of all the [members and persons referred to in sub-clauses (ii), (iii) and (iv) of clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 58, for \"members\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> present who desire to vote shall be taken under the direction of the presiding officer at the meeting and the result of the voting shall be deemed to be the resolution of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> at such meeting.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_79\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/148137965/\">79.</a> Maintenance of order at and admission of public to, meetings; withdrawal and suspension of councillors and [persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 59, for \"or alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_79.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/46213524/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Mayor or the person presiding over a meeting preserve order thereat and shall have all powers necessary for the purpose of preserving such order.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_79.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/180833937/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Mayor or the person presiding over a meeting may direct any councillor [or persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by act 67 of 1993, section 59, for \"or alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span> whose conduct is in his opinion grossly disorderly to withdraw immediately from the meeting and any councillor [or persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by act 67 of 1993, section 59, for \"or alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> so directed to withdraw shall do so forthwith and shall absent himself during remainder of the meeting.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_79.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/9359920/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any councillor [or persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by act 67 of 1993, section 59, for \"or alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> is ordered to withdraw a second time within fifteen days, the Mayor or the person presiding may suspend such councillor [or persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by act 67 of 1993, section 59, for \"or alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> from attending the meetings of the Corporation for any period not exceeding fifteen days and the councillor or alderman so suspended shall absent himself accordingly:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Mayor may at any time decide that such suspension be terminated:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that such suspension shall not debar the suspended councillor [or persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by act 67 of 1993, section 59, for \"or alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> from serving on any committee of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> of which he is a member.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_79.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/99999110/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Subject to sub-section (5) every meeting shall be open to the public, unless a majority of the [members and persons referred to in sub-clauses (ii), (iii) and (iv) of clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 59, for \"members\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span> present at the meeting decide that any enquiry or deliberation pending before the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be held in private.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_79.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/6980221/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may make regulations for the purpose of admission of the member of the public to its meetings and for the removal by force, if necessary, of any member of the public admitted to a meeting for interrupting or disturbing the proceedings of the meeting.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_79.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/56511000/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In the case of grave disorder arising in a meeting the Mayor or the person presiding may, if he thinks it necessary to do so, adjourn the meeting to a date specified by him.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_80\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/65649232/\">80.</a> Councillors or [plerson referred to in sub-clauses (ii), (iii), and (iv) of clause(b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 60, for \"alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> not to vote on matter in which they are interested.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No councillor or [person referred to in sub-clauses (ii), (iii) and (iv) of clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 60, \"alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> shall vote at a meeting of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or of any committee thereof on any question relating to his own conduct or vote or take part in any discussion on any matter (other than a matter affecting generally the residents of Delhi or of any particular ward), which affects his pecuniary interest or any property in respect of which he is directly or indirectly interested, or any property of or for which he is a manager or agent.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_81\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/63641195/\">81.</a> Right to attend meetings of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the class=\"akn-p\">- [(1) The Commissioner or any municipal officer authorised by him in this behalf may attend, speak in, or otherwise take part in the proceedings of, any meeting of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 61, for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993.)]</span> or any of its Committees, but none of the persons specified herein shall by virtue of this sub-section be entitled to vote in any such meeting.]</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_81.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/196983949/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A councillor or [person referred to in sub-clauses (ii), (iii) and (iv) of clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 61, for \"alderman\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> may, subject to the provisions of sub-section (3), ask the Commissioner questions on any matter relating to the municipal government of Delhi or the administration of this Act or the functions of any of the municipal authorities.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_81.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/130493708/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The right to ask a question shall be governed by the following conditions, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_81.3.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/144728324/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">not less than seven clear days' notice in writing specifying the question shall be given to the Municipal Secretary;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_81.3.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/53835676/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">no question shall\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">bring in any name or statement not strictly necessary to make the question intelligible,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">contain arguments, ironical expressions, imputations, epithets or defamatory statements,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">ask for an expression of opinion or the solution of a hypothetical proposition,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iv)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">ask as to the character or conduct of any person except in his official or public capacity,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(v)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">relate to a matter which is primarily the concern of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or of any of the municipal authorities,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(vi)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">make or imply a charge of a personal character,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(vii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">raise questions of policy too large to be dealt with within the limits of an answer to a question,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(viii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">repeat in substance questions already answered or to which an answer has been refused,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ix)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">ask for information on trivial matters,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(x)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">ordinarily ask for information on matters of past history,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(xi)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">ask for information set forth in accessible documents or in ordinary works of reference,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(xii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">raise matters under the control of bodies or persons not primarily responsible to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(xiii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">ask for any information on matter which is under adjudication by a court of law.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_81.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a sub-section (3).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_81.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/101071557/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span posts.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_90.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/169019148/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The [Commissioner] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 67, for \"appropriate authority\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> shall from time to time prepare schedules of posts other than those specified in sub-section (1) of section 89 setting forth the designations and grades of municipal officers and other municipal employees who should be maintained permanently in the service of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> indicating therein the salaries, fees and allowances which are proposed to be paid to such officers and other employees.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_90.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/109382287/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ Of the two schedules referred to in sub-section (1), the first fit and thereafter may amend it either on its own motion after ascertaining the views of the [Commissioner or at his instance.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 67, for \"appropriate authority\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> and the committee concerned or at the instance of [the Commissioner] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 67, for \"such authority\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> or committee.</span></span></section><section sub-section (1) of section 3, the officers and employees of the erstwhile North Delhi Municipal</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Corporation, South Delhi Municipal Corporation and East Delhi Municipal Corporation shall, with immediate effect, become the officers and employees of the Corporation.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_90A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[substituted by act 10 of 2022]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_91\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/12295176/\">91.</a> Restriction on employment of permanent officers and other employees.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No permanent officer or other employee shall be entertained in any department of the municipal administration unless he has been appointed under sub-section (1) of section 89 or his office and emoluments are included in one of the schedules for the time being in force prepared and sanctioned under section 40.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_92\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/182605247/\">92.</a> Power to make appointments.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [(1) Subject to the provisions of section 89, the power of the appointing municipal officers and other municipal employees whether temporary or permanent shall vest in the Commissioner:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the power of appointing officers and other employees immediately subordinate to the Municipal Secretary or the Municipal Chief Auditor to category B posts or category C posts shall vest in the Standing Committee:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that the Standing Committee my delegate to the Municipal Secretary or the Municipal Chief Auditor the power of appointing officers and other employees immediately subordinate to the said Secretary or Auditor, to category C posts.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 69 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_92.2\"><span consistently with the maintenance of efficiency of administration, in the making of appointments of municipal officers and other municipal employees.</span></span></section></section><section 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_93\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/174278561/\">93.</a> Officers and other employees not to undertake any extraneous work.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No municipal officer or other municipal employee shall undertake any work unconnected with his duties under this Act except with the permission of the [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_94\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/180699965/\">94.</a> Officers and other employees not to be interested in any contract, etc, with the [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_94.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/158816561/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A person shall be disqualified for being appointed as a municipal officer or employee if he has, directly or indirectly, by himself or by a partner or any other person any share or interest in any contract made with, or any work being done for, the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> other than as such officer or employee.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_94.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/36194917/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any such officer or other employee acquires, directly or indirectly, by himself or by a partner or any other person, any share or interest in any such contract or work as is referred to in sub-section (1), he shall unless the authority appointing him in any particular case otherwise decides, be liable to be removed from his office by an order of such authority:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that before an order of removal is made, such officer or other employee shall be given a reasonable opportunity of showing cause against the action proposed to be taken in regard to him.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_95\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/83649917/\">95.</a> Punishment for municipal officers and other employees.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_95.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/31011700/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every municipal officer or other municipal employee shall be liable to have his increments or promotion withheld or to be censured, reduced in rank, compulsorily retired, removed or dismissed for any breach of any departmental regulations or of discipline or for carelessness, unfitness, neglect of duty or other misconduct by such authority as may be prescribed by regulations:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no such officer or other employee as aforesaid shall be reduced in rank, compulsorily retired, removed or dismissed by any authority subordinate to that by which he was appointed:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may by regulations provide that municipal employees belonging to such classes or categories as may be specified in the regulations shall be liable also to be fined by such authority as may be specified therein.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_95.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/196685725/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No such officer or other employee shall be punished under sub-section (1) unless he has been given a reasonable opportunity of showing cause against the action proposed to be taken in regard to him:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that this sub-section shall not apply\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_95.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/72112007/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where an officer or other employee is removed or dismissed on the ground of conduct which had led to his conviction on a criminal charge; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_95.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/79549961/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where the authority empowered to remove or dismiss such officer or other employee, is satisfied that for some reason to be recorded by that authority, it is not reasonably practicable to give that person an opportunity of showing cause.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_95.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/152930649/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any question arises whether it is reasonably practicable to give to any officer or other employee an opportunity of showing cause under sub-section (2), the decision thereon of the authority empowered to remove or dismiss such officer or other employee shall be final.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_95.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/22810120/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An officer or other employee upon whom a punishment has been inflicted under this section may appeal to such officer or authority as may be prescribed by regulations:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[Provided that in the case of an officer or other employee appointed by the Commissioner an appeal shall lie to the Administrator.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 70 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section></section><section Act 7 of 2004, section 2, for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 17-12-2004)]</span></span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter VII<br/>Revenue and Expenditure</h2>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Fund</span></span><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_99\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/112535285/\">99.</a> Constitution of the Municipal Fund.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_99.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/144530854/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span estimates.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [(1)] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 788, for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> The [Every Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall, on or before the 31st day of March of every year, adopt for the ensuing year the budget estimate which shall be an estimate of the income and expenditure of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> to be received and incurred on account of the municipal government of [the area of the Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, 2(c), for \"Delhi\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_109.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/143619454/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">On or before the 15th day of February of each year the [every Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall determine the rates at which various municipal taxes, rates and cases shall be levied in the next following year and save as otherwise provided in this Act the rates so fixed shall not be subsequently altered for the year for which they have been fixed.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_109.3\"><span Committee and presented and adopted in such manner and shall provide for all such matters as are prescribed by regulations made in this behalf.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_110\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/163486940/\">110.</a> Power of Corporation to alter budget estimate.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-blockList\"><span class=\"akn-listIntroduction\">- [(1) On the recommendation of the Standing Committee in respect of the budget estimate, the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 79, for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> may from time to time, during the year,\u0097</span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">increase the amount of budget grant under any head;</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-num\">(iii)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">reduce the amount of the budget-grant under any head:</span></span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that due regard shall be had to all the requirements of this Act and in making any increase or any additional budget-grant the estimated cash balance at the close of the year shall not be reduced below the sum of one lakh rupees or such higher sum as the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may determine in respect of the budget estimate.]</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_110.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/91143759/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every increase in a budget-grant and every additional budget-grant made in any year under sub-section (1) shall be deemed to be included in the budget estimates finally adopted for that year.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_110.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/37198933/\">(3)</a></span><span within a budget-grant:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that every reduction if it exceeds five hundred rupees shall be reported forthwith by Standing Committee to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and the Standing Committee and the Commissioner shall give effect to any order that may be passed by the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of thousand rupees within a minor head if such transfer does not involve a recurring liability:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that every such transfer, if it exceeds five hundred rupees, shall be reported forthwith by the Commissioner to the Standing Committee and the Commissioner shall give effect to any order that may be passed by that Committee in relation thereto.</span><span class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_111\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/99824690/\">111.</a> Power of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> to re-adjust income and expenditure during the year.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_111.1\"><span reduction of budget-grant that has been made under section 110 the income of the Municipal Fund during the same year will not suffice to meet the expenditure sanctioned in the budget estimates of that year and to leave at the close of the year the cash balance specified in or determined under the proviso to sub-section (1) of section 110, then, it shall be incumbent on the [a Corporation] <span may be possible so to do with regard to all the requirements of this Act, or have recourse to supplementary taxation under section 151 or to an increase of the rates of cesses, fees, fares and other charges leviable under this Act, or to adopt all or any of those methods.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_112\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/134368164/\">112.</a> Provisions as to unexpended budget-grant.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If the whole or any part of any budget-grant included in the budget estimates for a year remains unexpended at the close of that year, and the amount thereof has not been taken into account in the opening balance entered in the budget estimates of any of the next two following years, the Standing Committee [<b class=\"akn-b\">*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words or the Delhi Transport Committee omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sh. II (w.r.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> [</b>*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Certain words omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 80 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> may sanction the expenditure of such budget-grant or the unexpended portion thereof during the next two following years for the completion of the purpose or object for which the budget-grant was originally made and not for any other purpose or object.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter VIII<br/>Taxation</h2>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Levy of tax.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- For any building, the building tax shall be equal to the rate of building tax as may be prescribed by 4[a Corporation]] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> under section 114D multiplied by the annual value physically challenged persons.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- In the case of any self-occupied residential building singly owned by a man who is sixty-five years or more in age or by a woman irrespective of her age or a physically challenged person as may be defined in the bye-laws, irrespective of age, or jointly owned by any of these categories, [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may specify a rebate on the building tax not exceeding thirty per cent. of the tax due on the covered space of such building upto one hundred square metres of the covered space:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that such rebate shall not be available for more than one residential building within the jurisdiction of the National Capital Territory of Delhi.]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_114C\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/19454545/\">114C.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 6 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).]</span> Vacant land tax.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> under section 114E multiplied by the annual value of the vacant land determined under sub-section (3) of section 116E:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that where there is any construction of the land and the area of plinth of such building is in excess of such percentage of the area of the plot, as may be prescribed in the bye-laws, no vacant land tax shall be levied.]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_114D\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/75479706/\">114D.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Rate of building tax.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Save as otherwise provided in this Act, the base rate of property tax on buildings in Delhi shall be between a minimum of six per cent. and a maximum of twenty per cent. of the annual values of such buildings as may be specified by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> from time to time:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, at any time, prescribe fixed rates between the minimum and the maximum rates of tax as aforesaid for different colonies or for different groups of buildings in such colonies:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may also introduce graduated rates of tax within the minimum and the maximum rates of tax as aforesaid on the basis of straight line system or any other system as may be specified by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation.-\"Straight line system\" shall mean the system in which the rate of tax is equivalent to the annual value of a property (X) divided by the minimum annual value (Xl) and Y being added to the quotient so arrived, Y being the difference between the maximum rate of tax and the quotient of maximum (X2) and minimum (X1) annual values.]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_114E\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/113857627/\">114E.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 6 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Rate of vacant land tax.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Save as otherwise provided in this Act, the rate of tax on vacant lands in Delhi shall be between a minimum of six per cent. and a maximum of twenty per of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, at any time, specify fixed rates between the minimum and the maximum rates of tax as aforesaid for different colonies or for different groups of vacant lands in such colonies:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may also introduce graduated rates of tax within the minimum and the maximum rates of tax as aforesaid on the basis of straight line system or any other system as may be specified by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the 114D.]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_115\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/138275931/\">115.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 7, for \"section 115\" (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Exemption of vacant lands and buildings from property tax.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_115.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15251662/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Save as otherwise provided in this Act, property tax shall be levied on all vacant lands and buildings in Delhi except-</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_115.1.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/18826247/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span
