class=\"akn-p\">any vacant land or building included in any village abadi, which is occupied for residential purpose by any original owner or his legal heir, subject to a maximum of one hundred square metres of covered space;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_115.1.iii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/21296916/\">(iii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">vacant lands or buildings or portions thereof, exclusively used for the purpose of public worship;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_115.1.iv\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/164757581/\">(iv)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">vacant land or buildings or portions thereof, exclusively occupied and used, with the approval of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, for the purpose of public charity as may be specified in the bye-laws or for the purpose of medical relief to, or education of the poor, free of charge;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_115.1.v\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/101675415/\">(v)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">vacant lands or buildings exclusively used for the purpose of public burial or as cremation ground, or any other place used for the disposal of the dead, duly registered under this Act;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_115.1.vi\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/169059973/\">(vi)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">such heritage lands or buildings as are specifically notified for exemption by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> as also such premises as are so specified by the Archaeological Survey of India;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_115.1.vii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/2709536/\">(vii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">vacant lands and buildings owned exclusively by war widows, gallantry award winners in Defence Forces, Police and Para-military Forces as also civilians who have received bravery awards of the highest order from the Government including Annual Bravery Awards given by the President:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the exemption shall be subject to the condition that-</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_115.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/146725378/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the premises in question is in self-occupation for residential use and no portion thereof is let out for any purposes, whatsoever;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_115.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/4888937/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">in case the person concerned has more than one property in Delhi, the exemption shall be applicable to only one property which is permanently used for self-residence;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_115.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/176224547/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the benefit of exemption shall be limited to the life-time of the person concerned, except where the award has been granted posthumously, in which case the exemption will be granted to the widow of the gallantry award winner.</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(viii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">vacant lands and buildings owned by, or vested in, [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> but not leased out or rented out, and in respect of which the property tax, if levied, would, under the provisions of this Act, be leviable primarily on [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>.</span></span></section></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation.-For the purpose of clause (iii), no portion of any vacant land building where any trade or business is carried on, or which is used for residential purpose, or in respect of which any rent or income is derived, shall be deemed not to be exclusively used for public worship and such portion of such vacant land or building shall be assessed as a separate unit of assessment.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_115.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/16998428/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall cause to be maintained a register showing separately the vacant lands and buildings exempted from the property tax under sub-section (1) in such form as may be specified by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, and such register shall be open to the public for inspection.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_115.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/133123521/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may levy on such vacant lands and covered space of buildings as are exempt from the property tax, service charge on such scale, as may be provided under this Act or as prescribed by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the service charge so levied shall not be less than seventy five per cent. of the amount that would have been payable as property tax for the covered space of the building or the vacant land as referred to in section 114D or section 114E.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_115A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/167375174/\">115A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 7, for \"section 115\" (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).]</span> Unit of assessment.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_115A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98693049/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every building and every vacant land shall be assessed as a single unit:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that where portions of any building or vacant land are separately owned so as to be entirely independent and capable of separate enjoyment, notwithstanding the fact that access to such separate portions is made through a common passage or a common stair-case, as the case may be, such separately owned portions may be assessed separately.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_115A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/113307025/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">All buildings, to the extent they are contiguous or are within the same cartilage or are on the same foundation and are owned by the same owner or co-owners as an undivided property, shall be treated as one unit for the purpose of assessment under this Act:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that if any such building is sub-divided into separate shares which are not entirely independent and capable of separate enjoyment, the Commissioner may, on application from the owners or the co-owners, apportion the valuation and assessment of such building among the co-owners according to the value of their respective shares treating the entire building as a single unit.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_115A.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/92592009/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Each residential unit with its percentage of the undivided interest in the common areas and facilities, constructed or purchased and owned by, or under the control of, any housing co-operative society registered under any law regulating co-operative housing for the time being in force, shall be assessed separately.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_115A.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/121516745/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Each apartment and its percentage of the undivided interest in the common areas and facilities in a building within the meaning of any law regulating apartment ownership for the time being in force, shall be assessed separately.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_115A.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/76804004/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the ownership of any vacant land or building or any portion thereof is sub-divided into separate shares, or if more than one adjoining vacant land or building or portion thereof comes under one ownership by amalgamation, the Commissioner may, on an application from the owner or the co-owners, as the case may be, separate, or amalgamate, as the case may be, such vacant land or building or portion thereof so as to ensure conformity with the provisions of this section.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_115A.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/176967103/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Notwithstanding any assessment made in respect of any vacant lands or buildings before the commencement of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003 the Commissioner may, on his own or otherwise, amalgamate, or separate, or continue to assess, such vacant lands or buildings or portions thereof so as to ensure conformity with the provisions of this section.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_115A.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/161582177/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall, upon an application made in this behalf by an owner, lessee, sub-lessee, or occupier of any vacant land or building and upon payment of such fee as may be prescribed in the bye-laws, furnish to such owner, lessee, sub-lessee, or occupier, as the case may be, information regarding the apportionment of the property tax on such vacant land or building among the several occupiers of such vacant land or building for the current period of assessment or for any preceding period of assessment:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that nothing in this sub-section shall prevent [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> from recovering the arrear dues on account of property tax from any such person, jointly or severally.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_116\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/107161052/\">116.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted byDelhi Act 6 of 2003, section 8, for \"section 116\" (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).]</span> Constitution of Municipal Valuation Committee.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98098034/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Government shall as soon as may be after the commencement of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003, and thereafter at the expiration of every third year, constitute by notification in the official Gazette, a Municipal Valuation Committee.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/69136855/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Valuation Committee shall consist of-</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/147461209/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">a Chairperson, and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/90129165/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">such other members, being not less than two and not more than six, as the Government may determine.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/199608323/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Chairperson and the other members of the Municipal Valuation Committee shall be appointed by the Government and the qualifications and experience requisite for their appointment, the manner of selection, and other terms and conditions of service including salaries and allowances, tenure of office shall be such as the Government may by rules determine.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/97298191/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The salaries and allowances of the Chairperson and the other members of the Municipal Valuation Committee shall be paid from the Municipal Fund.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/46386679/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The functions of the Municipal Valuation Committee shall be-</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116.5.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/6941159/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to make recommendations to 1[a Corporation] on matters relating to classification of vacant lands and buildings in any ward of Delhi into colonies and groups of lands and buildings and fixation of base value per unit area of vacant land or per unit area of covered space of building and factors for increase or decrease, or for no increase or decrease, thereof;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116.5.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/92200655/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to consider objections under section 116C, and to make recommendation thereon; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116.5.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/97077930/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to perform such other functions as the Government may require.]</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_116A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/124762424/\">116A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 8, for \"section 116\" (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).]</span> Classification of vacant lands and buildings into colonies and groups and specification of base unit area values therefor.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/101393350/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Valuation Committee shall recommend the classification of the vacant lands and buildings in any ward of Delhi, referred to in section 5, into colonies and groups of lands and buildings after taking into account the following parameters:</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a colony, resettlement colony, rural village and non-residential areas;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15577941/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">availability of civil and social infrastructure;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/82402476/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">access to roads;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/186967696/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">access to district centres, local shopping centres, convenience-shopping centres, and other markets;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span> or the Delhi Development Authority;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.1.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/21082075/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">use-wise category of any building including residential building, business building, mercantile building, building for recreation and sports purposes, industrial building, hazardous building and public purpose building including educational, medical and such other institutional building and farmhouse, as may be specified by [a Corporation;] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.1.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/149161687/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">in the case of buildings used for business, mercantile, recreation and sports, industrial, hazardous, storage or farmhouse purposes, the location of such buildings adjacent to such categories of streets, as may, subject to the provisions of sub-section (2), be specified by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.1.h\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/154006545/\">(h)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the types of buildings which may be classified as pucca, semi-pucca or katcha, as may be specified by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.1.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/19691901/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the age-wise grouping of buildings as may be specified by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.1.j\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/44937473/\">(j)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">such other parameters as may be considered relevant by the Municipal Valuation Committee.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/181112871/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Valuation Committee shall recommend, group wise,</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/13181051/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the base unit area value of any owner-occupied vacant land, or any wholly owner-occupied building of pucca structure, constructed in the year 2000 or thereafter, and put to exclusive residential use, and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_116A.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/110264634/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the factor for increasing or decreasing, or for not increasing or decreasing, the base unit area values specified in clause (a), separately in respect of each of the parameters of type of colony, use, age, type of structure and occupancy status of the vacant land or building, as the case may be, subject to a lower limit of zero point five and upper limit often point zero.]</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_116B\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/26099997/\">116B.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 8, for \"section 116\" (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Notification of classification of vacant lands and buildings into colonies and groups and specification of base unit area values therefor and factors for increase or decrease.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116B.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/172265694/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall, having regard to the recommendations of the Municipal Valuation Committee, declare its intention to classify vacant lands and buildings in each ward into such colonies and groups of lands and buildings as [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may; by public notice, specify, and shall also specify in such public notice the base value it proposes to specify per unit area of vacant land and per unit area of covered space of building within each such group and also the factors for increasing or decreasing, or for not increasing or decreasing, the base unit area values of vacant lands and buildings referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 116A.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116B.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/145747284/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall, on receipt of any representation from any group in any colony affected by such classification of lands or buildings into any group or specification of the base unit area values of vacant lands or covered space of buildings within such groups, and the factors for increasing or decreasing, or for not increasing or decreasing, such unit area values of vacant lands of covered space of buildings, refer such representation to the Municipal Valuation Committee for reconsideration, and the decision of the Municipal Valuation Committee thereon shall, subject to the provisions of section 116K, be binding on [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_116C\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/16681254/\">116C.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 8, for \"section 116\" (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Objection to classification of vacant lands and buildings into colonies and groups and fixation of base unit area values and factors for increasing or decreasing such base unit area values.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116C.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/110504463/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any owner or occupier of any vacant land or building in any ward in respect of which a public notice has been issued under section 116B, has any objection to the manner of classification of any group or groups, or the base value per unit area of vacant land or the base value per unit area of covered space of building in any group, or the factors as specified in clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 116A, he may submit to such officer of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> as may be authorised by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> in this behalf his objection in such form, and containing such particulars, as may be prescribed, within thirty days from the date of publication of such public notice, and such objection shall be considered by the Municipal Valuation Committee, after giving the person submitting the objection an opportunity of being heard.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116C.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/158445016/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The procedure for hearing and disposal of objections shall be such as may be prescribed.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116C.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/74941103/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">On the expiry of thirty days from the date of publication of the public notice under section 116B and after considering the recommendation of the Municipal Valuation Committee on the objections, if any, in accordance with the provisions of this section, [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall, by public notice, specify groupwise the base unit area value of vacant land and the base unit area value of covered space of building and the factors referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 116A:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall not alter the unit area values recommended by the Municipal Valuation Committee without the approval of the Government.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_116D\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/40807847/\">116D.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi act 6 of 2003, section 8, for \"section 116\"(w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Final base unit area values of vacant land and of covered space of building.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116D.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/176795448/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Subject to the provisions of section 169, the base unit area value of vacant land and the base unit area value of covered space of building in any group, as may be specified under sub-section (3) of section 116C, shall be final.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116D.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/155585540/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall publish the final base unit area value of vacant land and the final base unit area value of covered space of building as aforesaid and the factors used for increasing or decreasing, or for not increasing or decreasing, the final base unit area values as aforesaid and shall make them available for inspection by any person free of charge. Copies thereof shall also be made available to any person on payment of cost.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_116E\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/83759061/\">116E.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 8, for section 116 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Determination of annual value of covered space of building and of vacant land.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116E.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/37524845/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The annual value of any covered space of building in any ward shall be the amount arrived at by multiplying the total area of such covered space of building by the final base unit area value of such covered space and the relevant factors as referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 116A.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation.-\"covered space\", in relation to a building, shall mean the total floor area in all the floor thereof, including the thickness of walls, and shall include the spaces of covered verandah and courtyard, gangway, garrage, common service area, staircase, and balcony including any area projected beyond the plot boundary and such other space as may be prescribed.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116E.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/168754688/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may require the total area of the covered space of building as aforesaid to be certified by an architect registered under the Architects Act, 1972 (20 of 1972), or any licensed architect, subject to such conditions as may be prescribed.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116E.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/180540760/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The annual value of any vacant land in any ward shall be the amount arrived at by multiplying the total area of such vacant land by the final base unit area value of such land and the relevant factors as referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 116A.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_116E.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/91227241/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If, in the case of any vacant land or covered space of building, any portion thereof is subject to different final base unit area values or is not self-occupied, the annual value of each such portion shall be computed separately, and the sum of such annual values shall be the annual value for such vacant land or covered space of building, as the case may be.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_116F\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/126268918/\">116F.</a> [] <span property tax. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 10, for section 120 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_120.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/26876099/\">(1)</a></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_120.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12170297/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The property tax on any land or building shall be primarily leviable upon the owner thereof.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_120.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/92331751/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The liability of the several owners of any land or building constituting a single unit of assessment, which is, or purports to be, severally owned in parts including flats or rooms, for payment of property tax or any instalment thereof, payable during the period of such ownership, shall be joint and several:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Commissioner may apportion the amount of property tax on such land or building among several co-owners:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that in any case where the Commissioner is, for reasons to be recorded in writing, satisfied that the owner is not traceable, the occupier of such land or building for the time being shall be liable for payment of the property tax and shall also be entitled to the rebate, if admissible.</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_120.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/100119193/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In the case of any land or building which is not self-occupied and where the owner is constrained by any law, order of the Government, or order of a court from recovering the tax due, such tax shall be recovered from the occupier or occupiers, as the case may be:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the owner shall continue to pay such amount of tax as he was liable to pay before the coming into force of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003 and only the balance, amount, if any, shall be recovered from the occupier.</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_120.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/65984943/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The property tax on any land or building, which is the property of 3[a Corporation] and the possession of which has been delivered under any agreement or licensing arrangement, shall be leviable upon the transferee or the licensee, as the case may be.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_120.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/27341410/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The property tax in respect of any land or building, being the property of the Union, the possession of which has been delivered in pursuance of section 20 of the Displaced Persons (Compensation and Rehabilitation) Act, 1954 (44 of 1954), shall be leviable upon the transferee.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_120.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/175510047/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any land has been let to a tenant for a term exceeding one year and such tenant has built upon such land, the property tax assessed in respect of such land and the building erected thereon shall be payable by such tenant, whether the land and the building are in the occupation of such tenant or a sub-tenant of such tenant.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation.-For the purposes of this section, \"tenant\" shall include any person deriving title to the land or the building erected upon such land, from the tenant, whether by operation of law or by transfer inter vivos.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_120A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/113008048/\">120A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted 1-10-1993).]</span>\u0097The term \"property taxes\" in this section shall be deemed to include the costs on recovery of property taxes and the penalty, if any, payable, as specified in the bye-laws.]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_123A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/180029088/\">123A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 13 (w.e.f.)]</span> Submission of returns.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/170846365/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall, with a view to determining the annual values of vacant land and covered space of building in any ward and the person primarily liable for the payment of property tax, by public notice, or by notice, in writing, require the owner and the occupier of such vacant land or covered space of building or any portion thereof, including such owner or the person computing the tax due under the provisions of section 123B, to furnish a return in such form as may be prescribed by bye-laws and within such time, not being less than thirty days from the date of publication of such notice, as may be specified therein, containing the following particulars, namely:</span></span><section be;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123A.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/66268099/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span href=\"/doc/105138134/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">year of completion of construction of the building, or year or years of part construction thereof, as the case may be;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123A.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/103047398/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span
