put;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123A.1.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15021305/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the area of the vacant land and the covered space of the building with break-up of the area under various uses;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123A.1.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/36926796/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">whether wholly owner-occupied or wholly tenanted, or partly owner- occupied and partly tenanted, and the areas thereof; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123A.1.h\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/82076420/\">(h)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">such other particulars as may be prescribed by bye-laws.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/138437971/\">(2)</a></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123A.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/86469051/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every owner and every occupier as aforesaid shall be bound to comply with such notice and to furnish a return with a declaration that the statement made therein is correct to the best of knowledge and belief of such owner and occupier.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123A.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/138550723/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Whoever omits to comply with such requisition, shall in addition to any penalty to which he may be liable, be precluded from objecting to any assessment made by the Commissioner in respect of such land or building.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123A.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/110193552/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner or any person subordinate to him and duly authorised by him in this behalf, in writing, or any licensed architect, may, with or without giving any previous notice to the owner or the occupier of any land or building, enter upon, and make any inspection or survey, and take measurement of such land or building with a view to verifying the statement made in the return for such land or building or for collecting the particulars, referred to in sub-section (1) in respect of such land or building:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no such entry shall be made except between the hours of sunrise and sunset.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_123B\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/193272390/\">123B.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Ins.by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 13 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Self-assessment and submission of return.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123B.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/78484815/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">After the coming into force of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003, any owner of any vacant land or covered space of building or any other person liable to pay the property tax or any occupier in the absence of such owner or person, shall file a return of self assessment within sixty days of the coming into force of the aforesaid Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123B.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45038287/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Such owner or other person or occupier, as the case may be, shall, thereafter, file the annual return only in those cases where there is a change in the position as compared to the previous return, within three months after the end of the financial year in which the change in position has occurred.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123B.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/100518912/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any owner of any covered space of building or vacant land or any other person liable to pay the property tax, or any occupier in the absence of such owner or person shall compute the tax due under section 114A or section 114C, as the case may be, and pay the same in equated quarterly instalment by the 30th day of June, 30th day of September, 31st day of December and 31st day of March of the financial year for which tax is to be paid. In the event of tax being paid in one lump sum for the financial year by the 30th day of June of the financial year, rebate of such percentage not exceeding fifteen per cent. as may be notified by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, of the total tax amount due shall be allowed.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123B.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/39463313/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any owner of any vacant land or covered space of building or any other person liable to pay the property tax or any occupier in the absence of such owner or person, who computes such property tax under this section, shall, on such computation, pay the property tax on such vacant land or covered space of building, as the case may be, together with interest, if any, payable under the provisions of this Act on-</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123B.4.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/70959361/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any new building or existing building which has not been assessed;</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">or</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123B.4.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/50175340/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any existing building which has been redeveloped or substantially altered or improved after the last assessment, but has not been subjected to revision of assessment consequent upon such redevelopment or alteration or improvement, as the case may be.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123B.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/63407643/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Such owner or person, as the case may be, shall f 'ish to the Commissioner a return of self-assessment in such form, and in such manner, as may be specified in the by-laws and every such return shall be accompanied by proof of payment of property tax and interest, if any.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123B.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/52166657/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In the case of any new building for which an occupancy certificate has been granted, or which has been occupied, after the coming into force of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003, such payment shall be made, and such return shall be furnished, within thirty days of the expiry of the quarter in which such occupancy certificate is granted or such building is occupied, whichever is earlier.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation.-For the removal of doubt, it is hereby declared that occupancy certificate may be provisional or final and may be for the whole or any part of the building and occupancy may be of the whole or any part of the building.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123B.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/5761085/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">After the determination of the annual value of vacant land or covered space of building under section 116E or section 116F or revision thereof under section 123C has been made, any amount paid on self-assessment under this section shall be deemed to have been paid on account of such determination under this Act as amended by the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123B.8\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/70861977/\">(8)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any owner or other person as aforesaid, liable to pay the property tax under this Act, fails to pay the same together with interest thereon, if any, in accordance with the provisions of this section, he shall, without prejudice to any other action to which he may be subject, be deemed to be a defaulter in respect of such property tax, or interest, or both, remaining unpaid, and all the provisions of this act applicable to such defaulter shall apply to him accordingly.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123B.9\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/64108176/\">(9)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If after the assessment of the annual value of any land or covered space of building finally made under this Act, the payment on self-assessment under this section is found to be less that than of the amount payable by the assessee, the assessee shall pay the difference within two months from the date of final assessment, failing which recovery shall be made in accordance with the provisions of this Act, but, after the final assessment, if it is found that the assessee has paid excess amount, such excess amount shall be refunded:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that in any case where the amount of tax determined in the final assessment is more than the amount of tax paid under self-assessment, and the difference in the amount of tax is, in the opinion of the Commissioner, the result of wilful suppression of facts as defined in the bye-laws, the Commissioner may levy a penalty not exceeding thirty per cent. of such difference in the tax besides the interest thereon:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that the levy of such penalty shall be in addition to any other punishment provided for under this Act:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided also that the procedure for sending of notice, hearing of objection and determination of tax and penalties shall be such as may be specified in the bye- laws.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123B.10\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/10865303/\">(10)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where no notice is sent by the Commissioner under section 123C within twelve months after the year to which such self-assessment relates, such self- assessment shall be regarded as assessment made under this Act:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that in any case, where there has been wilful suppression of facts, penalty upto thirty per cent. of the tax due may be imposed:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that the procedure for sending of notice, hearing of objection and determination of tax and penalties shall be such as may be specified in the bye-laws.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_123C\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/23593247/\">123C.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 13 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003 )]</span> Revision of assessment.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123C.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/189130411/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may cause any revision to be made at any time in the annual value of any vacant land or covered space of building or any portion thereof in the following cases, namely:</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123C.1.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15735792/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where the nature of use changes; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123C.1.ii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/156062033/\">(ii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where the nature of occupancy changes; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123C.1.iii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/41308452/\">(iii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where a new building is erected or an existing building is redeveloped or substantially altered or improved during the period the annual value remains in force; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123C.1.iv\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/32606122/\">(iv)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where, on an application made, in writing, by the owner or the person liable to pay the property tax, it is established that during the period the annual value is in force, such value has been reduced by reason of any substantial demolition or has suffered depreciation on account of any accident or any calamity proved to the satisfaction of the Commissioner to have been beyond the control of such owner or person, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123C.1.v\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/92818248/\">(v)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where any vacant land or covered space of building or portion thereof is acquired by purchase or otherwise by the '[Government] or the [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123C.1.vi\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/23881536/\">(vi)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where any vacant land or covered space of building or portion thereof is sold or otherwise transferred to the '[Government] or the Government or [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123C.1.vii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/101572813/\">(vii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where, upon the acquisition or transfer of a part of any vacant land or covered space of building, a residual portion remains, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123C.1.viii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/149651541/\">(viii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where it becomes necessary so to do for any other reason to be recorded in writing.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123C.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/10818485/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Before making any revision of the annual value under sub-section (1), the Commissioner shall give any owner, person or occupier, as a case may be, affected by such revision, notice of not less than 30 days that he proposes to make the revision and consider any objections which may be made by such owner, person or occupier.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123C.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/91198996/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-section (1), where the annual value of any vacant land or covered space of building-</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123C.3.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/18297037/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">has not, for any reason, been determined under this Act, the annual value of such vacant land or covered space of building, as the case may be, may be determined by the Commissioner at any time during the currency of the period of assessment in respect of such vacant land or covered space of building under section 116E or section 116F, as the case may be; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123C.3.ii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/59032435/\">(ii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">has been cancelled on the ground of irregularity, the annual value of such vacant land or covered space of building, as the c-1se may be, may be determined by the Commissioner at any tin after such cancellation, and such annual value of such vacant land or covered space of building, as the case may be, shall remain in force until a fresh valuation or revision is made.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123C.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/113954298/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any revision of annual value of any vacant land or covered space of building or any portion thereof under this section shall be made with reference to the group into which such vacant land or covered space of building or part thereof is classified under section 116A, and the annual value fixed per unit area or such vacant land or covered space of building for that group shall be applicable.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123C.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/22001103/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Notwithstanding anything contained in the foregoing provisions of this section, no revision of the annual value of any vacant land or covered space of building under this section shall be made without giving the owner or the occupier of such vacant land or covered space of building a reasonable opportunity of being heard.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123C.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/134986972/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where any revision of annual value of any vacant land or covered space of building is made under this section, the order of such revision shall be communicated to the owner or the occupier of such vacant land or covered space of building within ten days from the date of the order.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_123C.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/49589734/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An appeal shall lie against an order under sub-section (6) to an officer appointed by the Government, if preferred by the owner, person or the occupier of such vacant land or covered space of building within forty-five days from the date of the receipt of the order.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_123D\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/83093483/\">123D.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 13 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Power of Commissioner regarding assessment.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may, at any time</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123D.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/56868102/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">make, suo motu, an assessment in any case where a return on the basis of self-assessment has not been filed;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123D.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/157332062/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">revise any assessment where the information furnished in the return of self-assessment is found to be incorrect;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123D.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/99466157/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">reopen any assessment even after the period of one year in any case where it has been detected that there is wilful suppression of information; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_123D.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/17249663/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">impose a penalty not exceeding thirty per cent. of the difference in tax arising from non-filing of a return in time, giving wrong information or wilful suppression of facts.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_124\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/194848884/\">124.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 14, for section 124 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Municipal Assessment Book.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_124.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/189723513/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation]] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, sec.2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall maintain a Municipal Assessment Book in such form, and in such manner, as may be specified in the bye-laws and shall make it available for inspection, free of charge, through electronic media or otherwise:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Municipal Assessment Book shall not be kept pending for any case for which any objection or appeal has been filed.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_124.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/119595494/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may, at any time, amend the Municipal Assessment Book for such reasons as may be specified in the bye-laws:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no such amendment shall be made without giving any person affected a reasonable opportunity of being heard.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_125\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/185627986/\">125.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi act 6 of 2003, section 15, for section 125 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Assignment of property identification code.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_125.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/173890126/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall cause to be maintained a register wherein the property identification code numbers by which any premises or part thereof shall be known, shall be recorded in respect of each such premises in the municipal area and such numbers shall be fixed in such manner as may be specified in the bye-laws.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_125.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/139056646/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When the property identification code numbers in respect of premises in any ward of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> have been determined, the Commissioner shall notify the same in such manner as may be prescribed in the bye-laws.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_125.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/142120162/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">After the property identification code numbers in respect of premises in any ward have been notified under sub-section (2), any person required under this Act or any other law to make any application to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> for permission, licence or for payment of any tax or for payment of any dues for any service and for such other purposes as may be prescribed, shall at the time of making such application mentioned in the application, the property identification code number determined under sub-section (1).</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_126\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/34007717/\">126.</a> [ Amendment of assessment list. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Section 126 was earlier amended by Act 10 of 1989, section 2 (w.r.e.f. 1-4-1988) and by Act 32 of 1991, section (w.r.e.f. 30-3-1991)]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [Rep. by the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003 (Delhi Act 6 of 2003), section 16 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_127\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/115335832/\">127.</a> Preparation of new assessment list.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [Rep. by the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003, (Delhi Act 6 of 2003) section 17 (w.e.f: 1-8-2003).]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_128\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/10515954/\">128.</a> Notice of transfers.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_128.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/13569296/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Whenever the title of any person primarily liable for the payment of property taxes on any land or building is transferred, the person whose title is transferred and the person to whom the same is transferred shall within three months after the execution of the instrument of transfer or after registration, if it is registered, or after the transfer is effected, if no instrument is executed, give notice of such transfer in writing to the Commissioner.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_128.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/81569569/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In the event of the death of any person primarily liable as aforesaid, the person on whom the tile of the deceased devolves, shall give notice of such devolution to the Commissioner within six months from the date of the death of the deceased.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_128.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/117279881/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The notice to be given under this section shall be in such form as may be determined by bye-laws made under this Act, and the transferee or the other person on whom the title devolves shall, if so required, be bound to produce before the Commissioner any documents evidencing the transfer or devolution.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_128.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/21594409/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every person who makes a transfer as aforesaid without giving such notice to the Commissioner shall, in addition to any penalty to which he may be subjected under the provisions of this Act, continue liable for the payment of all property taxes from time to time payable in respect of the land or building transferred until he gives such notice or until the transfer has been recorded in the Commissioner's book, but nothing in this section shall be held to affect the liability of the transferee for the payment of the said tax.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_128.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/191726007/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ The Commissioner shall record every transfer or devolution of title notified to him under this section in his books and in the Municipal Assessment Book.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">provided that before recording such transfer or devolution of title, the Commissioner shall satisfy himself that any duty on transfer of property leviable under section 147 has been paid.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 18, for sub-section (5) (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_128.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/140671473/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">On a written request by the Commissioner, the registrar or sub-registrar of Delhi appointed under the Indian Registration Act, 1908 (16 of 1908), shall furnish such particulars regarding the registration of instruments of transfer of immovable properties in Delhi, as the Commissioner may from time to time, require.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_128.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/102701264/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Such information shall be furnished as soon as may be after the registration of an instrument of transfer is effected, or, if the Commissioner so requests, by periodical returns at such intervals as the commissioner may fix.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_129\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/135922973/\">129.</a> Notice of erection of building, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- When any new building is erected or when any building is rebuild or enlarged or when any building which has been vacant is reoccupied, the person primarily liable for the property taxes assessed on the building shall give notice thereof in writing to the Commissioner within fifteen days from the date of its completion or occupation whichever first occurs, or as the case may be, from the date of its enlargement or re-occupation; and property taxes shall be assessable on the building from the said date.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_130\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/153864774/\">130.</a> Notice of demolition or removal of buildings.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_130.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/171166481/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When any building or any portion of a building, which is liable to the payment of property taxes is demolished or removed, otherwise than by order of the Commissioner, the person primarily liable for the payment of the said taxes shall give notice thereof in writing to the Commissioner.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_130.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/135629298/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Until such notice is given, the person aforesaid shall continue liable to the payment of such property taxes as he would have been liable to pay in respect of such building if the same or any portion thereof had not been demolished or removed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_131\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/79305223/\">131.</a> Power of Commissioner to call for information and returns and to enter and inspect premises.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_131.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/164100116/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">To enable him to determine the rateable value of any land or building and the person primarily liable for the payment of any property taxes leviable in respect thereof, the Commissioner may require the owner or occupier of such land or building, or of any portion thereof to furnish him within such reasonable period as the Commissioner fixes in this behalf, with information or with a written return signed by such owner or occupier\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_131.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/199352610/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">as to the name and place of residence of the owner or occupier, or of both the owner and occupier of such land or buildings;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_131.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/29371917/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">as to the measurements or dimensions of such land or building or of any portion thereof and the rent, if any, obtained for such land or building or any portion thereof; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_131.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/32804438/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">as to the actual cost or other specified details connected with the determination of the value of such land or building.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_131.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/30497860/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every owner or occupier on whom any such requisition is made shall be bound to comply with the same and to give true information or to make a true return to the best of his knowledge or belief.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_131.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/33416819/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Whoever omits to comply with any such requisition or fails to give true information or to make a true return to the best of his knowledge or belief, shall, in addition to any penalty to which he may be liable, be precluded from objecting to any assessment made by the Commissioner in respect of such land or building of which he is the owner or occupier.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_132\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/26937608/\">132.</a> Premises owned by, or let to, two or more persons in severalty to be ordinarily assessed as one property.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Notwithstanding that any land or building is owned by, or let to, two or more persons in severalty, the Commissioner shall for the purpose of assessing such land or building to property taxes treat the whole of it as one property:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Commissioner may, in respect of any land or building which was originally treated as one property but which subsequently passes on by transfer, succession or in any other manner to two or more persons who divide the same into several parts and occupy them in severalty, treat, subject to any bye-law made in this behalf, each such several part, or two or more of such several parts together, as a separate property and assess such part or parts to property taxes accordingly.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_133\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/73628386/\">133.</a> Assessment in case of amalgamation of premises.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If any land or building, bearing two or more municipal numbers, or portions thereof, be amalgamated into one or more new premises, the Commissioner shall on such amalgamation assign to them one or more numbers and assess them to property taxes accordingly:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the total assessment on amalgamation shall not be greater than the sum of the previous assessments of the several premises except when there is any re-valuation of any of the said premises.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_134\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/103909106/\">134.</a> Power of Commissioner to assess separately outhouses and portions of buildings.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may in his discretion assess any outhouse appurtenant to a building, or any portion of a land or building separately from such building or as the case may be, from the rest of such land or building.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_135\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/126622121/\">135.</a> Power of Commissioner to employ valuers.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_135.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/171516574/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may, if he thinks fit, employ one or more competent persons to give advice or assistance in connection with the valuation of any land or building, and any person so employed shall have power, at all reasonable times and after giving due notice, and on production, if so required, of authorisation in writing in that behalf from the Commissioner, to enter on, survey and value any land or building which the Commissioner may direct him to survey and value.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_135.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/151977628/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall wilfully delay or obstruct any such person in the exercise of any of his powers under this section.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Tax on vehicles and animals</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_136\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/119027875/\">136.</a> Tax on certain vehicles and animals and rates thereof.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Save as otherwise provided in this Act, a tax at the rates not exceeding those specified in the Third Schedule shall be levied on vehicles and animals of the descriptions specified in that Schedule which are kept within Delhi.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_137\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/191469867/\">137.</a> The tax on whom leviable.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The tax on vehicles or animals shall be leviable upon the owner of, or the person having possession or control of, such vehicles or animals in respect of which the tax is leviable:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that in the case of an animal generally used or employed in drawing any vehicle, the tax in respect of such animal shall be leviable upon the owner of, or the person having possession or control of, such vehicle, whether or not such animal is owned by such owner or person :</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that the tax under this section shall not be levied in respect of\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_137.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/186182607/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">vehicles and animals belonging to the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span> or to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> used or intended to be used solely for public purposes;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_137.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/111678459/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">vehicles intended exclusively for the conveyance free of charge, of the injured, the sick or the dead;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_137.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/120202903/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">children's perambulators or tricycles;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_137.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/154304055/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ a cow or a she-buffalo kept for milking for domestic use if the cow or the she-buffalo is the only cow or she-buffalo kept by the owner or the person having possession or control thereof for such milking and is registered in accordance with bye-laws made in this behalf, so, however, that\u0097 <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1961, section 14 (w.e.f. 12-9-1961)]</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where more cows or, as the case may be, more she-buffaloes than one are kept by several such owners or persons constituting a family, the tax under this section shall be levied in respect of all such cows or all such she-buffaloes;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where a cow and also a she-buffalo are kept by the owner or the person having the possession or control thereof or by several such owners or persons constituting a family, the tax under this section shall be levied in respect of the cow and the she-buffalo.]</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_138\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/180429933/\">138.</a> Tax when payable.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The tax on vehicles or animals shall be payable in advance in such number of instalments and in such manner as may be determined by bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_139\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/91616057/\">139.</a> Power of Commissioner to compound with livery stable keeper, etc., for tax.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may, with the approval of the Standing Committee, compound for any period not exceeding one year at a time, with any livery stable keeper or other person keeping vehicles for hire or animals for sale or hire, for a lump sum to be paid in respect of the vehicles or animals so kept in lieu of the taxes leviable under section 136 which such livery stable keeper or other person would otherwise be liable to pay.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_140\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/32609575/\">140.</a> Theatre-tax.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Save as otherwise provided in this Act, there shall be levied a tax (referred to in this Act as theatre-tax) in respect of every cinema, theatre, circus, carnival and other place of entertainment to which persons are ordinarily admitted on payment for performances or shows held or conducted thereat, at such rates not exceeding those specified in the Fourth Schedule as Corporation may determine:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the theatre-tax shall not be levied in respect of any performance or show if the Commissioner is satisfied\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_140.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/73423834/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the entire receipts from such performance or show will be devoted to philanthropic, religious or charitable purposes; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_140.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/64965755/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the performance or show is of a wholly educational character; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_140.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/159930066/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the performance or show is provided for partly educational or partly scientific purposes by a society not conducted or established for profit.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_141\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/175575078/\">141.</a> Liability to pay theatre-tax.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Every proprietor, manager, or person in-charge of a theatre, cinema, circus, carnival or other place of entertainment shall be liable to pay the theatre-tax and shall pay the same in advance before the commencement of the performances or shows:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Commissioner may, with the approval of the Standing Committee, compound for any series of performances or shows or for any period not exceeding one month, with such proprietor, manager or person for a lump sum to be paid for such series of performances or shows or for the performances or shows held or conducted during such period.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Tax on advertisements other than advertisements published in the newspapers</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_142\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/117102627/\">142.</a> Tax on advertisements.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_142.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/102215446/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every person, who erects, exhibits, fixes or retains upon or over any land, building, wall, hoarding, frame, post or structure or upon or in any vehicle any advertisement or, who displays any advertisement to public view in any manner whatsoever, visible from a public street or public place (including any advertisement exhibited by means of cinema to graphs), shall pay for every advertisement which is so erected, exhibited, fixed or retained or so displayed to public view, a tax calculated at such rates not exceeding those specified in the Fifth Schedule as the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may determine:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no tax shall be levied under this section on any advertisement which\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_142.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/155146086/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">relates to a public meeting, or to an election to Parliament or the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or to candidature in respect of such election; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_142.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/27035240/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">is exhibited within the window of any building if the advertisement relates to the trade, profession or business carried on in that building; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_142.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/137006628/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">relates to the trade, profession or business carried on within the land or building upon or over which such advertisement is exhibited or to any sale or letting of such land or building or any effects therein or to any sale, entertainment or meeting to be held on or upon or in the same; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_142.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/198990246/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">relates to the name of the land or building upon or over which the advertisement is exhibited, or to the name of the owner or occupier of such land or building; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_142.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/25492802/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">relates to the business of a railway administration and is exhibited within any railway station or upon any wall or other property of a railway administration; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_142.1.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/141613445/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">relates to any activity of the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or the [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, sec.2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_142.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/135637567/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The tax on any advertisement leviable under this section shall be payable in advance in such number of instalments and in such manner as may be determined by bye-laws made in this behalf.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation 1.\u0097The word \"structure\" in this section includes any movable board on wheels used as an advertisement or an advertisement medium.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation 2.\u0097The word \"advertisement\" in relation to a tax on advertisement under this Act means any word, letter, model, sign, placard, notice, device or representation, whether illuminated or not, in the nature of and employed wholly or in part for the purposes of advertisement, announcement or direction.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_143\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/78983726/\">143.</a> Prohibition of advertisements without written permission of the Commissioner.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_143.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/151370322/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No advertisement shall be erected, exhibited, fixed or retained upon or over any land, building, wall, hoarding, frame, post or structure or upon or in any vehicle or shall be displayed in any manner whatsoever in any place within Delhi without the written permission of the Commissioner granted in accordance with bye-laws made under this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_143.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/83024665/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall not grant such permission if\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_143.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/186528785/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the advertisement contravenes any bye-law made under this Act; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_143.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/127539947/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the tax, if any, due in respect of the advertisement has not been paid.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_143.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/4174313/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Subject to the provisions of sub-section (2), in the case of an advertisement liable to the advertisement tax, the Commissioner shall grant permission for the period to which the payment of the tax relates and no fee shall be charged in respect of such permission.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_144\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/63103350/\">144.</a> Permission of the Commissioner to become void in certain cases.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The permission granted under section 143 shall become void in the following cases, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_144.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/101374033/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if the advertisement contravenes any bye-law made under this Act;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_144.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/134695773/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if any material change is made in the advertisement or any part thereof without the previous permission of the Commissioner;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_144.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/121955746/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if the advertisement or any part thereof falls otherwise than through accident;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_144.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/32741535/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if any addition or alteration is made to, or in the building, wall, hoarding, frame, post or structure upon or over which the advertisement is erected, exhibited, fixed or retained if such addition or alteration involves the disturbance of the advertisement or any part thereof; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_144.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/28872337/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if the building, wall, hoarding, frame, post or structure over which the advertisement is erected, exhibited, fixed or retained is demolished or destroyed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_145\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/131714504/\">145.</a> Presumption in case of contravention.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Where any advertisement has been erected, exhibited, fixed or retained upon or over any land, building, wall, hoarding, frame, post or structure or upon or in any vehicle or displayed to public view from a public street or public place in contravention of the provisions of this Act or any bye-laws made thereunder, it shall be presumed, unless and until contrary is proved, that the contravention has been committed by the person or the persons on whose behalf the advertisement purports to be or the agents of such person or persons.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_146\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/79531463/\">146.</a> Power of Commissioner in case of contravention.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If any advertisement is erected, exhibited, fixed or retained in contravention of the provisions of section 143, the Commissioner may require the owner or occupier of the land, building, wall, hoarding, frame, post or structure or vehicle upon, or over or in which the same is erected, exhibited, fixed or retained, to take down or remove such advertisement or may enter any land, building, property or vehicle and have the advertisement dismantled, taken down or removed or spoiled, defaced or screened.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Duty on transfer of property</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_147\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/194544582/\">147.</a> Duty on transfer of property and method of assessment thereto.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_147.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/173152373/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Save as otherwise provided in this Act, the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall levy a duty on transfers of immovable property situated within the limits of [the area of the Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(c), for \"Delhi\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> in accordance with the provisions hereafter in this section contained.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_147.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/19456678/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The said duty shall be levied\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_147.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/154162252/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">in the form of a surcharge on the duty imposed by the Indian Stamp Act, 1899 (2 of 1899) as in force for the time being in the Union territory of Delhi, on every instrument of the description specified below, and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_147.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/145197267/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">at such rate as may be determined by the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> not exceeding five per cent., on the amount specified below against such instruments:\u0097</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><div class=\"akn--table-container\"><table class=\"akn-table\" data-eid=\"chp_VIII__sec_147__subsec_2__wrapup__table_1\" id=\"chp_VIII__sec_147__subsec_2__wrapup__table_1\">\n<tbody><tr levied</span></td>\n</tr>\n<tr class=\"akn-tr\">\n<td class=\"akn-td\"><span class=\"akn-p\">(i) Sale of immovable property</span></td>\n<td class=\"akn-td\">\n<span class=\"akn-p\">The amount or
