conract.</span>\n</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody></table></div></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_148\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/15781512/\">148.</a> Provisions applicable on the introduction of transfer duty.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- On the introduction of the duty on transfers of property\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_148.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/184071543/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">section 27 of the Indian Stamp Act, 1899 (2 of 1899), as in force in Delhi shall be read as if it specifically required the particulars to be set forth separately in respect of property situated within and without Delhi;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_148.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/36526576/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">section 64 of the said Act shall be read as if it referred to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> as well as the Government.</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Tax on buildings payable along with the application for sanction of building plans <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 7 of 2004, section 4(i), for \"sub-heading Tax on buildings payable along with the application for sanction of building plans\" (w.e.f. 17-12-2004)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_149\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/48335237/\">149.</a> Tax on building applications.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [(1) Save as otherwise provided in this Act, the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 7 of 2004, section 4(ii), for sub-section (i) (w.e.f. 17-12-2004)]</span> shall levy a tax on building applications at the rate of five rupees per square metre of the total covered area proposed to be built on a plot measuring up to fifty square metres and ten rupees per square mete of the total covered area proposed to be built on a plot exceeding fifty square metres in area]</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_149.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/3750496/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The tax shall be leviable on every person who makes an application to the Commissioner for the sanction of building plan and shall be payable along with the same.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Other Taxes</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_150\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/20462402/\">150.</a> Imposition of other taxes.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_150.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/119061656/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, sec.2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, at a meeting, pass a resolution for the levy of any of the taxes specified in sub-section (2) of section 113, defining the maximum rate of the tax to be levied, the class or classes of persons or the description or descriptions of articles and properties to be taxed, the system of assessment to be adopted and the exemptions, if any, to be granted.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_150.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/58013390/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any resolution passed under sub-section (1) shall be submitted to the [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted byu Act 67 of 1993, section 86 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government for its sanction, and if sanctioned by that Government, shall come into force on and from such date as may be specified in the order of sanction.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_150.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45994797/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">After a resolution has come into force under sub-section (2), [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, subject to the maximum rate, pass a second resolution determining the actual rates at which the tax shall be leviable; and the tax shall come into force on the first day of the quarter of the year next following the date on which such second resolution is passed.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_150.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/144862129/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">After a tax has been levied in accordance with forgoing provisions of this section, the provisions of sub-section (2) of section 109, shall apply in relation to such tax as they apply in relation to any tax imposed under sub-section (1) of section 113.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_151\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/194769209/\">151.</a> Supplementary taxation.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whenever [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, sec.2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> decides to have recourse to supplementary taxation under sub-section (2) of section 111 in any year, it shall do so by increasing from such date as [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, sec.2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may determine, the rates at which any tax leviable under this Act is being levied, but every such increase shall be made subject to the maximum rate and any other limitation specified in respect of such tax.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Payment and recovery of taxes</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_152\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/12664358/\">152.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 24, for section 152 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).]</span> Time and manner of payment of taxes.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Save as otherwise provided in this Act, any tax levied under this Act shall be payable on such dates, in such number of instalments and in such manner as may be determined by bye-laws made in this behalf.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that if, on the coming into force of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003, there is any increase in the amount of property tax which was being paid or was payable immediately before the coming into force of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act. 2003, the difference in the amount of property tax in excess of fifty per cent. above the tax being paid or being payable, shall be given effect to by stages covering a period of three years by dividing the amount of such increase in the property tax by three, the quotient being added to the amount of property tax which was payable immediately before the coming into force of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003, and to the amount of property tax which shall be payable respectively in each of the remaining two successive years after such addition.</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_152.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/163864287/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where any person liable for the payment of property tax under this Act has failed to pay</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_152.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/65318260/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">such tax by the date as specified in sub-section (3) of section 123B; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_152.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/6776586/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the arrear of tax, interest and penalty, if any, and any other sum in the nature of tax up to the 31st March of the preceding financial year;</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">he shall be liable to pay simple interest at the rate of one per cent. for every month or part of the month comprising the period from the expiry of the due date, till the amount is actually paid.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">&gt;[152A.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 24, for section 152, (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Punishment for wilful default in payment of property tax, furnishing wrong information in return of assessment, etc.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whoever wilfully makes default, in the payment of, or wilfully attempts in any manner whatsoever to evade, any tax, including amount of interest due and penalty levied under this Act, or furnishes any wrong information in the return of assessment, or wilfully fails to furnish in due time the return of property tax, or does not furnish information as asked for under any provision of this Act, he shall, without prejudice to any other penal provision under this' Act to which he may be subject, be punishable,</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(a)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">in the case where the amount of tax sought to be evaded exceeds ten lakh rupees with rigorous imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than three months but which may extend up to seven years, and with fine of not less than fifty per cent. of the amount of tax evaded; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(b)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">in any other case, with rigorous imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than one month but which may extend up to three years, and with fine of not less than fifty per cent. of the amount of tax evaded:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the penalties so imposed shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of, any liability in respect of the payment of tax which the defaulter may have incurred.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_153\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/105391507/\">153.</a> Presentation of bill.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_153.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/188328179/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When any tax has become due, the Commissioner shall cause to be presented to the person liable for the payment thereof, a bill for the amount due:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no such bill shall be necessary in the case of\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_153.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/21071605/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ property tax payable on self-assessment of vacant land or covered space in any building;] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 25 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span></span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[(aa)] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Clause (a) renumbered as clause (aa) by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 25 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> a tax on vehicles and animals;</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_153.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/196864043/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">a theatre-tax; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_153.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/102581826/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">a tax on advertisements.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_153.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/40811320/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every such bill shall specify the particulars of the tax and the period for which the charge is made.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_154\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/130678018/\">154.</a> Notice of demand and notice fee.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_154.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/10077872/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the amount of the tax for which a bill has been presented under section 153, is not paid within fifteen days from the presentation thereof, or if the tax on vehicles and animals or the theatre-tax or the tax on advertisements is not paid after it has become due, the Commissioner may cause to be served upon the person liable for the payment of the same a notice of demand in the form set forth in the Seventh Schedule.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_154.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/55018176/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">For every notice of demand which the Commissioner causes to be served on any person under this section, a fee of such amount not exceeding five rupees as may be determined by bye-laws made in this behalf, shall be payable by the said person and shall be included in the cost of recovery.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_155\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/198364029/\">155.</a> Penalty in case of default of payment of taxes.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_155.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/29193404/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the person liable for the payment of any tax does not, within thirty days of the service of the notice of demand under section 154, pay the sum due and if no appeal is preferred against such tax, he shall be deemed to be in default.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_155.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/165038411/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When the person liable for the payment of any tax is deemed to be in default under sub-section (1), such sum not exceeding twenty per cent. of the amount of the tax as may be determined by the Commissioner may be recovered from him by way of penalty, in addition to the amount of the tax and the notice fee, payable under sub-section (2) of section 154.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_155.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/146600521/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The amount due as penalty under sub-section (2) shall be recoverable as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_156\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/35361154/\">156.</a> Recovery of tax.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_156.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/93790487/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the person liable for the payment of the tax does not, within thirty days from the service of the notice of demand, pay the amount due, such sum together with all costs and the penalty provided for in section 155, may be recovered under a warrant, issued in the form set forth in the Eighth Schedule, by distress and sale of the movable property or the attachment and sale of the immovable property, of the defaulter:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Commissioner shall not recover any sum the liability for which has been remitted on appeal under the provisions of this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_156.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/18305008/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every warrant issued under this section shall be signed by the Commissioner.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_156A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/76581284/\">156A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 26 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> Recovery of property tax.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If, after the coming into force of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003, any owner of any vacant land or covered space of building or any other perosn liable to pay the property tax or any occupier, in the absence of any such owner or perosn, does not file a return of self assessment within sixty days of the coming into force of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003, or if the person liable for the payment of property tax does not pay the amount due within the due date, such sum together with all costs and penalty may be recovered under a warrant, issued in the form set forth in the Eighth Schedule, by distress and sale of hte movable property, or the attachment and sale of the immovable property, of the defaulter:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Commissioner shall not recover any sum the liability for which has been remitted on appeal under the provisions of this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_157\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/48003765/\">157.</a> Distress.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_157.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/173599137/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">It shall be lawful for any officer or other employees of the Corporation to whom a warrant issued under section 156 is addressed to distrain, wherever it may be found in any place in Delhi, any movable property or any standing timber, growing crops or grass belonging to the person therein named as defaulter, subject to the following conditions, exceptions and exemptions, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_157.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/33053463/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the following property shall not be distrained:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the necessary wearing apparel and bedding of the defaulter, his wife and children and their cooking and eating utensils;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">tools of artisans;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">books of account; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iv)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">when the defaulter is an agriculturist his implements of husbandry, seed, grain and such cattle as may be necessary to enable the defaulter to earn his livelihood;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_157.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/124297281/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the distress shall not be excessive, that is to say, the property distrained shall be as nearly as possible equal in value to the amount recoverable under the warrant, and if any property has been distrained which, in the opinion of the Commissioner, should not have been distrained, it shall forthwith be released.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_157.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12750502/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The person charged with execution of a warrant of distress shall forthwith make an inventory of the property which he seizes under such warrant, and shall, at the same time, give a written notice in the form set forth in the Ninth Schedule, to the person in possession thereof at the time of seizure that the said property will be sold as therein mentioned.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_158\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/117735258/\">158.</a> Disposal of distrained property and attachment and sale of immovable property.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_158.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/42282657/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When the property seized is subject to speedy and natural decay or when the expense of keeping it in custody is, when added to the amount to the recovered, likely to exceed its value, the Commissioner shall give notice to the person in whose possession the property was at the time of seizure that it will be sold at once, and shall sell it accordingly by public auction unless the amount mentioned in the warrant is forthwith paid.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_158.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/91907368/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the warrant is not in the meantime suspended by the Commissioner, or discharged, the property seized shall, after the expiry of the period named in the notice served under sub-section (2) of section 157, be sold by public auction by order of the Commissioner.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_158.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/192710541/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When a warrant is issued for the attachment and sale of immovable property, the attachment shall be made by an order prohibiting the defaulter from transferring or charging the property in any way, and all persons from taking any benefit from such transfer or charge, and declaring that such property would be sold unless the amount of tax due with all costs of recovery is paid into the municipal office within fifteen days from the date of the attachment.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_158.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98858214/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Such order shall be proclaimed at some place on or adjacent to such property by beat of drum or other customary mode and a copy of the order shall be affixed on a conspicuous part of the property and upon a conspicuous part of the municipal office and also, when the property is land paying revenue to the Government, in the office of the collector.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_158.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/191378815/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any transfer of or charge on the property attached or any interest therein made without written permission of the Commissioner shall be void as against all claims of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> enforceable under the attachment.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_158.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/18424708/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The surplus of the sale-proceeds, if any shall, immediately after the sale of the property, be credited to the Municipal Fund, and notice of such credit shall be given at the same time to the person whose property has been sold or his legal representative and if the same is claimed by written application to the Commissioner within one year from the date of the notice, a refund thereof shall be made to such person or representative.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_158.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/126373967/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any surplus not claimed within one year as aforesaid shall be the property of the [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_158.8\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45906368/\">(8)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">For every distraint and attachment made in accordance with the foregoing provisions, a fee of such amount not exceeding two and-a-half per cent. of the amount of the tax due as shall in each case be fixed by the Commissioner, shall be charged, and the said fee shall be included in the costs of recovery.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_159\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/138211161/\">159.</a> Recovery from a person about to leave Delhi.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_159.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/6528256/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the Commissioner has reason to believe that any person from whom any sum is due or is about to become due on account of any tax is about to move from Delhi, he may direct the immediate payment by such person of the sum so due or about to become due and cause a notice of demand for the same to be served on such person.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_159.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/173671413/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If, on the service of such notice, such person does not forthwith pay the sum so due or about to become due, the amount shall be leviable by distress or attachment and sale in the manner hereinbefore provided, and the warrant of distress or attachment and sale may be issued and executed without any delay.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_160\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/165771806/\">160.</a> Power to institute suit for recovery.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Instead of proceeding against a defaulter by distress and sale as hereinbefore provided, or after a defaulter has been so proceeded against unsuccessfully or with partial success, any sum due or the balance of any sum due, as the case may be, from such defaulter on account of a tax may be recovered from him by a suit in any court of competent jurisdiction.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_161\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/21549466/\">161.</a> Power of seizure of vehicles and animals in case of non-payment of tax thereon.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_161.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/177090345/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the tax on any vehicle or animal is not paid, then, instead of proceeding against the defaulter by distress and sale of his other movable property as hereinbefore provided, the Commissioner may, at any time after the tax has become due, seize and detain the vehicle or animal or both and, if the owner or other person entitled thereto does not within seven days in respect of a vehicle and two days in respect of an animal from the date of such seizure and detention, claim the same and pay the tax due together with the charges incurred in connection with the seizure and detention, the Commissioner may cause the same to be sold and apply the proceeds of the sale or such part thereof as is required in discharge of the sum due and the charges incurred as aforesaid.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_161.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/48170383/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The surplus, if any, remaining after the application of the sale-proceeds under sub-section (1), shall be disposed of in the manner laid down in sub-sections (6) and (7) of section 158.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\"><h3>162. Occupiers may be required to pay rent towards satisfaction of property taxes.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(1)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">For the purposes of recovering the amount of any property tax from any occupier under section 122, the Commissioner shall cause to be served on such occupier a notice requiring him to pay to the Corporation any rent due or falling due from him in respect of the land or building to the extent necessary to satisfy the portion of the sum due for which he is liable under the said section.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(2)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Such notice shall operate as an attachment of the said rent unless the position of the sum due shall have been paid and satisfied and the occupier shall be entitled to credit in account with the person to whom such rent is due for any sum paid by him to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> in pursuance of such notice:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that if the person to whom such rent is due is not the person primarily liable for payment of the property tax, he shall be entitled to recover from the person primarily liable for the payment of such tax any amount for which credit is claimed as aforesaid.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(3)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any occupier fails to pay to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> any rent due or falling due which he has been required to pay in pursuance of a notice served upon him as aforesaid, the amount of such rent may be recovered from him by the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Remission and refund</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_163\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/128597763/\">163.</a> Demolition, etc., of buildings.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If any building is wholly or partly demolished or destroyed or otherwise deprived of value, the Commissioner may, on the application in writing of the owner or occupier, remit or refund such portion of any tax assessed on the reteable value thereof as he thinks fit.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_164\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/45654469/\">164.</a> Remission, or refund of tax.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span occupation of vacant land or building.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [Rep. by the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2003 (Delhi Act 6 of 2003), section 31]</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Appeals</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_169\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/91334632/\">169.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 32, for section 169 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).]</span> Appeal against assessment, etc.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_169.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/91647444/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An appeal against the levy or assessment of any tax under this Act shall lie to the Municipal Taxation Tribunal constituted under this section:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the full amount of the property tax shall be paid before filing any appeal:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that the Municipal Taxation Tribunal may, with the approval of the District Judge of Delhi, also take up any case for which any appeal may be pending before the court of such District Judge:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided also that any appeal pending before the court of such District Judge shall be transferred to the Municipal Taxation Tribunal for disposal, if requested by the applicant for the settlement thereof on the basis of annual value..</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_169.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/121604900/\">(2)</a></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_169.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/173643969/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Government shall constitute a Municipal Taxation Tribunal consisting of a Chairperson and such other members as the Government may determine:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that on the recommendation of the Government, the Chairperson may constitute one or more separate Benches, each Bench comprising two members, one of whom shall be a member of the Higher Judicial Service of a State or a Union territory and the other member from the higher administrative service, and may transfer to any such Bench any appeal for disposal or may withdraw from any Bench any appeal before it is finally disposed of.</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_169.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/104781879/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Chairperson, and not less than half of the other members, of the Municipal Taxation Tribunal shall be persons who are or have been the members of the Higher Judicial Service of a State or a Union territory for a period of not less than five years, and the remaining members, if any, shall have such qualifications and experience as the Government may by rules determine.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_169.2.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/51592836/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Chairperson and the other members of the Municipal Taxation Tribunal shall be appointed by the Government for a period of five years or till they attain the age of sixty-five years, whichever is earlier.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_169.2.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/86915393/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The other terms and conditions of service of the Chairperson and the other members of the Municipal Taxation Tribunal, including salaries and allowances, shall be such as may be determined by rules by the Government.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_169.2.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/88680232/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The salaries and allowances of the Chairperson and the other members of the Municipal Taxation Tribunal shall be paid from the Municipal Fund.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_169.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/152859807/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In every appeal, the costs shall be in the discretion of the Municipal Taxation Tribunal or the Bench thereof, if any.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_169.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/181376448/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Costs awarded under this section to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be recoverable by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> as an arrear of tax due from the appellant.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_169.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/34383556/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">' If [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> fails to pay any costs awarded to an appellant within ten days from the date of the order for payment thereof, the Municipal Taxation Tribunal may order the Commissioner to pay the costs to the appellant.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_170\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/3397937/\">170.</a> Conditions of right to appeal.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No appeal shall be heard or determined under section 169 unless\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_170.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/33373071/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the appeal is, in the case of a property tax, brought within thirty days next after the date of authentication of the assessment list under section 124 (exclusive of the time requisite for obtaining a copy of the relevant entries therein) or, as the case may be, within thirty days of the date on which an amendment is finally made under section 126, and, in the case of any other tax, within thirty days next after the date of the receipt of the notice of assessment or of alteration of assessment or, if no notice has been given, within thirty days after the date of the presentation of the first bill or, as the case may be, the first notice of demand in respect thereof:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that an appeal may be admitted after the expiration of the period prescribed therefor by this section if the appellant satisfies the [Municipal Taxation Tribunal] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 33, for \"Court\" (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> that he had sufficient cause for not preferring the appeal within that period;</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_170.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/29668306/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the amount, if any, in dispute in the appeal has been deposited by the appellant in the office of the [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_171\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/47340030/\">171.</a> Finality of appellate orders.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The order of the [Municipal Taxation Tribunal] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 34, for \"Court\" (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span> confirming, setting aside or modifying an order in respect of any rateable value or assessment or liability to assessment or taxation shall be final:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that it shall be lawful for the [Municipal Taxation Tribunal] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 34, for \"Court\" (w.e.f. 1-8-2003)]</span>, upon application or on its own motion, to review any order passed by it in appeal within three months from the date of the order.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Miscellaneous provisions relating to taxation</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_172\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/24268633/\">172.</a> Power to inspect for purposes of determining [annual value] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 2, for \"reteable value\"]</span> or tax.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_172.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/132976650/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may, without giving any previous notice, enter upon and make an inspection of\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_172.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/30234516/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any land or building for the purpose of determining the annual value] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, section 2, for \"reteable value\"]</span> of such land or building;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_172.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/187466653/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any stable, garage, or coach house or any place wherein he may have reason to believe that three is any vehicle or animal liable to a tax under this Act;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_172.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/81554101/\">(c)</a></span><span displayed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_172.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/99578162/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may, by written summons, require the attendance before him of any person whom he has reason to believe to be liable to the payment of a tax in respect of a vehicle or animal, or of any servant of any such person and may examine such person or servant as to the number and description of vehicles and animals owned by or in the possession or under the control of such person; and every person or servant of such person so summoned shall be bound to attend before the Commissioner and to give information to the best of his knowledge and belief as to the said matters.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_172A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/105440098/\">172A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted
