id=\"section_173.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/60954779/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may, with the previous sanction of the Standing Committee, allow any person to compound for any tax.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_173.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/145620245/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every sum due by reason of the composition of a tax under sub-section (1) shall be recovered as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_174\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/163809321/\">174.</a> Irrecoverable debts.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_174.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/170962889/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may write off any sum due on account of any tax or of the costs of recovering any tax if such sum is, in his opinion irrecoverable:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that, where the sum written off in favour of any one person exceeds one hundred rupees, the previous sanction of the Standing Committee shall be first obtained.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_174.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/147250402/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall report to the Standing Committee every case in which any sum has been written off under sub-section (1).</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_175\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/108581905/\">175.</a> Obligation to disclose liability.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_175.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/63928842/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may, by written notice, call upon any inhabitant of Delhi to furnish such information as may be necessary for the purpose of ascertaining\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_175.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/116551233/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">whether such inhabitant is liable to pay any tax imposed by the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> under this Act;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_175.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/101110542/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">at what amount he should be assessed; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_175.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/155367200/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the rateable value of the land or building which he occupies and the name and address of the owner or lessee thereof.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_175.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/104569026/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any person when called upon under sub-section (1) to furnish information neglects to furnish it within the period specified in this behalf by the Commissioner or furnishes information which is not true to the best of his knowledge or belief, he shall be liable, in addition to any penalty which may be imposed under this Act, to be assessed at such amount on account of tax as the Commissioner may deem proper, and the assessment so made shall, subject to the provisions of this Act, be final.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_176\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/15368807/\">176.</a> Immaterial error not to affect liability.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No assessment and no charge or demand on account of any tax shall be impeached or affected by reason only of any mistake in the name, residence, place of business or occupation of any person liable to pay the tax or in the description of any property or thing, or of any mistake in the amount of the assessment, charge or demand, or by reason only of clerical error or other defect of form, if the directions contained in this Act and the bye-laws made thereunder have in substance and effect been complied with; and it shall be enough in the case of any such tax on property or any assessment of value for the purpose of any such tax, if the property taxed or assessed is so described as to be generally known; and it shall not be necessary to name the owner or occupier thereof.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_177\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/173936360/\">177.</a> General power of exemption.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, by resolution passed in this behalf, exempt either wholly or in part from the payment of any tax levied under this Act, any class of persons or any class of property or goods.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The heading Terminal taxes on goods and sections 178 to 183  omitted by Ordinance No. 21 of 1993 (w.e.f. 31-1-1993)]</span>Terminal taxes on goods</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The heading Terminal taxes on goods and sections 178 to 183 omitted by Ordinance No. 21 of 1993 (w.e.f. 31-1-1993)]</span>178. Terminal tax on goods carried by railway or road.</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_177.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/176503685/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">On and from the date of the establishment of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> under section 3, there shall be levied on all goods carried by railway or road into the Union territory of Delhi from any place outside thereof, a terminal tax at the rates specified in the Tenth Schedule.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_177.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/25890163/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, by notification in the Official Gazette, vary from time to time, the rates specified in that Schedule, in relation to any goods or classes of goods so, however, that where the rates are increased, the increased rate shall not be more than treble the rates so specified.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_177.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/9207629/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The  [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may by like notification declare that with effect from such date as may be specified in the notification, the terminal tax levied in relation to any goods or class of goods shall, for reasons specified in the notification, cease to be levied.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The heading \"Terminal taxes on goods and sections 178 to 183\" omitted by Ordinance No. 21 of 1993 (w.e.f. 31-1-1993)]</span>179. Recovery of terminal taxes.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(1)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The terminal tax levied under this Act shall be payable on demand and shall be collected by the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> in such manner and through such agency as may be specified by notification in the Official Gazette.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(2)</span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Such portion of the total proceeds of the terminal tax as the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may determine shall be deducted to meet the cost of collection of the tax.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The heading \"Terminal taxes on goods and sections 178 to 183\" omitted by Ordinance No. 21 of 1993 (w.e.f. 31-1-1993)]</span>180. Payment by the Central Government to the Corporation and other local authorities.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">- The proceeds of the terminal tax collected under this Act (which shall form part of the Consolidated Fund of India) reduced by the cost of collection as determined under sub-section (2) of section 179 shall, if Parliament by appropriation made by law in this behalf so provides, be paid by the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and to other local authorities within the Union territory of Delhi in such proportion as may from time to time be determined by the Central [Government.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The heading Terminal taxes on goods and sections 178 to 183 omitted by Ordinance No. 21 of 1993 (w.e.f. 31-1-1993)]</span>181. Power of exemption.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, by notification in the Official Gazette, exempt either wholly or in part from the payment of terminal tax imposed by this Act any class of goods.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The heading \"Terminal taxes on goods\" and sections 178 to 183 omitted by Ordinance No. 21 of 1993 (w.e.f. 31-1-1993)]</span>182. Powers and liabilities of persons authorised to collect terminal taxes.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">- Every person authorised under the provisions of this Act and the rules made thereunder to collect the terminal tax shall have, in respect of the collection of such tax and of the confiscation of goods in connection therewith, same powers as are conferred by any law for the time being in force on the Collector of Land Customs Delhi and the officers subordinate to him in respect of the levy and collection of land customs duties and the confiscation of goods in connection therewith and shall also be subject to the same liabilities in respect of anything done by him in or for the purpose of collecting the terminal tax as the said Collector of Land Customs and the officers subordinate to him are subject to under any law for the time being in force relating to land customs duties.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The heading \"Terminal taxes on goods and sections 178 to 183\" omitted by Ordinance No. 21 of 1993 (w.e.f. 31-1-1993)]</span>183. Power to make rules.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may make rules in relation to the levy, assessment and collection of terminal tax under this Act and may by such rules provide for the following among other matters, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(a)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the examination of goods liable to payment of terminal tax;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(b)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the inspection, weighing or otherwise examining the contents of any conveyance or package for the purpose of ascertaining whether it contains any goods in respect of which terminal tax is payable;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(c)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the seizure and confiscation of goods liable to terminal tax in case of refusal to pay such tax;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(d)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the measures to prevent evasion of terminal tax;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(e)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any other matter which is to be or may be prescribed for the levy, assessment or collection of the terminal tax.</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words \"Taxes on motor vehicles\" and omitted by Act 52 of 1964, section 3 and Sch. II (w.e.f. 29-12-1964).]</span> Taxes on entertainment and betting</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_184\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/76698756/\">184.</a> Proceeds of entertainment tax.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [Section 184 was earlier substituted by Act <a class=\"akn-ref\" data-eid=\"chp_VIII__sec_184__p_1__ref_2\" data-href=\"/akn/in-del/act/1962/57\" href=\"/doc/1152907/\" id=\"chp_VIII__sec_184__p_1__ref_2\">57 of 1962</a>, se.c 25 (w.e.f. 1-4-1963)] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The heading \"Terminal taxes on goods and sections 178 to 183\" omitted by Ordinance No. 21 of 1993 (w.e.f. 31-1-1993)]</span> [Rep. by the Delhi (Distribution of proceeds of Taxes) Act, 2002 (Delhi Act 11 of 2002), section 4 (w.r.e.f 1-4-1996)]].</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter IX<br/>Borrowing</h2>\n<section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_185\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/162288617/\">185.</a> Power of Corporation to borrow.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_185.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/123932187/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The [Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, in pursuance of any resolution passed by it, borrow by way of debenture or otherwise on the security of all or any of the taxes, rates, cesses, fees and charges authorised by or under this Act, any sums of money which may be required\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_185.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/30750481/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for acquiring any land which it has power to acquire;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_185.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/130071411/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for erecting any building which it has power to erect;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_185.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/14877693/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the execution of any permanent work, the provision of any plant, or the doing of any other thing which it has power to execute, provide or do, if the cost of carrying out the purpose in question ought to be spread over a term of years;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_185.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/49310266/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ to pay off any debt due to the Central Government or the Government.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 89, for clause (d) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_185.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/58754839/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to repay a loan previously raised under this Act or any other Act previously in force; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_185.1.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/123235026/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for any other purpose for which the [Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 89, for clause (d) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> is, by virtue of this Act or any other law for the time being in force, authorised to borrow :</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that\u0097</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_185.1.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/186178938/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">no loan shall be raised without the previous sanction of the Central Government or without previous publication of the application for sanction under the Local Authorities Loans Act, 1914 (9 of 1914), and the rules made thereunder; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_185.1.ii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/108884217/\">(ii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the amount of loan, the rate of interest and the terms including the date of flotation, the time and method of the repayment and the like shall be subject to the approval of the Central Government.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_185.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/77130499/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When any sum of money has been borrowed under sub-section (1), no portion of any sum of money borrowed for any of the purposes referred to in clause (c) of sub-section (1) shall be applied to the payment of salaries and allowances to any municipal officers or other municipal employees other than those exclusively employed in connection with the carrying out of that purpose.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_186\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/153890130/\">186.</a> Time for repayment of money borrowed under section 185.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The time for the repayment of any money borrowed under section 185 shall in no case exceed sixty years and the time for repayment of any money borrowed for the purpose of discharging any previous loan shall not, except with express sanction of the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, extend beyond the unexpired portion of the period for which such previous loan was sanctioned.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_187\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/149941132/\">187.</a> Form and effect of debentures.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- All debentures issued under this Chapter shall be in such form as the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, with the previous sanction of the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, determine and shall be transferable in such manner as shall be therein expressed; and the right to sue in respect of the moneys secured by any of such debentures shall vest in the holders thereof for the time being without any preference by reason of some such debentures being prior in date to others.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_188\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/196444300/\">188.</a> Payment to survivors of joint payees.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- When any debenture or security issued under this Act is payable to two or more persons jointly, and either or any of them dies, then, notwithstanding anything in section 45 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872 (9 of 1872), the debenture or security shall be payable to the survivor or survivors of such person:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that nothing in this section shall affect any claim by the legal representative of a deceased person against such survivor or survivors.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_189\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/33313482/\">189.</a> Receipt by joint holders for interest or dividend.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- When two or more persons are joint holders of any debenture or security issued under this Act, any one of such persons may give an effectual receipt for any interest or dividend payable in respect of such debenture or security, unless notice to the contrary has been given to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> by the other of such persons.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_190\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/123678916/\">190.</a> Maintenance and investment of sinking funds.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_190.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/57962935/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The [A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall maintain sinking funds for the repayment of money borrowed on debentures issued and shall pay every year into such sinking funds such sum as will be sufficient for the repayment within the period fixed for the loan of all moneys borrowed on the debentures issued.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_190.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/150245097/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">All money paid into the sinking funds shall, as soon as possible, be invested by the Commissioner in public securities and every such investment shall be reported by the Commissioner to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> within fifteen days.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_190.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/20689239/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">All dividends and other sums received in respect of any such investment shall, as soon as possible after receipt, be paid into the sinking funds and invested in the manner laid down in sub-section (2).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_190.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/189362455/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When any part of a sinking fund is invested in Delhi municipal debentures, or is applied in paying off any part of a loan before the period fixed for repayment, the interest which would otherwise have been payable on such debentures or on such part of the loan shall be paid into the sinking fund and invested in the manner laid down in sub-section (2).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_190.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/121233021/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any investment made under this section may, subject to the provisions of sub-section (2), be varied or transposed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_191\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/132602294/\">191.</a> Application of sinking funds.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- A sinking fund or any part thereof shall be applied in or towards the discharge of the loan or a part of the loan for which such fund was created, and until such loan or part is wholly discharged shall not be applied for any other purpose:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that when any loan or part thereof has been consolidated under section 193, the Commissioner shall transfer to the sinking fund of the consolidated loan such part of the sinking funds of the original loans as may be proportionate to the amount of the original loans incorporated in the consolidated loan.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_192\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/45517323/\">192.</a> Annual statement by Commissioner.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-blockList\"><span class=\"akn-listIntroduction\">- The Commissioner shall, at the end of every year, submit to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> a statement showing\u0097</span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(a)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">the amount which has been invested during the year under section 190;</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(b)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">the date of the last investment made previous to the submission of the statement;</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(c)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">the aggregate amount of the securities then in his hands; and</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(d)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">the aggregate amount which has up to the date of the statement been applied under section 191, in or towards discharging loans.</span></span></span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_192.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45372872/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every such statement shall be published in the Official Gazette.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_193\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/12306560/\">193.</a> Power of Corporation to consolidate loans.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_193.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/8901486/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained in this Chapter, the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may consolidate all or any of its loans and for that purpose may invite tenders for a new loan (to be called \"the Delhi Municipal consolidated loan, 19__________\") and invite holders of the municipal debentures to exchange their debentures for scrips of such loan.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_193.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/133913857/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The terms of any such consolidated loan and the form of its scrip and the rates at which exchange into such consolidated loan shall be permitted shall be subject to the prior approval of the Central [Government.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Govenment\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_193.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/128969008/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The period for the exchanging of any such consolidated loan shall not, without the sanction of the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, extend beyond the farthest date within which any of the loans to be consolidated would otherwise be repayable.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_193.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/139847285/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall provide for the repayment of any such consolidated loan by a sinking fund in the manner laid down in section 190, having regard to the amount transferred to such sinking fund under section 191.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_194\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/176948197/\">194.</a> Priority of payments for interest and repayment of loans over other payments.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- All payments due from the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> for interest on and repayment of loans shall be made in priority to all other payments due from the Corporation.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_195\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/25399342/\">195.</a> Attachment of Municipal Fund for recovery of money borrowed from Government.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_195.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/136089876/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any money borrowed or deemed to have been borrowed by the Corporation from the [Central Government or the Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 90, for Government (w/e/f/ 1-10-1993)]</span> or any interest or costs due in respect thereof be not repaid according to the conditions of the loan, the [Central Government or the Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 90, for \"Governmen\"t (w/e/f/ 1-10-1993)]</span> may attach the Municipal Fund or any part thereof.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_195.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/167572492/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">After such attachment no person except an officer appointed in this behalf by the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 90, for \"Government\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> shall in any way deal with the attached fund; but such officer may do all acts in respect thereof which any municipal authority, officer or other employee might have done if such attachment had not taken place, and may apply the proceeds in satisfaction of the arrears and of all interests and costs due in respect thereof and of all expenses caused by the attachment and subsequent proceedings:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no such attachment shall defeat or prejudice any debt for which the fund was previously charged in accordance with law; and all such prior charges shall be paid out of the proceeds of the fund before any part of the proceeds is applied to the satisfaction of the debt due to the [Central Government.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act67 of 1993, section 90, for \"Government\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_196\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/174375307/\">196.</a> Power to make regulations.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may make regulations to carry out the purposes of this Chapter including, in particular, the issue of duplicates in case of loss of debentures by theft, destruction or otherwise, and renewal of debentures on payment of fees prescribed in this behalf by such regulations.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter X<br/>Property and Contracts</h2>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Property</span></span><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_197\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/3073184/\">197.</a> Acquisition of property.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall, for the purpose of this Act, have power to acquire and hold movable and immovable property, or any interest therein.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_198\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/15713064/\">198.</a> Acquisition of immovable property by agreement.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whenever the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> decides to acquire any immovable property for the purpose of this Act, the Commissioner shall acquire such property on behalf of the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> by agreement on such terms and at such price as may be approved by the Standing Committee.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_199\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/28429696/\">199.</a> Procedure when immovable property cannot be acquired by agreement.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whenever the Commissioner is unable to acquire any immovable property under section 198 by agreement, the [Central Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may at the request of the Commissioner procure the acquisition thereof under the provisions of the Land Acquisition Act, 1894 (1 of 1894), and on payment by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> of the compensation awarded under that Act and of the charges incurred by the Government in connection with the proceedings, the land shall vest in the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_200\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/157823325/\">200.</a> Disposal of property.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- With respect to the disposal of property belonging to the [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, the following provisions shall have effect, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_200.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/126372404/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the Commissioner may, in his discretion, dispose of, by sale or otherwise, any movable property belonging to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> not exceeding in value in each instance one thousand rupees, or such higher amount as [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may prescribe, or let out on hire any movable property or grant a lease of any immovable property belonging to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, including any right of gathering and taking fruits and the like, for a period not exceeding one year at a time;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_200.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/198812423/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the Commissioner may, with the sanction of the Standing Committee,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">dispose of, by sale or otherwise, any movable property belonging to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> the value of which does not exceed five thousand rupees;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">grant a lease (other than a lease in perpetuity) of any immovable property belonging to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">sell or grant a lease in perpetuity of any immovable property belonging to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> the value of which does not exceed fifty thousand rupees or the annual rent of which does not exceed three thousand rupees;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_200.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/182876898/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">in cases not covered by clause (a) or clause (b), the Commissioner may, with the sanction of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, lease, sell, let out on hire or otherwise transfer any property, movable or immovable, belonging to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_200.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/70992664/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the consideration for which any immovable property may be sold, leased or otherwise transferred shall not be less than the value at which such immovable property could be sold, leased or otherwise transferred in normal and fair competition;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_200.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/58769284/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the sanction of the Standing Committee or of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> under the aforesaid clauses may be given either generally for any class of cases or specially for any particular case;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_200.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/144266592/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">subject to any conditions or limitations that may be specified in any other provisions of this Act, the foregoing provisions of this section shall apply to every disposal of property belonging to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> made under, or for any purpose of, this Act;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_200.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/159531064/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">every case of disposal of property under clause (a) and clause (b) shall be reported by the Commissioner without delay to the Standing Committee and [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> respectively.</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Contracts</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_201\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/26817006/\">201.</a> Contracts by the Corporation.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\u0097 Subject to the provisions of sections 202 and 203 [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be competent to enter into and perform any contract necessary for the purposes of this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_202\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/180504228/\">202.</a> Procedure for making contracts.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- With respect to the making of contracts, the following provisions shall have effect, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_202.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/120864115/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">every such contract shall be made on behalf of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> by the Commissioner;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_202.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/88251990/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">no such contract, for any purpose which in accordance with any provision of this Act the Commissioner may not carry out without the approval or sanction of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or some other municipal authority shall be made by him until and unless such approval or sanction has been duly obtained;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_202.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/26314867/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ no contract which will involve an expenditure exceeding ten lakh rupees or such higher amount as the [Central Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 91, for sub-sections (c) and (d) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span> may from time to time, fix, shall be made by the Commissioner unless the same is previously approved by the Standing Committee; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_202.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/185888288/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">every contract made by the Commissioner involving an expenditure exceeding one lakh rupees but not exceeding ten lakh rupees or such higher amount as may be fixed under clause (c) shall be reported by him, within one month after the same has been made to the Standing Committee.]</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Clause (e) omitted by act 67 of 1993, section 91 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_203\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/153149302/\">203.</a> Mode of executing contracts.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_203.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/123657141/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The mode of executing contracts under this Act shall be prescribed by bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_203.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/25675287/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No contract which is not made in accordance with the provisions of this Act and the bye-laws made thereunder shall binding on [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_203.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/146524011/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The contracts already made in accordance with the provisions of the bye-laws made under this Act prior to the commencement of the Delhi Municipal</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2022 shall be deemed to have been executed by the Commissioner on behalf of the Corporation constituted under sub-section (1) of</span><span class=\"akn-p\">section 3 and shall continue until the expiry of the validity period of such contracts. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[substituted by act 10 of 2022]</span></span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XI<br/>Accounts and Audit</h2>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Scrutiny and audit of accounts</span></span><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_204\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/109412074/\">204.</a> [ Accounts to be kept. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 92, for section 204 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- There shall be kept in such manner and in such form as may be prescribed by regulations the General Account of all receipts and expenditures of the [a Corporation]]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_205\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/26167664/\">205.</a> Scrutiny of accounts by Municipal Chief Auditor and by the Standing Committee.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_205.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/89712495/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Chief Auditor shall conduct a monthly examination and audit of the municipal accounts and shall report thereon to the Standing Committee who shall publish monthly an abstract of the receipts and expenditure of the month last preceding, signed by not less than two members of that Committee and by the Municipal Chief Auditor.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_205.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/181951226/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Standing Committee may also from time to time and for such period as it thinks fit conduct independently any examination and audit of the municipal accounts.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_205.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/19408222/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">For the purpose of examination and audit of the municipal accounts the Standing Committee and the Municipal Chief Auditor shall have access to all the municipal accounts and to all records and correspondence relating thereto and the Commissioner shall forthwith furnish to the Standing Committee or the Municipal Chief Auditor any explanation concerning any receipts or expenditure which they may call for.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_206\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/107205834/\">206.</a> Report by the Municipal Chief Auditor.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_206.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/185150902/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Chief Auditor shall\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_206.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/88383497/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">report to the Standing Committee any material impropriety or irregularity which he may at any time observe in the expenditure or in the recovery of moneys due to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or in the municipal accounts;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_206.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/197888740/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">furnish to the Standing Committee such information as that Committee may from time to time require concerning the progress of the audit.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_206.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/94569168/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Standing Committee shall cause to be laid before [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> every report made by the Municipal Chief Auditor to the Standing Committee and every statement of the views of the Municipal Chief Auditor on any matter affecting the exercise and performance of the powers and duties assigned to him under this Act which the Municipal Chief Auditor may require the Standing Committee to place before [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> together with a report stating what orders have been passed by the Standing Committee upon such report or statement, and [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may take such action in regard to any of the matters aforesaid as [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may deem necessary.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_206.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15783754/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">As soon as may be after the commencement of each year the Municipal Chief Auditor shall deliver to the Standing Committee a report of the entire municipal accounts for the previous year.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_206.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/193044162/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall cause the said report to be printed and shall forward as soon as may be a printed copy thereof to each councillor [*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[ED. The words \"and alderman\" have become redundent as reference as to \"alderman\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993), see section 9 of the Act.]</span> and alderman.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_206.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/13843769/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall also forward without delay to the [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 93 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span> Government so many copies of the said report as may be required by that Government with a brief statement of the action, if any, taken or proposed to be taken thereon.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_207\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/156385708/\">207.</a> Special audit at the direction of the Central [Government.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 94 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_207.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/152416185/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The [<b class=\"akn-b\">*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 94 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government may at any time appoint an auditor for the purpose of making a special audit [of the General Account] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 94, for of any of the accounts (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> of the Municipal Fund and reporting thereon to the [</b>*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word Central omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 94 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government and the costs of such audit as determined by the [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government shall be chargeable to the Municipal Fund.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_207.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/73823350/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An Auditor so appointed may exercise any power which the Municipal Chief Auditor may exercise.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Powers and duties of the Municipal Chief Auditor</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_208\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/180255823/\">208.</a> Procedure to be followed by the Municipal Chief Auditor.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_208.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/9828534/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Chief Auditor shall audit the accounts of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> with the assistance of officers and other employees subordinate to him.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_208.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/37130131/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In the discharge of his functions under this section the Municipal Chief Auditor shall\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_208.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/135051633/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">audit the accounts of expenditure from the revenue of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, expenditure on account of loan works and expenditure incurred out of special funds and shall ascertain whether moneys shown therein as having been disbursed were legally available for, and applicable to, the service or purpose to which they have been applied or charged, and whether the expenditure conforms to the authority which governs it;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_208.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/135541549/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">audit the accounts of debts, deposits, sinking funds advances, suspense and remittance transactions of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and report upon those accounts and upon the results of verification of the balances relating thereto.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_208.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/123581141/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Chief Auditor shall examine and audit the statement of accounts relating to the commercial services conducted in any department of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, including the trading, manufacturing and profit and loss accounts, and the balance sheets where such accounts are maintained under the orders of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words the Delhi Transport Committee omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.r.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> [or the Standing Committee] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 95, for \"certain\" words (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> and shall certify and report upon these accounts.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_208.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/155675492/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Chief Auditor shall, in consultation with the Standing Committee [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words the \"Delhi Transport Committee\" omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.r.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> and subject to any directions given by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, determine the form and manner in which his reports on the accounts of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be prepared and shall have authority to call upon any officer of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> to provide any information necessary for the preparation of these reports.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_209\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/62781226/\">209.</a> Power of Municipal Chief Auditor to make queries, etc., and call for class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_209.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/155115954/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the Municipal Chief Auditor considers it desirable that the whole or any part of the audit applied to any accounts which he is required to audit shall be conducted in the offices in which those accounts originate he may require that those accounts, together with all books and documents having relation thereto, shall at all convenient times be made available in the said offices for inspection.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_209.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/100753070/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Chief Auditor shall have the power to require that any books or other documents relating to the accounts he is required to audit shall be sent for inspection by him:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that if the documents are confidential he shall be responsible for preventing disclosure of their contents.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_209.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98189487/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Chief Auditor shall have authority to frame standing orders and to give directions on all matters relating to audit, and particularly in respect of the method and the extent of audit to be applied and the raising and pursuing of objections.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_209.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/128310794/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Expenditure sanctioned by the Municipal Chief Auditor shall be be performed by such authority as may be specified therein]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_299\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/100467010/\">299.</a> Functions of Commissioner in respect of public streets.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_299.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/145953810/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall, from time to time, cause all public streets vested in the Corporation to be levelled, metalled or paved, channelled, altered or repaired, and may widen, extend or otherwise improve any such street or cause the soil thereof to be raised, lowered or altered or may place and keep in repair fences and posts for the safety of foot-passengers:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no widening, extension or other improvement of a public street, the aggregate cost of which will exceed five thousand rupees, shall be undertaken by the Commissioner except with the previous sanction of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_299.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/157344656/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">With the previous sanction of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> the Commissioner may permanently close the whole or any part of a public street:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that before according such sanction [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall by notice publish in the manner specified by bye-laws give reasonable opportunity to the residents likely to be affected by such closure to make suggestions or objections with respect to such closure and shall consider all such suggestions or objections which may be made within one month from the date of publication of the said notice.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" received.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_302\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/168027979/\">302.</a> Minimum width of new public streets.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner shall, from time to time, with the sanction of the Standing Committee, specify the minimum width of different classes of new public streets according to the nature of the traffic likely to be carried thereon, and the streets with which they join at one or both ends, the localities in which they are situated, the heights up to which buildings abutting thereon may be erected and other similar considerations.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_303\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/20516783/\">303.</a> Power to prohibit use of public streets for certain kind of traffic.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_303.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/87509526/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_303.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/189399526/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">prohibit vehicular traffic in any public street or any portion thereof so as to prevent danger, obstruction or inconvenience to the public or to ensure quietness in any locality;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_303.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/171611865/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">prohibit in respect of all public streets, or any particular public street, the transit of any vehicle of such form, construction, weight or size or laden with such heavy or unwieldy objects as may be likely to cause injury to the roadways or any construction thereon, except under such conditions as to time, mode of traction or locomotion, use of appliances for the protection of roadways, number of lights and assistants and other general precautions and upon the payment of such charges as may be specified by the Commissioner generally or specially in each case;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_303.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/187163704/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">prohibit access to premises from any particular public street carrying high speed vehicular traffic:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Commissioner shall not take action without the sanction of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> in cases under clause (a) and without the sanction of the Standing Committee in cases under clause (c).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_303.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/86817979/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Notices of such prohibition as are imposed under sub-section (1) shall be posted in conspicuous places at or near both ends of public streets or portions thereof to which they relate, unless such prohibition applies generally to all public streets.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_304\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/90911502/\">304.</a> Power to acquire lands and buildings for public streets and public parking places.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Subject to provisions contained in Chapter X, the Commissioner may. -(a) acquire any land required for the purpose of opening, widening, extending or otherwise improving any public street or of making any new public street, and any building standing upon such land;</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_304.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/109364829/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">acquire in relation to any such land or building, all such land with buildings, if any, thereon as [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may think expedient to acquire outside of the regular line, or of the intended regular line, of such street;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_304.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15854241/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">acquire any land for the purpose of laying out or making a public parking place.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_305\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/14169307/\">305.</a> Defining the regular line of streets.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_305.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/139567933/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may define a line on one or both sides of any public street in accordance with the bye-laws made in this behalf and may, with the previous sanction of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, redefine at any time any such regular line:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that, before according sanction [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall by public notice afford reasonable opportunity to the residents of premises abutting on such public street to make suggestions or objections with respect to the proposed redefined line of the street and shall consider all such suggestions or objections which may be made within one month from the date of the publication of the said notice:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that the regular line of any public street operative under any law in force in any part of Delhi immediately before the commencement of this Act shall be deemed to be a line defined by the Commissioner under this sub-section.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_305.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/39174890/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The line for the time being defined or redefined shall be called the regular line of street.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_305.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/66000437/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall construct or reconstruct any building or a portion thereof or any boundary wall or other structure whatsoever within the regular line of a street except with the written permission of the Commissioner:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that if within sixty days after the receipt of application from any person for permission to construct or reconstruct a boundary wall or a portion thereof, the Commissioner fails to take steps to acquire the land within the regular line of the street in accordance with section 308, then, that person may, subject to any other provisions of this Act and the bye-laws made thereunder, proceed with the work of construction or reconstruction of such boundary wall or portion thereof.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_305.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/100428418/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When the Commissioner grants permission for the construction or reconstruction of any building or any boundary wall or other structure within the regular line of a street, he may require the owner of the building to execute an agreement binding himself and his successors-in-interest not to claim compensation in the event of the Commissioner at any time thereafter calling upon him or any of his successors by written notice to remove any work carried out in pursuance of such permission and to pay the expenses of such removal if, in default, such removal is carried out by the Commissioner and may for that purpose require such owner to deposit in the Municipal Fund such sum as may be determined by him.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_305.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/138546586/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall maintain\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_305.5.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/168027368/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">a register containing such particulars as may be specified by him in this behalf with plans attached thereto showing all public streets in respect of which the regular line of the street has been defined or redefined and containing any other particulars which the Commissioner may deem necessary;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_305.5.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/133887032/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">a register of all agreements executed under sub-section (4) and of all deposits made thereunder.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_305.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/86279923/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">All such registers shall be open to inspection by any person on payment of such fee as may be prescribed by the Commissioner with the sanction of the Standing Committee.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_305.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/3712832/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any agreement entered into in pursuance of sub-section (4) shall be in writing, shall be registered under the Indian Registration Act, 1908 (16 of 1908), and shall be deemed to be an agreement in respect of the land to which it relates and any condition contained in such agreement shall be deemed to be an obligation annexed to the ownership of the said land and enforceable against the successors-in-interest of the owner of such land.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_306\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/61850371/\">306.</a> Setting back building to regular line of street.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_306.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/103668650/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any part of a building abutting on a public street is within the regular line of that street, the Commissioner may, whenever it is proposed\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_306.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/14169921/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to repair, rebuild or construct such building or to take down such building to an extent exceeding one-half thereof above the ground level, such half to be measured in cubic feet; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_306.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/170225293/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to repair, remove, construct or reconstruct or make any additions to, or structural alterations of, any portion of such building which is within the regular line of the street, by any order which he issues concerning the additions to, rebuilding construction, repair or alterations of, such building, require such building to be set back to the regular line of the street.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_306.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/17886961/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When any building or any part thereof within the regular line of a public street falls down or is burnt down or is, whether by the order of the Commissioner or otherwise, taken down, the Commissioner may forthwith take possession on behalf of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> of the portion of the land within the regular line of the street therefore occupied by the said building and, if necessary, clear the same.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_306.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/7370192/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Land acquired under this section shall be deemed to be a part of the public street and shall vest in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_307\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/117722093/\">307.</a> Compulsory setting back of building to regular line of street.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_307.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/39556069/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where any building or any part thereof is within the regular line of a public street and in the opinion of the Commissioner it is necessary to set back the building or part thereof to the regular line of the street he may, by notice served on the owner in accordance with the provisions of this Act, require him to show cause within such period as may be specified in the notice as to why such building or part thereof which is within the regular line of the street should not be pulled down and the land within the regular line acquired by the Commissioner on behalf of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_307.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/67426836/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If such owner fails to show cause as required by sub-section (1) the Commissioner may, with the approval of the Standing Committee, require the owner by another notice to be served on him in accordance with the provisions of this Act, to pull down the building or part thereof which is within the regular line of the street within such period as is specified in the notice.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_307.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/127820943/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If within such period the owner of the building fails to pull down the building or part thereof as required by the Commissioner, the Commissioner may pull down the same and all the expenses incurred in so doing shall be paid by the owner and recoverable from him as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_307.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/115358927/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall at once take possession on behalf of the Corporation of the portion of the land within the regular line of the street occupied by the
