said building or part thereof and such land shall thereupon be deemed to be a part of the public street and shall vest in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_308\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/107182921/\">308.</a> Acquisition of open land and land occupied by platform, etc, within the regular line of street.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If any land, whether open or enclosed, not vesting in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and not occupied by any building is within the regular line of a public street or if a platform, verandah, step, compound wall, hedge or fence or some other structure external to a building abutting on a public street or a portion of such platform, verandah, step, compound wall, hedge, fence or other structure is within the regular line of such street the Commissioner may, after giving to the owner of the land or building not less than seven clear days' notice of his intention so to do, take possession on behalf of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> of the said land with its enclosing wall, hedge or fence, if any, or of the said platform, verandah, step, compound wall, hedge, fence or other structure or of any portion thereof which is within the regular line of the public street and, if necessary, clear the same and the land so acquired shall thereupon be deemed to be a part of the public street and shall vest in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that where the land or building is vested in the Union or a State the Commissioner shall not take possession thereof without the previous sanction of the Central [Government.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_309\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/9197671/\">309.</a> Acquisition of the remaining part of a building and land after their portions within a regular line of street have been acquired.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_309.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/61943083/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where a land or building is partly within the regular line of a public street and the Commissioner is satisfied that the land remaining after the excision of the portion within the said line will not be suitable or fit for any beneficial use, he may, at the request of the owner, acquire such land in addition to the land within the said line and such surplus land shall be deemed to be a part of the public street and shall vest in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_309.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/70801771/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Such surplus land may thereafter be utilised for the purpose of setting forward a building under section 310.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_310\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/37340793/\">310.</a> Setting forward of buildings to the regular line of street.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may, upon such terms as he thinks fit, allow any building to be set forward for the purpose of improving the regular line of a public street and may, with the sanction of the Standing Committee, by notice required any building to be so set forward in the case of reconstruction thereof or of a new construction.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation. \u0097 For the purpose of this section a wall separating any premises from a public street shall be deemed to be a building; and it shall be deemed a sufficient compliance with permission or requisition to set forward a building to the regular line of a street if a wall of such material and dimensions as are approved by the Commissioner is erected along the said line.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_311\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/76096202/\">311.</a> Compensation to be paid in certain cases of setting back or setting forward to buildings, etc.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_311.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/85379548/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Compensation to be paid by the Commissioner to the owner of any building or land acquired for a public street under the provisions of sections 306, 307 and 308 for any loss which such owner may sustain in consequence of his building or land being so acquired and for any expense incurred by such owner in consequence of any order made by the Commissioner:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_311.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/155643981/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any increase or decrease in the value of the remainder of the property of which the building or land so acquired formed part, likely to accrue from the setting back to the regular line of the street shall be taken into consideration and allowed for in determining the amount of such compensation;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_311.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/168112394/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if any such increase in the value exceeds the amount of loss sustained or expenses incurred by the owner, the Commissioner may recover from him half the amount of such excess as a Betterment charge.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_311.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/197887430/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If in consequence of any order to set forward a building made by the Commissioner, the owner of such building sustains any loss or damage, compensation shall be paid to him by the Commissioner for such loss or damage after taking into account any increase in value likely to accrue from the setting forward.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_311.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/157144953/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the additional land which will be included in the premises of any person required or permitted under sub-section (2) to set forward a building belongs to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, the order or permission of the Commissioner to set forward the building shall be a sufficient conveyance to the said owner of the said land; and the price to be paid to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> by the owner for such additional land and the other terms and conditions of the conveyance shall be set forth in the order or permission.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_311.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/157042898/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If, when the Commissioner requires any building to be set forward, the owner of the building is dissatisfied with the price fixed to be paid to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or with any of the terms or conditions of conveyance, the Commissioner shall, upon the application of the owner at any time within fifteen days after the said terms and conditions are communicated to him, refer the case for the determination of the court of the district judge of Delhi whose decision thereon shall be final.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Private streets</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_312\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/50268115/\">312.</a> Owners, obligation when dealing with land as building sites.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If the owner of any land utilises, sells, leases out or otherwise disposes of such land for the construction of buildings thereon he shall lay down and make a street or streets giving access to the plots into which the land may be divided and connecting with an existing public or private street.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_313\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/13134640/\">313.</a> Lay-out plans.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_313.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/18273388/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Before utilising, selling or otherwise dealing with any land under section 312, the owner thereof shall send to the Commissioner a written application with a lay-out plan of the land showing the following particulars, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_313.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/8186368/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the plots into which the land is proposed to be divided for the erection of buildings thereon and the purpose or purposes for which such buildings are to be used;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_313.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/157247980/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the reservation or allotment of any site for any street, open space, park, recreation ground, school, market or any other public purpose;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_313.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/183291743/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the intended level, direction and width of street or streets;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_313.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/94653252/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the regular line of street or streets;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_313.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45675933/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the arrangements to be made for levelling, paving, metalling, flagging, channelling, sewering, draining, conserving and lighting street or streets;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_313.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/164924868/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The provisions of this Act and the bye-laws made thereunder as to width of the public streets and the height of buildings abutting thereon, shall apply in the case of streets referred to in sub-section (1) and all the particulars referred to in that sub-section shall be subject to the sanction of the Standing Committee.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_313.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/89913510/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Within sixty days after the receipt of any application under sub-section (1) the Standing Committee shall either accord sanction to the lay-out plan on such conditions as it may think fit or disallow it or ask for further information with respect to it.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_313.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/95667528/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Such sanction shall be refused\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_313.4.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/164822048/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if the particulars shown in the lay-out plan would conflict with any arrangements which have been made or which are in the opinion of the Standing Committee likely to be made for carrying out any general scheme of development of Delhi whether contained in the master plan or a zonal development plan prepared for Delhi or not; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_313.4.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/131106013/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if the said lay-out plan does not conform to the provisions of this Act and bye-laws made thereunder; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_313.4.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/84771003/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if any street proposed in the plan is not designed so as to connect at one end with a street which is already open.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_313.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/5046556/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall utilise, sell or otherwise deal with any land or lay-out or make any new street without or otherwise than in conformity with the orders of the Standing Committee and if further information is asked for, no step shall be taken to utilise, sell or otherwise deal with the land or to lay-out or make the street until orders have been passed upon receipt of such information:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the passing of such orders shall not be in any case delayed for more than sixty days after the Standing Committee has received the information which it considers necessary to enable it to deal with the said application.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_313.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/43000532/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The lay-out plan referred to earlier in this section shall, if so required by the Standing Committee, be prepared by a licensed town planner.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_314\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/194716371/\">314.</a> Alteration or demolition of street made in breach of section 313.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_314.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/76584312/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any person lays-out or makes any street referred to in section 313, without or otherwise than in conformity with the orders of the Standing Committee, the Commissioner may, whether or not the offender be prosecuted under this Act, by notice\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_314.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/187804076/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">require the offender to show cause by a written statement signed by him and sent to the Commissioner on or before such date as may be specified in the notice, why such street should not be altered to the satisfaction of the Commissioner or if such alteration be impracticable, why such street should not be demolished; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_314.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/158180356/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">require the offender to appear before the Commissioner either personally or by a duly authorised agent on such day and at such time and place as may be specified in the notice and show cause as aforesaid.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_314.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/183515621/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any person on whom such notice is served fails to show cause to the satisfaction of the Commissioner why such street should not be so altered or demolished, the Commissioner may pass an order directing the alteration or demolition of such street.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_315\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/184015323/\">315.</a> Power of Commissioner to order work to be carried out or to carry it out himself in default.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_315.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/105022204/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any private street or part thereof is not levelled, paved, metalled, flagged, channelled, sewered, drained, conserved or lighted to the satisfaction of Commissioner, he may by notice require the owners of such street or part and the owners of the lands and buildings fronting or abutting on such street or part to carry out any work which in his opinion may be necessary, and within such time as may be specified in such notice.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_315.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/118244614/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If such work is not carried out within the time specified in the notice, the Commissioner may, if he thinks fit, execute it and the expenses incurred shall be paid by the owners referred to in sub-section (1) in such proportion as may be determined by the Commissioner and shall be recoverable from them as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_316\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/197665191/\">316.</a> Right of owners to require streets to be declared public.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If any street has been levelled, paved, metalled, flagged, channelled, sewered, drained, conserved and lighted under the provisions of section 315, the Commissioner may, and on the requisition of a majority of the owners referred to in sub-section (1) of that section shall, declare such a street to be a public street and thereupon the street shall vest in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">Encroachments on streets</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_317\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/79648920/\">317.</a> Prohibition of projections upon streets, etc.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_317.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/169802203/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Except as provided in section 318, on person shall erect, set up, add to, or place against or in front of any premises any structure or fixture which will\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_317.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/186640421/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">overhang, jut or project into, or in any way encroach upon, and obstruct in any way the safe or convenient passage of the public along, any street, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_317.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/191829174/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">jut or project into or encroach upon any drain or open channel in any street so as in any way to interfere with the use or proper working of such drain or channel or to impede the inspection or cleansing thereof.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_317.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/81311305/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may by notice require the owner or occupier of any premises to remove, or to take such other action as he may direct in relation to, any structure or fixture which has been erected, set up, added to or placed against, or in front of, the said premises in contravention of this section.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_317.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/89965710/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the occupier of the said premises removes or alters any structure or fixture in accordance with such notice, he shall be entitled, unless the structure or fixture was erected, set up or placed by himself, to credit into account with the owner of the premises for all reasonable expenses incurred by him in complying with the notice.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_318\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/185805511/\">318.</a> Projections over streets may be permitted in certain cases.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_318.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/71844272/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may give a written permission, on such terms and on payment of such fee as he in each case thinks fit, to the owner or occupier of the building abutting on any street\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_318.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/22791936/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to erect an arcade over such street or any portion thereof; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_318.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/195392335/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to put up a verandah, balcony, arch, connecting passage, sun-shade, weather frame, canopy, awning or other such structure or thing projecting from any storey over or across any street or portion thereof:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no permission shall be given by the Commissioner for the erection of an arcade in any public street in which construction of an arcade has not been generally sanctioned by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_318.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/133236510/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may at any time by notice require the owner or occupier of any building to remove a verandah, balcony, sun-shade, weather frame or the like put up in accordance with the provisions of any law and such owner or occupier shall be bound to take action accordingly but shall be entitled to compensation for the loss caused to him by such removal and the cost incurred thereon.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_319\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/195341465/\">319.</a> Ground floor doors, etc, not to open outwards on streets.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may at any time by notice require the owner of any premises on the ground floor of which any door, gate, bar, or window opens outwards upon a street or upon any land required for the improvement of a street in such manner, as in the opinion of the Commissioner, to obstruct the safe or convenient passage of the public along such street, to have the said door, gate, bar or window altered so as not to open outwards.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_320\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/28399328/\">320.</a> Prohibition of structures or fixtures which cause obstruction in streets.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_320.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/72780355/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, except with the permission of the Commissioner granted in this behalf, erect or set up any wall, fence, rail, post, step, booth or other structure whether fixed or movable or whether of a permanent or temporary nature, or any fixture in or upon any street or upon or over any open channel, drain, well or tank in any street so as to form an obstruction to, or an encroachment upon, or a projection over, or to occupy any portion of such street, channel, drain, well or tank.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_320.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/65563446/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Nothing in this section shall apply to any erection or thing to which clause (c) of sub-section (1) of section 325 applies.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_321\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/129026591/\">321.</a> Prohibition of deposit, etc. , of things in streets.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_321.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/50661699/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, except with the permission of the Commissioner and on payment of such fee as he in each case thinks fit, place or deposit upon any street, or upon any open channel, drain or well in any street or upon any public place any stall, chair, bench, box, ladder, bale or other thing whatsoever so as to form an obstruction thereto or encroachment thereon.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_321.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/88222675/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Nothing in sub-section (1) applies to building materials.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_322\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/135649680/\">322.</a> Power to remove anything deposited or exposed for sale in contravention of this Act.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may, without notice, cause to be removed\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_322.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/181508189/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any stall, chair, bench, box, ladder, bale or other thing whatsoever, placed, deposited, projected, attached or suspended in, upon, from or to any place in contravention of this Act;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_322.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/35472451/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any article whatsoever hawked or exposed for sale on any public street or in other public place in contravention of this Act and any vehicle, package, box or any other thing in or on which such article is placed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_323\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/186089724/\">323.</a> Prohibition of the tethering of animals and milking of cattle.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_323.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/52295737/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall tether any animal or cause or permit the same to be tethered in any public street.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_323.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/124008388/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall milk or cause or permit to be milked any cow or buffalo in any street.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_323.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/127284531/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any animal tethered or any cow or buffalo found being milked as aforesaid in any street may be removed by the Commissioner or any municipal officer or employee and be impounded and dealt with under the provisions of the Cattle-trespass Act, 1871 (1 of 1871).</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provision concerning execution of works in or near to streets</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_324\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/101597742/\">324.</a> Precautions during repair of streets.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_324.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/113594792/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall, so far as is practicable during the construction or repair of any public street, or any municipal drain or any premises vested in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_324.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/31551443/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">cause the same to be fenced and guarded,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_324.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/21500631/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">take proper precautions against accident by shoring up and protecting the adjoining buildings,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_324.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/41302470/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">cause such bars, chains or posts to be fixed across or in any street in which any such work of construction or repair is under execution as are necessary in order to prevent the passage of vehicles or animals and avert danger.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_324.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/51290674/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall cause such street, drain or premises to be sufficiently lighted or guarded during night while under construction or repair.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_324.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/47392178/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall, with all reasonable speed, cause the said work to be completed, the ground to be filled in, the street, drain or premises to be repaired and the rubbish occasioned thereby to be removed.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_324.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/195668839/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, without the permission of the Commissioner or other lawful authority, remove any bar, chain, post or shorting, timber, or remove or extinguish any light set up under this section.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_325\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/60369708/\">325.</a> Streets not to be opened or broken up and building materials not to be deposited thereon without permission.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_325.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/76784574/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person other than the Commissioner or a municipal officer or other municipal employee shall, without the written permission of the Commissioner\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_325.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/54865155/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">open, break up, displace, take up or make any alteration in, or cause any injury to the soil or pavement or any wall, fence, post, chain or other material or thing forming part of any street; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_325.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/179000059/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">deposit any building materials in any street; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_325.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/198059422/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">set up in any street any scaffold or any temporary erection for the purpose of any work whatever, or any posts, bars, rails, boards or other things by way of an enclosure, for the purpose of making mortar or depositing bricks, lime, rubbish or other materials.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_325.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/132777532/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any permission granted under clause (b) or clause (c) of sub-section (1) shall be terminable at the discretion of the Commissioner on his giving not less than twenty-four hours notice of such termination to the person to whom such permission was granted.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_325.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/146392641/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may, without notice, cause to be removed any of the things referred to in clause (b) or clause (c) of sub-section (1) which has been deposited or set up in any street without the permission specified in that sub-section or which having been deposited or set up with such permission has not been removed within the period specified in the notice issued under sub-section (2):</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that nothing in this sub-section shall apply to cases under clause (b) or clause (c) of sub-section (1) in which an application for permission has been made with such fee as may be prescribed by the Commissioner in this behalf but no reply has been sent to the applicant within seven days from the date of the application.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_326\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/130909967/\">326.</a> Disposal of things removed under this Chapter.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_326.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/186511108/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any of the things caused to be removed by the Commissioner under this Chapter shall, unless the owner thereof turns up to take back such thing and pays to the Commissioner the charges for the removal and storage of such thing, be disposed of by the Commissioner by public auction or in such other manner and within such time as the Commissioner thinks fit.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_326.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/69604817/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The charges for removal and storage of the thing sold under sub-section (1) shall be paid out of the proceeds of the sale thereof and the balance, if any, shall be paid to the owner of the thing sold on a claim being made therefor within a period of one year from the date of sale, and if no such claim is made within the said period, shall be credited to the Municipal Fund.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Naming and numbering of streets and numbering of buildings</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_327\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/171259114/\">327.</a> Naming and numbering of streets.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_327.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/3227254/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_327.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/169949263/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">with the sanction of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, determine the name or number by which any street or public place vested in the Corporation shall be known;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_327.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/10112655/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">cause to be put up or painted at a conspicuous part of any building, wall or place at or near each end, corner or entrance of such street or on some convenient part of such street, the name or number by which it is to be known;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_327.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/43613979/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">cause to be put up or painted on boards of suitable size the name of any public place vested in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_327.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/85961864/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">determine the number or sub-number by which any premises or part of such premises shall be known and cause such number or sub-number to be fixed to the side or outer door of such premises or to some place at the entrance of the enclosure thereof.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_327.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/122280099/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall destroy, remove, deface or in any way injure or alter any such name or number or sub-number or put up or paint any name or number or sub-number different from that put up or painted by order of the Commissioner.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Repair or enclosure of dangerous places</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_328\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/116792687/\">328.</a> Commissioner to take steps for repairing or enclosing dangerous places.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_328.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/81925930/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any place is, in the opinion of the Commissioner, for want of sufficient repair or protection or enclosure, or owing to some work being carried on thereupon, dangerous or causing inconvenience to passengers along a street or to other persons including the owner or occupier of the said place, who have legal access thereto or to the neighbourhood thereof, the Commissioner may by notice in writing require the owner or occupier of such place to repair, protect or enclose the same or take such other step as shall appear to the Commissioner necessary in order to prevent the danger or inconvenience arising therefrom.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_328.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/184906934/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may before giving any such notice or before the period of any such notice has expired, take such temporary measures as he thinks fit to prevent the danger or inconvenience arising therefrom; and any expense incurred by the Commissioner in taking such temporary measures shall be recoverable from the owner or occupier of the place as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Lighting of streets</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_329\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/5661263/\">329.</a> Measures for lighting.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner shall\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_329.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/146607069/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">take measures for lighting in a suitable manner all such public streets and public places as may be specified by the Standing Committee;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_329.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/63382414/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">procure, erect and maintain such number of lamps, lamp posts and other appurtenances as may be necessary for the said purpose;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_329.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/187418381/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">cause such lamps to be lighted by means of oil, electricity or such other light as the Standing Committee may determine.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_330\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/148229010/\">330.</a> Prohibition of removal, etc, of lamps.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_330.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/81519621/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, without lawful authority, take away or wilfully or negligently break or throw down or damage\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_330.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/55378203/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any lump or any appurtenance of any lamp or lamp post or lamp iron set up in any public street or any public place;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_330.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/151321350/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any electric wire for lighting such lamp.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_330.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/10047078/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any post, pole, standard, stay, strut, bracket or other contrivance for carrying, suspending or supporting any electric wire or lamp.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_330.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/21769638/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall wilfully or negligently extinguish the light of any lamp set up in any public street or any public place.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_330.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/182425602/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any person wilfully or through negligence or accident breaks, or causes any damage to any of the things described in sub-section (1), he shall in addition to any penalty to which he may be subjected under this Act, pay the expenses of repairing the damage so done by him.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XVI<br/>Building Regulations</h2>\n<section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_330A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/124931645/\">330A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 98 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span> General supreintendence, etc., of the [Government.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Notwithstandign anything contained in any other provision of this Act, the Commissioner shall exercise his powers and powers and discharge his functions under this Chapter, undr the general superintendence, direction and control of the [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_331\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/154329954/\">331.</a> Definition.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- In this Chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the expression \"to erect a building\" means\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_331.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/52564162/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to erect a new building on any site whether previously built upon or not;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_331.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12190325/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to re-erect\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any building of which more than one-half of the cubical contents above the level of the plinth have been pulled down, burnt or destroyed, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any building of which more than one-half of the superficial area of the external walls above the level of the plinth has been pulled down, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any frame building of which more than half of the number of the posts or beams in the external walls have been pulled down;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_331.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/78191168/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to convert into a dwelling house any building or any part of a building not originally constructed for human habitation or, if originally so constructed, subsequently appropriated for any other purpose;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_331.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/34416994/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to convert into more than one dwelling house a building originally constructed as one dwelling house only;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_331.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/58676484/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to convert into a place of religious worship or into a sacred building any place or building not originally constructed for such purpose;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_331.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/116164195/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to roof or cover an open space between walls or buildings to the extent of the structure which is formed by the roofing or covering of such space;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_331.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/193901773/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to convert two or more tenements in a building into a greater or lesser number;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_331.h\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/34895293/\">(h)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to convert into a stall, shop, warehouse or godown, stable, factory or garage any building not originally constructed for use as such or which was not so used before the change;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_331.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/57004365/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to convert a building which when originally constructed was legally exempt from the operations of any building regulations contained in this Act or in any bye-laws made thereunder or in any other law, into a building which had it been originally erected in its converted form, would have been subject to such building regulations;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_331.j\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/116315730/\">(j)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to convert into or use as a dwelling house any building which has been discontinued as or appropriated for any purpose other than, a dwelling house.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_332\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/69460646/\">332.</a> Prohibition of building without sanction.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall erect or commence to erect any building or execute any of the works specified in section 334 except with the previous sanction of the Commissioner, not otherwise than in accordance with the provisions of this Chapter and of the bye-laws made under this Act in relation to the erection of buildings or execution of works.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_333\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/158289202/\">333.</a> Erection of building.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_333.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15382489/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every person who intends to erect a building shall apply for sanction by giving notice in writing of his intention to the Commissioner in such form and containing such information as may be prescribed by bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_333.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/61670187/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every such notice shall be accompanied by such documents and plans as may be so prescribed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_334\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/123334010/\">334.</a> Applications for additions to, or repairs of, buildings.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_334.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/160893214/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every person who intends to execute any of the following works, that is to say,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_334.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/164718581/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to make any addition to a building;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_334.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/67425947/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to make any alteration or repairs to a building involving the removal or re-erection of any external or party wall thereof or of any wall which supports the roof thereof to an extent exceeding one-half of such wall above the plinth level, such half to be measured in superficial feet;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_334.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/165073523/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to make any alteration or repairs to a frame building involving the removal or re-erection of more than one-half of the posts in any such wall thereof as aforesaid; or involving the removal or re-erection of any such wall thereof as aforesaid to an extent exceeding one-half of such wall above plinth level, such half to be measured in superficial feet;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_334.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/106456046/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to make any alteration in a building involving\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the sub-division of any room in such building so as to convert the same into two or more separate rooms, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the conversion of any passage or space in such building into a room or rooms;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_334.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/3356683/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to repair, remove, construct, reconstruct or make any addition to or structural alteration in any portion of a building abutting on a street which stands within the regular line of such street;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_334.1.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/156839370/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to close permanently any door or window in an external wall;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_334.1.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/142472314/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to remove or reconstruct the principal staircase or to alter its position, shall apply for sanction by giving notice in writing of his intention to the Commissioner in such form and containing such information as may be prescribed by bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_334.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/14070058/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every such notice shall be accompanied by such documents and plans as may be so prescribed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_335\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/129759745/\">335.</a> Conditions of valid notice.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_335.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/18740656/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A person giving the notice required by section 333 shall specify the purpose for which it is intended to use the building to which such notice relates; and a person giving the notice required by section 334 shall specify whether the purpose for which the building is being used is proposed or likely to be changed by the execution of the proposed work.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_335.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/11199606/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No notice shall be valid until the information required under sub-section (1) and any further information and plans which may be required by bye-laws made in this behalf have been furnished to the satisfaction of the Commissioner along with the notice.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_336\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/143803947/\">336.</a> Sanction of refusal of building or work.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_336.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/3424252/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall sanction the erection of a building or the execution of a work unless such building or work would contravene any of the provisions of sub-section (2) of this section or the provisions of section 340.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_336.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/71316617/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The grounds on which the sanction of a building or work may be refused shall be the following, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_336.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/192762751/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the building or work or the use of the site for the building or work or any of the particulars comprised in the site plan, ground plan, elevation, section or specification would contravene the provisions of any bye-law made in this behalf or of any other law or rule, bye-law or order made under such other law;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_336.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/164910295/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the notice for sanction does not contain the particulars or is not prepared in the manner required under the bye-laws made in this behalf;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_336.2.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/139442770/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that any information or documents required by the Commissioner under this Act or any bye-laws made thereunder has or have not been duly furnished;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_336.2.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/59318587/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that in cases falling under section 312, lay-out plans have not been sanctioned in accordance with section 313;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_336.2.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/22022985/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the building or work would be an encroachment on Government land or land vested in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_336.2.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/83510017/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the site of the building or work does not abut on a street or projected street and that there is no access to such building or work from any such street by a passage or pathway appertaining to such site.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_336.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/58795737/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The commissioner shall communicate the sanction to the person who has given the notice; and where he refuses sanction on any of the grounds specified in sub-section (2) or under section 340 he shall record a brief statement of his reasons for such refusal and communicate the refusal along with the reasons therefor to the person who has given the notice.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_336.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12490430/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The sanction or refusal as aforesaid shall be communicated in such manner as may be specified in the bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_337\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/187382752/\">337.</a> When building or work may be proceeded with.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_337.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/10108965/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where within a period of sixty days, or in cases falling under clause (b) of section 331 within a period of thirty days, after the receipts of any notice under section 333 or section 334 or of the further information, if any, required under section 335 the Commissioner does not refuse to sanction the building or work or upon refusal, does not communicate the refusal to the person who has given the notice, the Commissioner shall be deemed to have accorded sanction to the building or work and the person by whom the notice has been given shall be free to commence and proceed with the building or work in accordance with his intention as expressed in the notice and the documents and plans accompanying the same:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that if it appears to the Commissioner that the site of the proposed building or work is likely to be affected by any scheme of acquisition of land for any public purpose or by any proposed regular line of a public street or extension, improvement, widening or alteration of any street, the Commissioner may withhold sanction of the building or work for such period not exceeding three months as he deems fit and the period of sixty days or as the case may be, the period of thirty days specified in this sub-section shall be deemed to commence from the date of the expiry of the period for which the sanction has been withheld.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_337.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/158322866/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where a building or work is sanctioned or is deemed to have been sanctioned by the Commissioner under sub-section (1), the person who has given the notice shall be bound to erect the building or execute the work in accordance with such sanction but not so as to contravene any of the provisions of this Act or any other law or of any bye-law made thereunder.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_337.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/169672752/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the person or anyone lawfully claiming under him does not commence the erection of the building or the execution of the work within one year of the date on which the building or work is sanctioned or is deemed to have been sanctioned, he shall have to give notice under section 333 or, as the case may be, under section 334 for fresh sanction of the building or the work and the provisions of this section shall apply in relation to such notice as they apply in relation to the original notice.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_337.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/17200326/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Before commencing the erection of a building or execution of a work within the period specified in sub-section (3), the person concerned shall give notice to the Commissioner of the proposed date of the commencement of the erection of the building or the execution of the work:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that if the commencement does not take place within seven days of the date so notified, the notice shall be deemed not to have been given and a fresh notice shall be necessary in this behalf.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_338\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/134265381/\">338.</a> Sanction accorded under misrepresentation.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If at any time after the sanction of any building or work has been accorded, the Commissioner is satisfied that such sanction was accorded in consequence of any material misrepresentation or fraudulent statement contained in the notice given or information further under sections 333, 334 and 335, he may by order in writing cancel for reasons to be recorded such sanction and any building or work commenced, erected or done shall be deemed to have been commenced, erected or done without such sanction:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that before making any such order the Commissioner shall give reasonable opportunity to the person affected as to why such order should not be made.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_339\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/36819349/\">339.</a> Buildings at corners of streets.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may require any building intended to be erected at the corner of two streets to be rounded off or splayed or cut off to such height and to such extent as he may determine, and may acquire such portion of the site at the corner as he may consider necessary for public convenience or amenity.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_340\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/101363048/\">340.</a> Provisions as to buildings and works on either side of new streets.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_340.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/115233413/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The erection of any building on either side of a new street may be refused by the Commissioner unless and until such new street has been levelled, and wherever in the opinion of the Commissioner practicable, metalled or paved, drained, lighted and laid with a water main to his satisfaction.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_340.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/147208126/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The erection of any such building or the execution of any such work may be refused by the Commissioner if such building or any portion thereof or such work comes within the regular line of any street, the position and direction of which has been laid down by the Commissioner but which has not been actually constructed or if such building or any portion thereof or such work is in contravention of any building or any other scheme or plan prepared under this Act or any other law for the time being in force.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_341\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/14990307/\">341.</a> Period for completion of building or work.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner, when sanctioning the erection of a building or execution of a work, shall specify a reasonable period after the commencement of the building or work within which the building or work is to be completed and if the building or work is not completed within the period so specified, it shall not be continued thereafter without fresh sanction obtained in the manner hereinbefore provided, unless the Commissioner on application made therefor has allowed an extension of that period.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_342\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/79089254/\">342.</a> Prohibition against use of inflammable materials for building, etc, without permission.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- In such areas as may be specified by bye-laws made in this behalf, no roof, verandah, pandal or wall of a building or no shed or fence shall be constructed or reconstructed of cloth, grass leaves, mats or other inflammable materials except with the written permission of the Commissioner, nor shall any such roof, verandah, pandal, wall, shed or fence constructed or re-constructed in any year be retained in a subsequent year except with fresh permission obtained in this behalf.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_343\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/148967546/\">343.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1961, section 16, for section 343 (w.e.f. 12-9-1961).]</span> Order of demolition and stoppage of buildings and works in certain cases and appeal.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_343.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/3108158/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where the erection of any building or execution of any work has been commenced, or is being carried on, or has been completed without or contrary to the sanction referred to in section 336 or in contravention of any condition subject to which such sanction has been accorded or in contravention of any of the provisions of this Act or bye-laws made thereunder, the Commissioner may, in addition to any other action that may be taken under this Act, make an order directing that such erection or work shall be demolished by the person at whose instance the erection or work has been commenced or is being carried on or has been completed, within such period (not being less than five days and more than fifteen days from the date on which a copy of the order of demolition with a brief statement of the reasons therefor has been delivered to that person), as may be, specified in the order of demolition:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no order of demolition shall be made unless the person has been given by means of a notice served in such manner as the Commissioner may think fit, a reasonable opportunity of showing cause why such order shall not be made:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that where the erection or work has not been completed, the Commissioner may by the same order or by a separate order, whether made at the time of the issue of the notice under the first proviso or at any other time, direct the person to stop the erection or work until the expiry of the period within which an appeal against the order of demolition, if made, may be preferred under sub- section (2).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_343.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/104416017/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person aggrieved by an order of the Commissioner made under sub- section (1) may prefer an appeal against the order to [the Appellate Tribunal] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 3, for the \"Court of the district Judge of Delhi\" (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> within the period specified in the order for the demolition of the erection or work to which it relates.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_343.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/185251411/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where an appeal is preferred under sub-section (2) against an order of demolition [the Appellate Tribunal may, subject to the provisions of sub-section (3) of section 347C] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 3, for the \"court of the district judge\" may (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> stay the enforcement of that order on such terms, if any, and for such period, as it may think fit:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that where the erection of any building or execution of any work has not been completed at the time of the making of the order of demolition, no order staying the enforcement of the order of demolition shall be made by [the Appellate Tribunal unless security, sufficient in the opinion of the said Tribunal] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 3, for the \"court of hte district judge unless security, sufficient in the opinion of the court\" (w.e.f. 10-12-1985.)]</span> has been given by the appellant for not proceeding, with such erection or work pending the disposal of the appeal.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_343.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/73398140/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[No court] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 3, for \"save as provided in this seciton, no court\" (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> shall entertain any suit, application-or order proceeding for injunction or other relief against the Commissioner to restrain him from taking any action or making any order in pursuance of the provisions of this section.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_343.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/27932133/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[Subject to an order made by the Administrator on appeal under section 347D, every order made by the Appellate Tribunal on appeal under this section, and subject to the orders of the Administrator and the Appellate Tribunal on appeal] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by act 42 of 1984, section 3, for \"Every order made by the court of the district judge on appeal and subject only to such order\" (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span>, the order of demolition made by the Con iissioner shall be final and conclusive.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_343.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/68035102/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where no appeal has been preferred against an order of demolition made by the Commissioner under sub-section (1) or where an order of demolition made by the Commissioner under that sub-section [has been confirmed on appeal, whether with or without variation, by the Appellate Tribunal in a case where no appeal has been preferred against the order of the Appellate Tribunal, and by the Administrator in a case where an appeal has been preferred against the order of the Appellate Tribunal] the person against whom the order has been made shall comply with the order within the period specified therein, or as the case may be, within the period, if any fixed by [the Appellate Tribunal or the Administrator] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 3, for \"has been confirmed on appeal, whether with or without variation\" (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> on appeal and on the failure of the person to comply with the order within such period, the Commissioner may himself cause the erection or the work to which the order relates to be demolished and the expenses of such demolition shall be recoverable from such person as an arrear of tax under this Act.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_344\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/57760405/\">344.</a> Order of stoppage of buildings or works in certain cases.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_344.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/129238800/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where the erection of any building or execution of any work has been commenced or is being carried on (but has not been completed) without or contrary to the sanction referred to in section 336 or in contravention of any condition subject to which such sanction has been accorded or in contravention of any provisions of this Act or bye-laws made thereunder, the Commissioner may in addition to any other action that may be taken under this Act, by order require the person at whose instance the building or the work has been commenced or is being carried on to stop the same forthwith.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_344.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/147453974/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[If an order made by the Commissioner under section 343 or under sub-section (1) of this section directing any person to stop the erection of any building or execution of any work is not complied with,] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1961, section 17, for the words If such order is not complied with forthwith (w.e.f. 12-9-1961.)]</span> the Commissioner may require any police officer to remove such person and all his assistants and workmen from the premises [or to seize any construction material, tool, machinery, scaffolding or other things used in the erection of any building or execution of any work] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1984, section 4 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985).]</span> within such time as may be specified in the requisition and such police officer shall comply with the requisition accordingly.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_344.2A\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/41183003/\">(2A)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[ Any of the things caused to be seized by the Commissioner under sub-section (2) shall be disposed of by him in the manner specified in section 326.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 984, section 4 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_344.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/147301250/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">After the requisition under sub-section (2) has been complied with, the Commissioner may, if he thinks fit, depute by a written order a police officer or a municipal officer or other municipal employee to watch the premises in order to ensure that the erection of the building or the execution of the work is not continued.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_344.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/107315695/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where a police officer or a municipal officer or other municipal employee has been deputed under sub-section (3) to watch the premises, the cost of such deputation shall be paid by the person at whose instance such erection or execution is being continued or to whom notice under sub-section (1) was given and shall be recoverable from such person as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_345\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/5540885/\">345.</a> Power of Commissioner to require alteration of work.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_345.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/161319104/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may at any time during the erection of any building or execution of any work or at any time [after the completion thereof by a written notice of not less than seven days] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 5, for \"within three months after the completion thereof, by a written notice\" (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> specify any matter in respect of which such erection or execution is without or contrary to the sanction referred to in section 336 or is in contravention of any condition of such sanction or any of the provisions of this Act or any bye-laws made thereunder and require the person who gave the notice under section 333 or section 334 or the owner of such building or work either\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_345.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/64327334/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to make such alterations as may be specified in the said notice with the object of bringing the building or work in conformity with the said sanction, condition or provisions, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_345.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/136804317/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to show cause why such alterations should not be made, within a period stated in the notice.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_345.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/118519712/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the person or the owner does not show cause as aforesaid, he shall be bound to make the alterations specified in the notice.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"
