id=\"section_345.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/103557345/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the person or the owner shows cause as aforesaid, the Commissioner shall by an order either cancel the notice issued under sub-section (1) or confirm the same subject to such modifications as he thinks fit.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_345A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/122009478/\">345A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1984, section 6 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span>Power to seal unauthorised constructions.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_345A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/53744202/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">It shall be lawful for the Commissioner, at any time, before or after making an order of demolition under section 343 or of the stoppage of the erection of any building or execution of any work under section 343 or under section 344, to make an order directing the sealing of such erection or work or of the premises in which such erection or work is being carried on or has been completed in the manner prescribed by rules, for the purpose of carrying out the provisions of this Act, or for preventing any dispute as to the nature and extent of such erection or work.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_345A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/57445590/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where any erection or work or any premises in which any erection or work is being carried on, has or have been sealed, the Commissioner may, for the purpose of demolishing such erection or work in accordance with the provisions of this Act, order such seal to be removed.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_345A.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/22660181/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall remove such seal except\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_345A.3.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/64187465/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">under an order made by the Commissioner under sub-section (2); or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_345A.3.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/140231493/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">under an order of an Appellate Tribunal or the Administrator, made in an appeal under this Act.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_346\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/3084115/\">346.</a> Completion certificates.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_346.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/59699340/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every person who employs a licensed architect or engineer or a person approved by the Commissioner to design or erect a building or execute any work shall, within one month after the completion of the erection of the building or execution of the work, deliver or send or cause to be delivered or sent to the Commissioner a notice in writing of such completion accompanied by a certificate in the form prescribed by bye-laws made in this behalf and shall give to the Commissioner all necessary facilities for the inspection of such building or work.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_346.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/167862947/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall occupy or permit to be occupied any such building or use or permit to be used any building or a part thereof effected by any such work until permission has been granted by the Commissioner in this behalf in accordance with bye-laws made under this Act:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that if the Commissioner fails within a period of thirty days after the receipt of the notice of completion to communicate his refusal to grant such permission, such permission shall be deemed to have been granted.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_347\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/9494205/\">347.</a> Restrictions on uses of buildings.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall, without the written permission of the Commissioner, or otherwise than in conformity with the conditions, if any, of such permission\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/163191486/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">use or permit to be used for human habitation any part of a building not originally erected or authorised to be used for that purpose or not used for that purpose before any alteration has been made therein by any work executed in accordance with the provisions of this Act and the bye-laws made thereunder;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/17883934/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">change or allow the change of the use of any land or building;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98213536/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">convert or allow the conversion of one kind of tenement into another kind.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_347A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/124320807/\">347A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1984, section 7 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> Appellate Tribunal.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/42214479/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall, by notification in the Official Gazette, constitute one or more Appellate Tribunals with headquarters at Delhi, for deciding appeals preferred under section 343 or section 347B.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/65984029/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An Appellate Tribunal shall consist of one person to be appointed by the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> on such terms and conditions of service as may be prescribed by rules.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347A.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/83276144/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A person shall not be qualified for appointment as the presiding officer of an Appellate Tribunal unless he is, or has been, a district judge or an additional district judge or has, for at least ten years, held a judicial office in India.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347A.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/49336585/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, if it so thinks fit, appoint one or more persons having special knowledge of, or experience in, the matters involved in such appeals, to act as assessors to advise the Appellate Tribunal in the proceedings before it, but no advice of the assessors shall be binding on the Appellate Tribunal.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347A.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/145408286/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall, by notification in the Official Gazette, define the territorial limits within which an Appellate Tribunal shall exercise its jurisdiction, and where different Appellate Tribunals have jurisdiction over the same territorial limits, the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall also provide for the distribution and allocation of work to be performed by such Tribunals.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347A.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/84671212/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">For the purpose of enabling it to discharge its functions under this Act, every Appellate Tribunal shall have a Registrar and such other staff on such terms and conditions of service as may be prescribed by rules:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Registrar and staff may be employed jointly for all or any number of such Tribunals in accordance with the rules.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_347B\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/34015011/\">347B.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1984, section 7 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> Appeals against certain orders or notices issued under the Act.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347B.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/135361311/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person aggrieved by any of the following orders made or notices issued under this Act, may prefer an appeal against such order or notice to the Appellate Tribunal, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347B.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a demolition of any street under section 314;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347B.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/189411992/\">(c)</a></span><span sanction the erection of any building or the execution of any work under section 336;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347B.1.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a 337;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347B.1.h\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/152705986/\">(h)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">an order cancelling a sanction under section 338;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347B.1.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a for the acquisition of any portion of a site, under section 339;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347B.1.j\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a 340;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347B.1.k\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/154065248/\">(k)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span unauthorised constructions under section 345A;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347B.1.n\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/88092359/\">(n)</a></span><span id=\"section_347B.1.o\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/160864248/\">(o)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">an order granting or refusing permission under section 347;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347B.1.p\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/113067067/\">(p)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any such other order or notice relating to or arising out of planned development under the provisions of this Act as may be prescribed by rules.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347B.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/74946460/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An appeal under this section shall be filed within thirty days from the date of the order or notice appealed against:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Appellate Tribunal may entertain an appeal after the expiry of the said period of thirty days if it is satisfied that there was sufficient cause for not filing it within that period.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347B.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/110055462/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An appeal to the Appellate Tribunal shall be made in such form and shall be accompanied by a copy of the order or notice appealed against and by such fees as may be prescribed by rules.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_347C\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/134361846/\">347C.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1984, section 7 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> Procedure of the Appellate Tribunal.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347C.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/55233341/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Appellate Tribunal may, after giving the parties to the appeal, an opportunity of being heard, pass such orders thereon as it thinks fit, confirming, modifying or annulling the order or notice appealed against or may refer the case back to the authority or officer against whose order or notice the appeal is filed, for a fresh order or notice, after taking additional evidence if necessary, or such other action as the Appellate Tribunal may specify.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347C.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/52849290/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Appellate Tribunal shall send a copy of every order passed by it to the parties to the appeal.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347C.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/85831069/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No Appellate Tribunal shall, in any appeal pending before it in respect of any order or notice under this Act, make an interim order (whether by way of injunction or stay) against [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or against any officer or servant of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> acting or purporting to act in his official capacity, unless an opportunity is given to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or its officer or servant to be heard in the matter:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the Appellate Tribunal may without giving an opportunity as aforesaid make an interim order as an exceptional measure if it is satisfied for reasons to be recorded by it in writing that it is necessary so to do for preventing any loss being caused to the person filing the appeal which cannot be adequately compensated in money:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that every such interim order shall, if it is not vacated earlier, cease to have effect on the expiry of a period of fourteen days from the date on which it is made unless before the expiry of that period, the Appellate Tribunal confirms or modifies that order after giving to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or its officer or servant an opportunity of being heard.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347C.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/182362631/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Subject to rules that may be made by the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" ]</span> in this behalf, the awarding of damages in and the costs of, and incidental to, any appeal before an Appellate Tribunal, shall be in its discretion and it shall have full power to determine by and to whom and to what extent and subject to what conditions, if any, such damages or costs are to be paid and to give, in its order disposing of an appeal, necessary directions for the purposes aforesaid.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347C.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/178541793/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An order of the Appellate Tribunal made under this section may be executed or caused to be executed by it on the application of the person in whose favour the order has been made.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347C.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/7893840/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In hearing and deciding an appeal or in the execution of an order, an Appellate Tribunal shall follow such procedure as may be prescribed by rules.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347C.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/104311183/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every Appellate Tribunal, shall, in addition to the powers conferred on it under this Act, have the same powers as are vested in a Civil Court while trying a suit under the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 (5 of 1908), in respect of the following matters, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347C.7.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/125116305/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">summoning and enforcing the attendance of persons and examining them on oath;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347C.7.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/48785223/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">requiring the discovery and inspection of documents;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347C.7.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/80054932/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">receiving evidence on affidavits;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347C.7.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/76118280/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">requisitioning any public record or copies thereof from any court or office;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347C.7.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/72853033/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">issuing commissions for the examination of witnesses or documents; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_347C.7.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/103573802/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any other matter which may be prescribed by rules, and every proceeding of an Appellate Tribunal in hearing or deciding an appeal or in connection with execution of its order, shall be deemed to be a judicial proceeding within the meaning of sections 193 and 228 and for the purpose of section 196, of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860), and every Appellate Tribunal shall be deemed to be a Civil Court for the purposes of section 195 and Chapter XXVI of the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 (2 of 1974).</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_347D\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/74449797/\">347D.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1984, section 7 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> Appeal against orders of Appellate Tribunal.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347D.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/114409758/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An appeal shall lie to the Administrator against an order of the Appellate Tribunal, made in an appeal under section 343 or section 347B, confirming, modifying or annulling an order made or notice issued under this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347D.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/125255912/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The provisions of sub-sections (2) and (3) of section 347B and section 347C and the rules made thereunder, shall, so far as may be, apply to the filing and disposal of an appeal under this section as they apply to the filing and disposal of an appeal under those sections.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347D.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/13934662/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An order of the Administrator on an appeal under this section, and subject only to such order, an order of the Appellate Tribunal under section 347B, and subject to such orders of the Administrator or an Appellate Tribunal, an order or notice referred to in sub-section (1) of that section, shall be final.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_347E\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/118390204/\">347E.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1984, section 7 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> Bar of jurisdiction of courts.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347E.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/100523399/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">After the commencement of section 7 of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 1984, no court shall entertain any suit, application or other proceedings in respect of any order or notice appealable under section 343 or section 347B and no such order or notice shall be called in question otherwise than by preferring an appeal under those sections.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_347E.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/92452354/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-section (1), every suit, application or other proceeding pending in any court immediately before the commencement of section 7 of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 1984, in respect of any order or notice appealable under section 343 or section 347B, shall continue to be dealt with and disposed of by that court as if the said section had not been brought into force.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_348\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/125050952/\">348.</a> Removal of dangerous buildings.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_348.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/86056818/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If it appears to the Commissioner at any time that any building is in a ruinous condition, or likely to fall, or in any way dangerous to any person occupying, resorting to or passing by such building or any other building or place in the neighbourhood of such building, the Commissioner may, by order in writing, require the owner or occupier of such building to demolish, secure or repair such building or do one or more of such things within such period as may be specified in the order, so as to prevent all cause of danger therefrom.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_348.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/151890528/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may also, it he thinks fit, require such owner or occupier by the said order either forthwith or before proceeding to demolish, secure or repair the building, to set up a proper and sufficient hoard or fence for the protection of passers-by and other persons, with a convenient platform and hand-rail wherever practicable to serve as a foot-way for passengers outside of such board or fence.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_348.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/23800480/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If it appears to the Commissioner that danger from a building which is in a ruinous condition or likely to fall is imminent, he may, before making the order aforesaid, fence off, demolish, secure or repair the said building or take such steps as may be necessary to prevent the danger.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_348.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12954572/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the owner or occupier of the building does not comply with the order within the period specified therein, the Commissioner shall take such steps in relation to the building as to prevent all cause of danger therefrom.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_348.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/61014657/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">All expenses incurred by the Commissioner in relation to any building under this section shall be recoverable from the owner or occupier thereof as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_349\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/187674540/\">349.</a> Power to order building to be vacated in certain circumstances.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_349.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/32395344/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may by order in writing direct that any building which in his opinion is in a dangerous condition or is not provided with sufficient means of egress in case of fire or is occupied in contravention of section 346 be vacated forthwith or within such period as may be specified in the order:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that at the time of making such order the Commissioner shall record a brief statement of the reasons therefor.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_349.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/183288206/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any person fails to vacate the building in pursuance of such order the Commissioner may direct any police officer to remove such person from the building and the police officer shall comply with such direction accordingly.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_349.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/33757863/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall, on the application of any person who has vacated, or been removed from any building in pursuance of an order made by him, re-instate such person in the building on the expiry of the period for which the order has been in force according as the circumstances prevailing at that time permit.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_349A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/130181549/\">349A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 99 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Power of the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> to make bye-laws.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_349A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/81848439/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, by notification in the Official Gazette, make bye-laws for carrying out the provisions of this Chapter:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that all bye-laws made by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> under paragraph F of sub-section (1) of section 481 of this Act as it stood immediately before the commencement of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 1993 and in force immediately before such commencement, shall be deemed to have been made under the provisions of this section and shall continue to have the same force and effect after such commencement until it is amended, varied, rescinded or superseded under the provisions of this section.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_349A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/75257090/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In particular and without prejudice to the generality of the foregoing power, such by-laws may provide for all or any of the following matters, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/184151644/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the regulation or restriction of the use of sites for buildings for different areas;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/73524931/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the regulation or restriction of buildings in different areas;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/88403057/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the form of notice of erection of any building or execution of any work and the fee in respect of the same;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/42676937/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the plans and documents to be submitted together with such notice and the information and further information to be furnished;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/146619940/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the level and width of foundation, level of lowest floor and stability of structure;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/55481532/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the construction of buildings and the materials to be used in the construction of buildings;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/31705444/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the height of buildings whether absolute or relative to the width of streets or to different areas;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.h\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/142281901/\">(h)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the number and height of storeys composing a building and the height of rooms and the dimensions of room intended for human habitation;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/137090259/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the provision of open spaces, external and internal, and adequate means of light and ventilation;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.j\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/38024097/\">(j)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the provision of means of egress in case of fire, fire-escapes and water lifting devices;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.k\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/104370480/\">(k)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the provision of secondary means of access for the removal of house refuse;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.l\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/145407943/\">(l)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the materials and methods of construction of external and party-walls, roofs and floors;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.m\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/87282821/\">(m)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the position, materials and methods of construction of hearths, smoke-escapes, chimneys, stair-cases, latrines, drains and cesspools;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.n\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/39614519/\">(n)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the provision of lifts;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.o\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/176978878/\">(o)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the paving of yards;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.p\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/128184631/\">(p)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the restriction on the use of inflammable materials in buildings;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.q\"><span sites;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.r\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/167605674/\">(r)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the measures to be taken to protect buildings from damp arising from sub-soil;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.s\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/7059760/\">(s)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the wells, tanks and cisterns and pumps for the supply of water for human consumption in connection with buildings;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.t\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/28783015/\">(t)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">in the case of wells, the dimensions of the well, the manner of enclosing it and if the well is intended for drinking purposes, the means which shall be used to prevent pollution of the water;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.u\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/153807099/\">(u)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the supervision of buildings;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.v\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/74000873/\">(v)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the setting back of garages and shops from the regular line of a street;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_349A.2.w\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/32917134/\">(w)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the construction of portable structures and permission for such construction.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_349A.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/161554868/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The draft of the bye-laws referred to in sub-section (1) shall be forwarded to the Commissioner, who shall cause the same to be published in the Official Gazette for inviting objections and suggestions from the public within thirty days from the date of such publication.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_349A.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/113921800/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall forward the draft bye-laws to the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011. 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> along with his recommendations and the objections and suggestions received from the public, within three months of their publication in the Official Gazette.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_349A.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/38783792/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may issue such directions to the Commissioner as it thinks fit, for ensuring proper implementation of the bye-laws made under this section.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XVII<br/>Sanitation and Public Health</h2>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Conservancy and sanitation</span></span><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_350\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/77441677/\">350.</a> Provision for daily cleansing of streets and removal of rubbish and filth.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_350.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/51742611/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">For the purpose of securing the efficient scavenging and cleansing of all streets and premises, the Commissioner shall provide\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_350.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/162208240/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the daily surface-cleansing of all streets and the removal of the sweepings therefrom, and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_350.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/62460492/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the removal of the contents of all receptacles and depots and of the accumulations at all places provided or appointed by him under the provisions of this Act for the temporary deposit of rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_350.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/165552426/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may, by public notice, issue directions as to the time at which, the manner in which, and the conditions subject to which, any matter referred to in sub-section (1) may be removed along a street or may be deposited or otherwise disposed of.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_351\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/144895356/\">351.</a> Rubbish, etc, to be the property of [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- All matters deposited in public receptacles, depots and places provided or appointed under section 352 and all matters collected by municipal employees or contractors in pursuance of section 350 and section 355 shall be the property of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_352\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/163078570/\">352.</a> Provision or appointment of receptacles, depots and places for rubbish, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-blockList\"><span class=\"akn-listIntroduction\">\u0097 (1) The Commissioner shall\u0097</span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(a)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">provide or appoint in proper and convenient situations public receptacles, depots or places for the temporary deposit of rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter and for the final disposal of rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter;</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(b)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">provide dustbins for the temporary deposit of rubbish;</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(c)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">provide vehicles or other suitable means for the removal of rubbish and offensive matter; and</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(d)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">provide covered vehicles or vessels for the removal of filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter.</span></span></span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_352.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/129953469/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Different receptacles, depots or places may be provided or appointed for the temporary deposit or final disposal of any of the matter specified in sub-section (1).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_352.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/43017010/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall make adequate provision for preventing receptacles, depots, places, dustbins, vehicles and vessels referred to in sub-section (1) from becoming sources of nuisance.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_353\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/196665965/\">353.</a> Duty of owners and occupiers to collect and deposit rubbish, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\u0097 It shall be the duty of the owners and occupiers of all premises\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_353.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/180770029/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to have the premises swept and cleaned;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_353.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/182720334/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to cause all filth, rubbish and other polluted and obnoxious matter to be collected from their respective premises and to be deposited at such times as the Commissioner, by public notice prescribes, in public receptacles, depots or places provided or appointed under section 352 for the temporary deposit or final disposal thereof;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_353.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/77543139/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to provide receptacles of the type and in the manner prescribed by the Commissioner for the collection therein of all filth, rubbish and other polluted and obnoxious matter from such premises and to keep such receptacles in good condition and repair.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_354\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/84684970/\">354.</a> Collection and removal of filth and polluted matter.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- It shall be the duty of the owner and occupier of every premises situate in any portion of Delhi [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Certain words omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 100 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> or in which there is not a latrine, or urinal connected by a drain with a municipal drain, to cause all filth and polluted and obnoxious matter accumulating upon such premises to be collected and removed to the nearest receptacle or depot provided for this purpose under section 352 at such times, in such vehicle or vessel by such route and with such precautions as the Commissioner may by public notice prescribe.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_355\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/42452202/\">355.</a> Collection and removal of filth and polluted matter through municipal agency.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [(1) It shall be lawful for the Commissioner to take or cause to be taken measures for the daily collection, removal and disposal of all filth and polluted and obnoxious matters from latrines, urinals and cesspools not connected by a drain with a municipal drain from all premises situate in any portion of [the area of the Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 101, for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>]</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_355.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/79306525/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In such portion of [the area of the Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"Delhi\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and in any premises wherever situate in which there is a latrine, or urinal connected with a municipal drain, it shall not be lawful, except with the written permission of the Commissioner, for any person who is not employed by or on behalf of the Commissioner, to discharge any of the duties of scavengers.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_356\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/6668320/\">356.</a> Removal of rubbish, etc., accumulated on premises used as factories, workshops, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may, if he thinks fit,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_356.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/8083376/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">by written notice require the owner or occupier of any premises used for carrying on any manufacture, trade or business or used as a factory, workshop, trade premises or market or in any way so that rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter are accumulated in large quantities, to collect all such rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter accumulating thereon and to remove the same at such times and in such carts or receptacles and by such routes as may be specified in the notice to a depot or place provided or appointed under section 352, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_356.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/129801465/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">after giving such owner or occupier notice of his intention, cause all rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter accumulated in such premises to be removed, and charge the said owner or occupier for such removal such fee as may, with the sanction of the Standing Committee, be specified in the notice issued under clause (a).</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_357\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/53162639/\">357.</a> Prohibition against accumulation of rubbish, etc.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_357.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/115258591/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No owner or occupier of any premises shall keep or allow to be kept for more than twenty-four hours or otherwise than in a receptacle approved by the Commissioner, any rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter on such premises or any place belonging thereto or neglect to employ proper means to remove such rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter from, or to cleanse, such receptacle and to dispose of such rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter in the manner directed by the Commissioner, or fail to comply with any requisition of the Commissioner as to the construction, repair, pavement or cleansing of any latrine, or urinal on or belonging to the premises.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_357.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/141959504/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No owner or occupier shall allow the water of any sink, drain, latrine or urinal or any rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter to run down on or to, or be thrown or put upon, any street or into any drain in or along the side of any street except in such manner as shall prevent any avoidable nuisance from any such water, rubbish, filth or other polluted and obnoxious matter.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_357.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/62445958/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, after due provision has been made in this respect under the foregoing provisions of this Chapter for the deposit and removal of the same\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_357.3.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/130522083/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">deposit any rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter in any street or on the verandah of any building or on any unoccupied ground alongside any street or on the bank of a water course; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_357.3.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/76583934/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">deposit any filth or other polluted and obnoxious matter in any dustbin or in any vehicle not intended for the removal of the same; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_357.3.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/147346782/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">deposit rubbish in any vehicle or vessel intended for the removal of filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_358\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/21685743/\">358.</a> Commissioner's power to get premises scavenged and cleansed.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If any premises are not properly and regularly scavenged or cleansed or are in a filthy and unwholesome condition, the Commissioner may cause them to be scavenged and cleansed and recover the expenses from the owner or, as the case may be, occupier as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_359\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/53712553/\">359.</a> Public latrines, urinals, etc.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_359.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/73164668/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall provide and maintain in proper and convenient places a sufficient number of public latrines and urinals.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_359.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/140956190/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Such public latrines and urinals shall be so constructed as to provide separate compartments for each sex and not to be a nuisance, and shall be provided with all necessary conservancy establishments, and shall regularly be cleansed and kept in proper order.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Latrines and urinals</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_360\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/36625813/\">360.</a> Construction of latrines and urinals.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_360.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/123337162/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">It shall not be lawful to construct any latrine or urinal for any premises except with the written permission of the Commissioner and in accordance with such terms not inconsistent with the provisions of this Act or any bye-laws made thereunder as he may prescribe.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_360.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/82665810/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In prescribing any such terms the Commissioner may determine in such case\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_360.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/27901405/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">whether the premises shall be served by the service system or by the flush system or partly by the one and partly by the other; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_360.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/137751923/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">what shall be site or position of each latrine or urinal.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_360.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/166550894/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any latrine or urinal is constructed on any premises in contravention of the foregoing provisions, the Commissioner may, after giving not less than ten days' notice to the owner or occupier of such premises, alter, reconstruct, close or demolish such latrine or urinal and the expenditure incurred by the Commissioner in so doing shall be recoverable from the owner or occupier as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_361\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/20839118/\">361.</a> Latrines and urinals, etc., in new buildings.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_361.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/177554827/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">It shall not be lawful to erect any building or execute any work on or in relation to such building without providing such latrine accommodation and urinal accommodation and accommodation for bathing or for washing clothes and utensils on each floor of such building as the Commissioner may prescribe.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_361.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/178184314/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In prescribing any such accommodation the Commissioner may determine in each case\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_361.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98928224/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">whether such building shall be served by the service system or by the flush system or partly by the one and partly by the other;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_361.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/80424732/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">what shall be the site or position of each latrine, urinal, bathing or washing place or site and their number of each floor and their clear internal dimensions.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_361.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/60194841/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">It shall not be lawful to erect a residential building composed of separate tenements on the flat system without providing at least one latrine and one bathing or washing place for servants on the ground floor of such building or at any other suitable place in the same premises.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_361.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/108234689/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In this section the expression \"to erect a building\" has the same meaning as in section 331.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_362\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/92460778/\">362.</a> Latrines and urinals for labourers, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Every person employing workmen, labourers or other persons exceeding twenty in number shall provide and maintain for the separate use of persons of each sex so employed, latrines and urinals of such description and number as the Commissioner may by notice require and within such time as may be fixed in the notice and shall keep the same in clean and proper order.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_363\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/137095727/\">363.</a> Provision of latrines and urinals for markets, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may by notice require any owner or manager of a market, cart stand, cattle shed, theatre, railway station and other place of public resort within such time as may be specified in such notice to provide and maintain for the separate use of persons of each sex, latrines of such description and number and in such position as may be specified and to keep the same in clean and proper order.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_364\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/25554281/\">364.</a> Other provisions as to private latrines.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may, by written notice\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_364.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/143900895/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">require the owner or other person having the control of any private latrine or urinal not to put the same to public use; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_364.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/50217523/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">require the owner or other person having the control of such private latrine or urinal which in the opinion of the Commissioner constitutes a nuisance, to remove the latrine or the urinal; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_364.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/88461492/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">require any person having the control whether as owner, lessee or occupier of any land or building\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to have any latrines provided for the same shut out by a sufficient roof, wall or fence from the view of persons passing by or dwelling in the neighbourhood; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to cleanse in such manner as the Commissioner may prescribe in the notice any latrine or urinal belonging to the land or building; or</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_364.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/132741676/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where any premises intended or used for human habitation are without any latrine or urinal accommodation or are provided with insufficient latrine or urinal accommodation, require the owner, lessee or occupier of such premises to provide such or such additional latrine or urinal accommodation as he may prescribe, if necessary by causing any part of such premises to be vacated and demolished in accordance with bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Removal of congested buildings and buildings unfit for human habitation</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_365\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/115732957/\">365.</a> Removal of congested buildings.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_365.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/153404258/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where it appears to the Commissioner that any block of buildings is in an unhealthy condition by reason of the manner in which the buildings are crowded together, or of the narrowness, closeness, or faulty arrangement of streets, or of the want of proper drainage and ventilation, or of the impracticability of cleansing the buildings or other similar cause, he shall cause the block to be inspected to by Municipal Health Officer and the Municipal Engineer who shall make a report in writing to him regarding the sanitary condition of the block.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_365.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/34255294/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If upon receipt of such report the Commissioner considers that the sanitary condition of the block is likely to cause risk of disease to the inhabitants of the buildings or of the neighbourhood or otherwise to endanger the public health, he shall with the approval of the Standing Committee select the buildings which in his opinion should wholly or in part be removed in order to abate the unhealthy condition of the block and may thereupon by notice in writing require the owners of such buildings to remove them within such period as may be specified in the notice:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that before issuing the notice reasonable opportunity should be afforded to the owners to show cause why the buildings should not be removed:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that the Commissioner shall make compensation to the owners for any buildings so removed which may have been erected under proper authority.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_365.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/176101851/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If a notice under sub-section (2) requiring any owner of a building to remove it is not complied with, then, after the expiration of the time, specified in the notice the Commissioner may himself remove the building required to be removed by the notice and recover from owner of the building the expenses of such removal as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_366\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/155923817/\">366.</a> Power of Commissioner to require improvement of buildings unfit for human habitation.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_366.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/3819106/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where the Commissioner upon information in his possession is satisfied that any building is in any respect unfit for human habitation, he may, unless in his opinion the building is not capable at a reasonable expense of being rendered fit, serve upon the owner of the building a notice requiring him within such time not being less than thirty days as may be specified in the notice to execute the works of improvement specified therein and stating that in his opinion those works will render the building fit for human habitation.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_366.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/179544832/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In addition to serving a notice under this section on the owner the Commissioner may serve a copy of the notice on any other person having an interest in the building whether as a lessee, mortgagee or otherwise.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_366.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/191895811/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In determining whether a building can be rendered fit for human habitation at a reasonable expense regard shall be had to the estimated cost of the work necessary to render it so fit and the value which it is estimated that the building will have when the works are completed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_367\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/74547953/\">367.</a> Enforcement of notice requiring execution of works of improvement.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If a notice under section 366 requiring the owner of the building to execute works of improvement is not complied with, then after the expiration of the time specified in the notice the Commissioner may himself do the works required to be done by the notice and recover the expenses incurred in connection therewith as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_368\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/118885454/\">368.</a> Power of Commissioner to order demolition of buildings unfit for human habitation.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_368.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/150155496/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where the Commissioner upon any information in his possession is satisfied that any building is unfit for human habitation and is not capable at a reasonable expense of being rendered so fit he shall serve upon the owner of the building and upon any other person having an interest in the building, whether as a lessee, mortgagee or otherwise a notice to show cause within such time as may be specified in the notice as to why an order of demolition of the building should not be made.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_368.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/133756396/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any of the person upon whom a notice has been served under sub-section (1), appears in pursuance thereof before the Commissioner and gives an undertaking to him that such person shall, within a period specified by the Commissioner, execute such works of improvement in relation to the building as will, in the opinion of the Commissioner, render the building fit for human habitation or an undertaking that the building shall not be used for human habitation until the Commissioner on being satisfied that it has been rendered fit for that purpose, cancels the undertaking, the Commissioner shall not make an order of demolition of the building.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_368.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/147759027/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If no such undertaking as is mentioned in sub-section (2) is given or if in a case where any such undertaking has been given, any work of improvement to which the undertaking relates is not carried out within the specified period, or the building is at any time used in contravention of the terms of the undertaking, the Commissioner shall forthwith make an order of demolition of the building requiring that the building shall be vacated within a period to be specified in the order not being less than thirty days from the date of the order, and that it shall be demolished within six weeks after the expiration of that period.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_368.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/178742115/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where an order of demolition of building under this section has been made, the owner of the building or any other person having an interest therein, shall demolish that building within the time specified in that behalf by the order, and if the building is not demolished within that time, the Commissioner shall demolish the building and sell the materials thereof.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_368.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/16637441/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any expenses incurred by the Commissioner under sub-section (4) if not satisfied out of the proceeds of the sale of materials of the building shall be recovered from the owner of the building or any other person having an interest therein as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_368.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/174707614/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In determining for the purposes of section 366 and this section whether a building is unfit for human habitation, regard shall be had to its condition in respect of the following matters, that is to say,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.6.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/137899850/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">repair;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.6.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/119515123/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">stability;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.6.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/10566106/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">freedom from damp;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.6.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/53354374/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">natural light and air;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.6.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/101650662/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">water supply;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.6.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/123112640/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">drainage and sanitary conveniences;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.6.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/153459649/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">facilities for storage preparation and cooking of food and for the disposal of rubbish, filth and other polluted matter, and the building shall be deemed to be unfit as aforesaid if it is so far defective in one or more of the said matters that it is not reasonably suitable for occupation in that condition.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_368.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/136882828/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">For the purposes of section 366, section 367 and this section, \"work of improvement\" in relation to a building includes any one or more of the following works, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.7.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/123067113/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">necessary repairs;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.7.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/194436593/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">structural alterations;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.7.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/2746994/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">provision of light points and water taps;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.7.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/154236481/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">construction of drains, open or covered;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.7.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/163977408/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">provision of latrines and urinals;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.7.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/139701008/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">provision of additional or improved fixtures and fittings;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.7.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/194618872/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">opening up or paving of courtyard;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.7.h\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/135549296/\">(h)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">removal of rubbish, filth and other polluted and obnoxious matter;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_368.7.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/151199992/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any other work including the demolition of any building or any part thereof which, in the opinion of the Commissioner, is necessary for executing any of the works specified above.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_368.8\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/156231396/\">(8)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The provisions of section 365, section 366, section 367 and this section shall not apply in relation to any building in any area which has been declared to be a slum area under the Slum Areas (Improvement and Clearance) Act, 1956 (96 of 1956).</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_369\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/18317300/\">369.</a> Insanitary huts and sheds.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Where the Commissioner upon any information in his possession is satisfied that any hut or shed used as a dwelling house or as a stable or for any other purpose, is likely, by reason of its being constructed without a plinth or upon a plinth of insufficient height or without proper means of drainage or on account of the impracticability of scavenging and cleansing it or owing to the manner in which it and other huts or sheds are crowded together, to cause risk of disease to the inmates thereof or to the inhabitants of the neighbourhood, or is for any reason likely to endanger public health or safety, he may by notice in writing require the owner or occupier of the hut or shed or the owner or occupier of the land on which the hut or shed stands to remove or alter the hut or shed or carry out such improvement thereof as the Commissioner may deem necessary within such time as may be specified in the notice.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Regulation of washing by washermen</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_370\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/72597817/\">370.</a> Prohibition against washing by washermen.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_370.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/61376709/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may, by public notice, prohibit the washing of clothes by washermen in the exercise of their callings except at such places as he may appoint for the purpose.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_370.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/168789876/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When any such prohibition has been made, no person who is by calling a washerman shall in contravention of such prohibition wash clothes except for himself or for personal and family service or for hire on or within the premises of the hirer, at any place other than a place appointed under sub-section (1).</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Prevention of dangerous diseases</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_371\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/106902515/\">371.</a> Obligation to give information of dangerous disease.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Any person being in charge of, or in attendance, whether as a medical practitioner or otherwise, upon any person whom he knows or has reason to believe to be suffering from a dangerous disease, or being the owner, lessee, or occupier of any building in which he knows that any such person is so suffering shall forthwith give information respecting the existence of such disease to the Municipal Health Officer.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_372\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/179628751/\">372.</a> Removal to hospital of patients suffering from dangerous disease.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_372.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/151972041/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When any person suffering from any dangerous disease is found to be\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_372.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/57193095/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">without proper lodging or accommodation, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_372.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/39963880/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">living in a room or house which he neither owns or pays rent for nor occupies as the guest or relative of any person who owns, or pays rent for it, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_372.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/105432970/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">living in a sarai, hotel, boarding house or other public hotel, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_372.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/18839764/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">lodged in premises occupied by members of two or more families, the Commissioner or any person authorised by him in this behalf, may on the advice of any medical officer of the rank not inferior to that of an assistant surgeon remove the patient to any hospital or place at which persons suffering from such disease are received for medical treatment and may anything necessary for such removal.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_372.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/67253388/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall, if required by the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, erect an infectious diseases hospital of such type and dimension as that Government may direct.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_373\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/132237002/\">373.</a> Disinfection of buildings and articles.</h3>\n<span
