class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Where the Commissioner is of opinion that the cleansing and disinfection of any building or part of a building or of any articles in such building or part which are likely to retain infection, or the renewal of flooring of any building or part of such building, and the renewal of plastering of the walls thereof, would tend to prevent or check the spread of any dangerous disease; he may, by notice in writing, require the owner or occupier to cleanse and disinfect the said building, part or articles, as the case may be, or to renew the said flooring and if necessary, the said plastering also within such time as may be specified in the notice:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that where in the opinion of the Commissioner the owner or occupier is from poverty or any other cause unable effectually to carry out any such requisition, the Commissioner may at the expense of the Municipal Fund cleanse and disinfect the building, part or articles, or, as the case may be, renew the flooring and if necessary, the plastering also.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_374\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/67271374/\">374.</a> Destruction of infectious huts or sheds.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_374.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/31498962/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where the destruction of any hut or shed is in the opinion of the Commissioner necessary to prevent the spread of any dangerous disease, the Commissioner may by notice in writing require the owner to destroy the hut or shed and the materials thereof within such time as may be specified in the notice.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_374.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/167142891/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where the Commissioner is satisfied that the destruction of any hut or shed is immediately necessary for the purpose of preventing the spread of any dangerous disease, he may order the owner or occupier of the hut or shed to destroy the same forthwith or may himself cause it to be destroyed after giving not less than six hours' notice to the owner or occupier.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_374.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/114783081/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Compensation may be paid by the Commissioner, in any case which he thinks fit, to any person who sustains substantial loss by the destruction of any such hut or shed, but, except as so allowed by the Commissioner, no claim for compensation shall lie for any loss or damage caused by any exercise of the power conferred by this section.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_375\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/87592293/\">375.</a> Means of disinfection.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_375.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/50345038/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_375.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/119370770/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">provide proper places with necessary attendants and apparatus for the disinfection of conveyances, clothing, bedding and other articles which have been exposed to infection;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_375.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/52693555/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">cause conveyances, clothing and other articles brought for disinfection to be disinfected either free of charge or on payment of such charges as he may fix.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_375.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/188671443/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may notify places at which articles of clothing, bedding and conveyances or other articles which have been exposed to infection shall be washed and if he does so, no person shall wash any such thing at any place not so notified without having previously disinfected such thing.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_375.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/8664675/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may direct the destruction of any clothing, bedding or other article likely to retain infection and may give such compensation as he thinks fit for any article so destroyed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_376\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/177682846/\">376.</a> Special measures in case of outbreak of dangerous or epidemic diseases.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_376.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/109138157/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In the event of Delhi or any part thereof being visited or threatened by an outbreak of any dangerous disease among the inhabitants thereof or of any epidemic disease among any animals therein, the Commissioner, if he thinks that the other provisions of this Act and the provisions of any other law for the time being in force are insufficient for the purpose, may, with the previous sanction of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> \u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_376.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/131651431/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">take such special measures, and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_376.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/131665947/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">by public notice, give such directions to be observed by the public or by any class or section of the public, as he thinks necessary to prevent the outbreak or spread of the disease:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that where in the opinion of the Commissioner immediate measures are necessary, he may take action without such sanction as aforesaid and if he does so, shall forthwith report such action to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_376.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/152816250/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall commit a breach of any direction given under sub-section (1) and if he does so he shall be deemed to have committed an offence under section 188 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860).</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_377\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/39452758/\">377.</a> Infected clothes not to be sent to washerman or to laundry.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_377.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/73003938/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A person shall not send or take to any washerman or to any laundry or place set apart for the exercise by washerman of their calling, for the purpose of being washed or to any place for the purpose of being cleansed, any cloth or other article which he knows to have been exposed to infection from a dangerous disease unless that cloth or article has been disinfected by or to the satisfaction of the Municipal Health Officer.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_377.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/141755022/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The occupier of any building in which a person is suffering from a dangerous disease shall, if required by the Municipal Health Officer, furnish to him the address of any washerman to whom or any laundry or other place to which clothes and other articles from the building have been, or will be, sent during the continuance of the disease, for purpose of being washed or cleaned.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_378\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/142328462/\">378.</a> Contamination and disinfection of public conveyance.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_378.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/72946381/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Whoever\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_378.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/17388299/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">uses a public conveyance while suffering from a dangerous disease, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_378.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/137241266/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">uses a public conveyance for the carriage of a person who is suffering from any disease, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_378.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/163734757/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">uses a public conveyance for the carriage of the corpse of a person who has died from any such disease, shall be bound to take proper precautions against the communication of the disease to other persons using or who may thereafter use the conveyance and to notify such use to the owner, driver or person in charge of the conveyance, and further report without delay to the Commissioner the number of the conveyance and the name of the person so notified.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_378.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/4293188/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where any person suffering from, or the corpse of any person who has died from, a dangerous disease has been carried in public conveyance which ordinarily plies in Delhi or any part thereof, the driver thereof shall forthwith report the fact to the Commissioner who shall forthwith cause the conveyance to be disinfected if that not already been done.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_378.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98841879/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No such conveyance shall be against brought into use until the Municipal Health Officer has granted a certificate stating that it can be used without causing risk of infection.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_378.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/85420851/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Whoever fails to make to the Commissioner any report which he is required to make under this section shall be guilty of an offence.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_379\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/51423144/\">379.</a> Driver of conveyance not bound to carry persons suffering from dangerous disease.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Notwithstanding anything contained in any law for the time being in force no owner, driver or person in charge of a public conveyance shall be bound to convey or to allow to be conveyed in such conveyance in or in the vicinity of Delhi any person suffering from a dangerous disease or the corpse of any person who has died from such disease unless and until such person pays or tenders a sum sufficient to cover any loss and expense which would ordinarily be incurred in disinfecting the conveyance.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_380\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/55417165/\">380.</a> Disinfection of buildings before letting the same.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_380.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/6411432/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where any building or part of a building is intended to be let in which any person has, within six weeks immediately preceding, been suffering from a dangerous disease, the person letting the building or part shall, before doing so, disinfect the same in such manner as the Commissioner may by general or special notice direct together with all articles therein liable to retain infection.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_380.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/156250591/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">For the purposes of this section the keeper of a hostel, lodging house or sarai shall be deemed to let to any person who is admitted as a guest therein that part of the building in which such person is permitted to reside.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_381\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/33112025/\">381.</a> Disposal of infected articles without disinfection.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_381.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12808511/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, without previous disinfection of the same, give, lend, sell, transmit or otherwise dispose of to another person any article or thing which he knows or has reason to believe has been exposed to contamination by any dangerous disease and is likely to be used in or taken into Delhi or any part thereof.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_382\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/13480934/\">382.</a> Prohibition of making or selling of food, etc, or washing of clothes by infected persons.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person while suffering from, or in circumstances in which he is likely to spread, any dangerous disease, shall\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_382.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/81945046/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">make, carry or offer for sale or take any part in the business of making, carrying or offering for sale, any article of food or drink or any medicine or drug for human consumption, or any article of clothing or bedding for personal use or wear; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_382.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/28215588/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">take any part in the business of the washing or carrying of clothes.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_383\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/20334857/\">383.</a> Power to restrict or prohibit sale of food or drink.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- When Delhi or any part thereof is visited or threatened by an outbreak of any dangerous disease the Commissioner may, by public notice, restrict in such manner or prohibit for such period as may be specified in the notice, the sale or preparation of any article of food or drink for human consumption specified in the notice or the sale of any flesh of any description of animal so specified.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_384\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/184564047/\">384.</a> Control over wells and tanks, etc.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_384.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/115791788/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the Commissioner is of opinion that the water in any well, tank or other place, is likely, if used for drinking, to endanger, or cause the spread of, any disease, he may\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_384.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/151072766/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">by public notice, prohibit the removal or use of such water for drinking; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_384.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/191274971/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">by notice in writing require the owner or person having control of such well, tank or place to take such steps as may be directed by the notice to prevent the public from having access to or using such water; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_384.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/88476449/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">take such other steps as he may consider expedient to prevent the outbreak or spread of any such disease.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_384.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/197007275/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In the event of Delhi or any part thereof being visited or threatened by an outbreak of a dangerous disease the Municipal Health Officer or any person authorised by him in this behalf may, without notice and at any time, inspect and disinfect any well, tank or other place from which water is, or is likely to be, taken for the purposes of drinking and may further take such steps as he may think fit to ensure the purity of the water or to prevent the use of the same for drinking purposes.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_385\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/73525758/\">385.</a> Duty of persons suffering from dangerous disease.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_385.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/195993305/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">knowing that he is suffering from a dangerous disease, expose other persons to the risk of infection by his presence or conduct in any public street or public place;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_385.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/170025696/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">having the care of a person whom he knows to be suffering from a dangerous disease, cause or permit that person to expose other persons to the risk of infection by his presence or conduct in any such street or place as aforesaid;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_385.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/78919889/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">place or cause to be placed in a dustbin or other receptacle for the deposit of rubbish, any matter which he knows to have been exposed to infection from a dangerous disease and which has not been disinfected properly;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_385.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/77650818/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">throw or cause to be thrown into any latrine or urinal any matter which he knows to have been exposed to infection from a dangerous disease and which has not been disinfected properly.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_386\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/93535124/\">386.</a> Disposal of infectious corpses where any person has died from any dangerous disease.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Where any person has died from any dangerous disease the Commissioner may, by notice in writing\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_386.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45811692/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">require any person having charge of the corpse to convey the same to mortuary thereafter to be disposed of in accordance with law, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_386.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/85033477/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">prohibit the removal of corpses from the place where death occurred except for the purpose of being burnt, buried or for being conveyed to a mortuary.</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Special conditions regarding essential services</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_387\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/1076060/\">387.</a> Conditions of service of sweepers and certain other class of persons employed in municipal service.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_387.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/104412460/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person being a sweeper employed by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall in the absence of any contract authorising him so to do and without reasonable cause, resign his employment or absent himself from his duty without having given one month's notice to the Commissioner or shall neglect or without reasonable cause refuse to perform his duties.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_387.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/110026021/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may by resolution direct that on or from such date as may be specified in the resolution, the provisions of this section shall apply in the case of any specified class of persons employed by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> whose functions are intimately concerned with public health or safety.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_388\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/141653556/\">388.</a> Conditions of service of sweepers employed for doing house scavenging.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No sweeper, being employed for doing house scavenging of any building shall discontinue to do such house scavenging without reasonable cause or without having fourteen days' notice to his employer.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Burning and burial grounds <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[omitted by act 10 of 2022]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_389\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/49835886/\">389.</a> Power to call for information regarding burning and burial grounds.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may, by notice in writing, require the owner or person in charge of any burning or burial ground to supply such information as may be specified in the notice concerning the condition, management, or position of such ground.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_390\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/104605500/\">390.</a> Permission for use of new burning or burial ground.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_390.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15520952/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No place which has not been used as a burning or burial ground before the commencement of this Act shall be so used without the permission in writing of the Commissioner.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_390.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/117198776/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Such permission may be granted subject to any conditions which the Commissioner may think fit to impose for the purpose of preventing any annoyance to, or danger to the health of, any persons residing in the neighbourhood.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_391\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/50568518/\">391.</a> Power to require closing of burning and burial grounds.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_391.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/52138534/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where the Commissioner, after making or causing to be made local enquiry is of opinion that any burning or burial ground has become offensive to, or dangerous to the health of, persons residing in the neighbourhood, he may, with the previous sanction of the Standing Committee, by notice in writing, require the owner or person in charge of such ground to close the same from such date as may be specified in the notice.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_391.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/187094071/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No corpse shall be burnt or buried at the burning or burial ground in respect of which a notice has been issued under this section.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_392\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/160091610/\">392.</a> Removal of corpses.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may by public notice prescribe routes by which alone corpses may be removed to burning or burial ground.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Disposal of dead animals</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_393\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/44999507/\">393.</a> Disposal of dead animals.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_393.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/157854597/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Whenever any animal in charge of any person dies, the person in charge thereof shall within twenty-four hours either</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_393.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/102797129/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">convey the carcass to a place provided or appointed under section 352 for the final disposal of the carcasses of dead animals, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_393.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/33158959/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">give notice of the death to the Commissioner whereupon he shall cause the carcass to be disposed of.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_393.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/59868972/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In respect of the disposal of the carcass of a dead animal under clause (b) of sub-section (1) the Commissioner may charge such fee as he may by public notice prescribe.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XVIII<br/>Vital Statistics</h2>\n<section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_394\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/181159649/\">394.</a> Appointment of Chief Registrar and registrars.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_394.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/90128933/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Municipal Health Officer shall be the Chief Registrar of births and deaths for Delhi and shall keep in such form as may be prescribed by bye-laws a register of all births and deaths occurring in [the area of the Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(c), for \"Delhi\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_394.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/50950630/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall for the purposes of this Chapter appoint such number of persons to be registrars of births and deaths as he deems necessary and define the respective areas which shall be under the charge of such registrars.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_395\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/35614676/\">395.</a> Duties of registrar.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The registrar shall keep himself informed of every birth or death occurring within the area under his charge and shall ascertain and register as soon as conveniently may be after the event, and without fee or reward such particulars in respect of every birth or death as may be prescribed by bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_396\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/125424330/\">396.</a> Information of births and deaths.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_396.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/141625588/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">It shall be the duty of the father or mother of every child born in Delhi and in default of the father or mother, of any relation of the child living in the same premises, and in default of such relation, of the person having charge of the child, to give to the best of his knowledge and belief to the registrar of the area concerned within eight days after such birth, information containing such particulars as may be prescribed by bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_396.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/27237631/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">It shall be the duty of the nearest relation present at the time of the death or in attendance during the last illness of any person dying in Delhi and in default of such relation, of any person present or in attendance at the time of the death and of the occupier of the premises in which to his knowledge the death took place and in default of the person hereinbefore mentioned, of each inmate of such premises and of the undertaker or other person causing the corpse of the deceased person to be disposed of, to give to the best of his knowledge and belief to the registrar of the area within which the death took place information containing such particulars as may be prescribed by bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_396.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/128047494/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If a birth or death occurs in the hospital, none of the persons mentioned in sub-section (1) or, as the case may be, in sub-section (2) shall be bound to give information required by that sub-section, but it shall be the duty of the medical officer in charge of the hospital within twenty-four hours after the birth or death, to send to the Municipal Health Officer a notice containing such particulars as may be prescribed by bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XIX<br/>Public Safety and Suppression of Nuisances</h2>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Nuisances</span></span><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_397\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/181733557/\">397.</a> Prohibition of nuisances.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_397.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/11509312/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/166897050/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">in any public street or public place\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">ease himself; or</span></span></section></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Sub-Clauses (ii) and (iii) omitted by Act 52 of 1964, section 3 and Sch. II.]</span></span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.iv\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/82728271/\">(iv)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">carry meat exposed to public view; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.v\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/77551060/\">(v)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">picket animals, or collect carts; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.vi\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/10347462/\">(vi)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">being engaged in the removal of rubbish, filth or other polluted and obnoxious matter wilfully or negligently permit any portion thereof to spill or fall, or neglect to sweep away or otherwise effectually to remove any portion thereof which may spill or fall in such street or place; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.vii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/179613157/\">(vii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">without proper authority affix, upon any building, monument, post, wall, fence, tree or other thing, and bill, notice or other document; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.viii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/175852261/\">(viii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">without proper authority deface or write upon or otherwise mark any building, monument, post, wall, fence, tree or other thing; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.ix\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/156704068/\">(ix)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">without proper authority remove, destroy, deface or otherwise obliterate any notice or other document put up or exhibited under this Act or the rules or bye-laws made thereunder; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.x\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/134636177/\">(x)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">without proper authority displace, damage, make any alteration in, or otherwise interfere with, the pavement, gutter, storm water-drain, flags or other materials of any such street, or any lamp bracket, direction-post, hydrant or water-pipe maintained by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> in any such street or place, or extinguish a public light; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.xi\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/110381005/\">(xi)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">carry rubbish, filth or other polluted and obnoxious matter at any hour prohibited by the Commissioner by public notice, or in any pattern of cart or receptacle which has not been approved for the purpose by the Commissioner, or fail to close such cart or receptacle when in use; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/145027348/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">carry rubbish, filth or other polluted and obnoxious matter along any route in contravention of any prohibition made in this behalf by the Commissioner by public notice; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/119053333/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">deposit or cause or permit to be deposited, earth or materials of any description or any rubbish or polluted and obnoxious matter in any place not intended for the purpose in any public street or public place or waste or unoccupied land under the management of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> ; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/195962008/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">make any grave or burn or bury any corpse at any place not set apart for such purpose; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/19763204/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">at any time or place at which the same has been prohibited by the Commissioner by public or special notice, beat a drum or tom-tom, or blow a horn or trumpet, or beat any utensil, or sound any brass or other instrument, or play any music; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/178300985/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">disturb the public peace or order by singing, screaming or shouting, or by using any apparatus for amplifying or reproducing the human voice, such as a megaphone or a loudspeaker; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/77274000/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">let loose any animal so as to cause, or negligently allow any animal to cause, injury, danger, alarm or annoyance to any person; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.h\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12084480/\">(h)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">save with the written permission of the Commissioner and in such manner as he may authorise, store or use night-soil, cow dung, manure, rubbish or any other substance emitting an offensive smell; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_397.1.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/105451579/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">use or permit to be used as a latrine any place not intended for that purpose.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_397.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/81590767/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every person shall take all reasonable means to prevent every child under the age of twelve years being in his charge from easing himself in any public street or public place.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_397.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/37182090/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The owner or keeper of any animal shall not allow it straying in a public street or public place without a keeper.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_397.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/129156116/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any animal found straying as aforesaid may be removed by an officer or employee of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or any police officer to a pound.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_397.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/194776766/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[Swine] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 58 of 1960, section 3 and Sch. II, for \"Swines\"]</span> found straying in a public street or public place shall be liable to be destroyed by any officer or other employee of the Corporation appointed in this behalf.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_398\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/73143368/\">398.</a> Power of Commissioner to require removal or abetment of nuisance.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Where the Commissioner is of opinion that there is a nuisance on any land or building, he may, by notice in writing, require the person by whose act, default or sufferance the nuisance arises or continues or the owner, lessee or occupier of the land or building, or any one or more of these persons, to remove or abate the nuisance by taking such measures in such manner and within such period as may be specified in the notice.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Dogs</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_399\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/35623375/\">399.</a> Registration and control of dogs.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_399.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/75017706/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Corporation may, by bye-laws made in this behalf,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/137531011/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">require the registration, by the registration authority appointed by the Commissioner in this behalf of all dogs kept within [the area of the Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(c), for \"Delhi\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/22825709/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">require that every registered dog shall wear a collar to which shall be attached a metal token to be issued by the registration authority, and fix the fee payable for the issue thereof;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/144893058/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">require that any dog which has not been registered or which is not wearing such token shall, if found in any public place, be detained at a place set apart for the purpose; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15168488/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">fix the fee which shall be charged for such detention and provide that any such dog shall be liable to be destroyed or otherwise disposed of unless it is claimed and the fee in respect thereof is paid within one week.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_399.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/159513668/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/127471178/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">cause to be destroyed, or to be confined for such period as he may direct, any dog or other animal which is, or is, reasonably suspected to be, suffering from rabies, or which has been bitten by any dog or other animal suffering or suspected to be suffering from rabies;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/95091620/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">by public notice direct that, after such date as may be specified in the notice, dogs which are without collars or without marks distinguishing them as private property and are found straying on the streets or beyond the enclosures of the houses of their owners, if any, may be destroyed and cause them to be destroyed accordingly.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_399.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/26210762/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No damages shall be payable in respect of any dog or other animal destroyed or otherwise disposed of under this section.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_399.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/79128997/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No one, being the owner or person in charge of any dog, shall allow it to be at large in any public street or public place without being muzzled and without being secured by a chain lead in any case in which\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.4.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/79255861/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">he knows that the dog is likely to annoy or intimidate any person, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.4.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/111810900/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the Commissioner has, by public notice during the prevalence of rabies, directed that dogs shall not be at large without muzzles and chain leads.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_399.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/146716811/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No one shall\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.5.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/178054153/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">allow any ferocious dog which belong to him or is in his charge to be at large without being muzzled, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.5.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/104890195/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">set on or urge any dog or other animal to attack, worry or intimidate any person; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_399.5.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/109117279/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">knowing or having reason to believe that any dog or animal belonging to him or in his charge has been bitten by an animal suffering or reasonably suspected to be suffering from rabies, fail or neglect to give immediate information of the fact to the Commissioner or give information which is false.</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Prevention of fire, etc.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_400\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/118686251/\">400.</a> Stacking or collecting inflammable materials.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may, by public notice, prohibit in any case where such prohibition appears to him to be necessary for the prevention of danger to life or property, the stacking or collecting of wood, dry grass, straw or other inflammable materials, or the placing of mats or thatched huts or the lighting of fires in any place which may be specified in the notice.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_401\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/180348302/\">401.</a> Care of naked lights.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall set a naked light on or near any building in any public street or other public place in such manner as to cause danger of fire:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that nothing in this section shall be deemed to prohibit the use of lights for the purposes of illumination on the occasion of a festival or public or private entertainment.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_402\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/46545750/\">402.</a> Discharging fire-works, fire-arms, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No one shall discharge any fire-arm or let off fire-works or fire-balloons, or engage in any game in such manner as to cause or to be likely to cause danger to persons passing by or dwelling or working in the neighbourhood or risk of injury to property.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_403\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/13587683/\">403.</a> Power to require buildings, wells, etc., to be rendered safe.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Where any building, or wall or anything affixed thereto, or any well, tank, reservoir, pool, depression, or excavation, or any bank or tree, is in the opinion of the Commissioner, in a ruinous state, for want of sufficient repairs, protection or enclosure, a nuisance or dangerous to persons passing by or dwelling or working in the neighbourhood, the Commissioner may by notice in writing require the owner or part-owner or person claiming to be the owner or part-owner thereof or failing any of them the occupier thereof to remove the same or may require him to repair, protect or enclose the same in such manner as he thinks necessary; and if the danger is, in the opinion of the Commissioner, imminent, he shall forthwith take such steps as he thinks necessary to avert the same.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_404\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/40797912/\">404.</a> Enclosure of waste land used for improper purpose.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may, by notice in writing, require the owner or part-owner, or person claiming to the owner or part-owner of any land or building, or the lessee or the person claiming to be the lessee of any such land which, by reason of disuse or disputed ownership or other cause, has remained unoccupied and has become the resort of idle and disorderly persons or of persons who have no ostensible means of subsistence or cannot give a satisfactory account of themselves or is used for gaming or immoral purposes or otherwise occasions or is likely to occasion a nuisance, to secure and enclose the same within such time as may be specified in the notice.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XX<br/>Markets, Slaughter Houses, Trades and Occupations</h2>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Maintenance and regulation of markets and slaughter houses</span></span><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_405\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/168458199/\">405.</a> Provision of municipal market and slaughter houses.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_405.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/133332227/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner, when authorised by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> in this behalf, may provide and maintain municipal markets and slaughter houses in such number as he thinks fit together with stalls, shops, sheds, pens and other buildings and conveniences for the use of persons carrying on trade or business in, or frequenting such markets or slaughter houses and may provide and maintain in any such markets, buildings and places, machines, weights, scales and measures for the weighment or measurement of goods sold therein.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_405.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/134106483/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Municipal markets and slaughter houses shall be under the control of the Commissioner who may, at any time, by public notice, close any municipal market or slaughter house or any part thereof.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_406\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/79075828/\">406.</a> Use of municipal markets.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_406.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/27704147/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, without the general or special permission in writing of the Commissioner, sell or expose for sale any animal or article in any municipal market.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_406.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/88826896/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person contravening the provisions of sub-section (1), and any animal or article exposed for sale by such person, may be summarily removed from the market by or under the orders of the Commissioner or any officer or employee of the Corporation authorised by the Commissioner in this behalf.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_407\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/32265434/\">407.</a> Private markets and slaughter houses.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_407.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45829958/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No place other than a municipal market shall be used as a market unless such place has been licensed as a market by the Commissioner. (2) No place other than a municipal slaughter house shall be used as a slaughter house:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that nothing in this sub-section shall be deemed\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_407.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/181880179/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to restrict the slaughter of any animal in any place on the occasion of any religious festival or ceremony, subject to such conditions (non-compliance with which shall be punishable under this Act) as the Commissioner may, by public or special notice, impose in this behalf, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_407.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/167030179/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to prevent the Commissioner, with the sanction of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> , from setting apart places for the slaughter of animals in accordance with religious custom.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_408\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/70905949/\">408.</a> Conditions of grant of licence for private market.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_408.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/53503954/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may charge such fees as he thinks fit to impose for the grant of a licence to any person to open a private market and may grant such licence subject to such conditions, consistent with this Act and any bye-laws made thereunder, as he thinks fit to impose.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_408.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/183745445/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When the Commissioner refuses to grant any license, he shall record a brief statement of the reasons for such refusal.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_408.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/110868647/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may, with the previous approval of the Standing Committee and for reasons to be recorded, suspend a licence in respect of a private market for such period as he thinks fit or cancel such licence.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_408.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/143965216/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A private market of which the licence has been suspended or cancelled as aforesaid shall be closed with effect from such date as may be specified in the order of suspension or cancellation.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_409\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/153027097/\">409.</a> Prohibition of keeping market open without licence, etc.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_409.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/164599272/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall keep open for public use any market in respect of which a licence is required by or under this Act, without obtaining a licence therefore, or while the licence therefor is suspended or after the same has been cancelled.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_409.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/64718261/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When a licence to open a private market is granted or refused or is suspended or cancelled the Commissioner shall cause a notice of the grant, refusal, suspension or cancellation to posted in such language or languages as he thinks necessary in some conspicuous place by or near the entrance to the place to which the notice relates.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_410\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/105429742/\">410.</a> Prohibition of use of unlicensed markets.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person knowing that market has been opened to the public without a licence having been obtained therefor when such licence is required by or under this Act or that the licence granted therefor is for the time being suspended or that it has been cancelled, shall sell or expose for sale any animal or article in such market.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_411\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/112174932/\">411.</a> Prohibition of business and trade near a market.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_411.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/140131341/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No animal or article shall be sold or exposed for sale within a distance of one hundred yards of any municipal market or licensed private market without the permission of the Commissioner.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_411.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/130487322/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person contravening the provisions of sub-section (1) and any animal or article exposed for sale by such person may be summarily removed by or under the orders of the Commissioner or any officer or employee of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> appointed by him in this behalf.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_412\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/101615086/\">412.</a> Levy of stallages, rents and fees.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner, with the previous approval of the Standing Committee, may\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_412.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/108886627/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">charge such stallages, rents or fees as may from time to time be fixed by him in this behalf\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the occupation or use of any stall, shop, stand, shed or pen in a municipal market or municipal slaughter house,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the right to expose articles for sale in a municipal market,</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the use of machines, weights, scales and measures provided for in any municipal market, and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iv)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the right to slaughter animals in any municipal slaughter house, and for the feed of such animals before they are ready for slaughter; or</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_412.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/44706310/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">farm the stallages, rents and fees chargeable as aforesaid or any portion thereof for such period as he may think fit; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_412.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/177858401/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">put up to public auction or dispose of by private sale, the privilege of occupying or using any stall, shop, stand, shed or pen in a municipal market or municipal slaughter house for such period and on such conditions as he may think fit.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_413\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/122809760/\">413.</a> Stallages, rents, etc., to be published.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- A copy of the table of stallages, rents and fees, if any, chargeable in any municipal market or municipal slaughter house, and of the bye-laws made under this Act for the purpose of regulating the use of such market or slaughter house printed in such language or languages as the Commissioner may direct, shall be affixed in same conspicuous place in the market or slaughter house.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_414\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/185388139/\">414.</a> Power to expel lepers and disturbers, etc, from markets.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The person in charge of a market shall prevent the entry therein of, and shall expel therefrom, any person suffering from leprosy in whom the process of ulceration has commenced or from any dangerous disease, who sells or exposes for sale therein any article or who, not having purchased the same handles any article exposed for sale therein; and he may expel therefrom any person who is creating a disturbance therein.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_415\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/28442569/\">415.</a> Butcher's, fish-monger's and poulterer's licence.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_415.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/63871793/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall without or otherwise than in conformity with a licence from the Commissioner carry on the trade of a butcher, fish-monger, poulterer or importer of flesh intended for human food or use any place for the sale of flesh, fish or poultry intended for human food:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no licence shall be required for any place used for the sale or storage for sale of preserved flesh or fish contained in airtight or hermetically sealed receptacles.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_415.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/126506851/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may by order and subject to such conditions as to supervision and inspection as he thinks fit to impose grant a licence or may by order refuse for reasons to be recorded, to grant the same.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_415.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/183486223/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every such licence shall expire at the end of the year for which it is granted or at such earlier date as the Commissioner may, for special reasons, specify in the licence.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_415.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/157585729/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any place is used for the sale of flesh, fish or poultry in contravention of the provisions of this section, the Commissioner may stop the use thereof by such means as he may consider necessary.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Trades and Occupations</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_416\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/101350408/\">416.</a> Factory, etc, not to be established without permission of the Commissioner.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_416.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/138534921/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, without the previous permission in writing of the Commissioner, establish in any premises, or materially alter, enlarge or extend, any factory, workshop or trade premises in which it is intended to employ steam, electricity, water or other mechanical power.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_416.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/115889670/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may refuse to give such permission, if he is of the opinion that the establishment, alteration, enlargement or extension of such factory, workshop or trade premises, in the proposed position would be objectionable by reason of the density of the population in the neighbourhood thereof, or would be a nuisance to the inhabitants of the neighbourhood.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_417\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/159124555/\">417.</a> Premises not to be used for certain purposes without licence.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_417.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/3859196/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall use or permit to be used any premises for any of the following purposes without or otherwise than in conformity with the terms of a licence granted by the Commissioner in this behalf, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_417.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/135478178/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any of the purposes specified in Part I of the Eleventh Schedule;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_417.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/107063480/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any purpose which is, in the opinion of the Commissioner dangerous to life, health or property or likely to create a nuisance;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_417.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/62268344/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">keeping horses, cattle or other quadruped animals or birds for transportation, sale or hire or for sale of the produce thereof; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_417.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/144351332/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">storing any of the articles specified in Part II of the Eleventh Schedule except for domestic use of any of those articles:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may declare that premises in which the aggregate quantity of articles stored for sale does not exceed such quantity as may be prescribed by bye-laws in respect of any such articles shall be exempted from the operation of clause (d).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_417.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/38784575/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In prescribing the terms of a licence granted under this section for the use of premises as mills or iron yards or for similar purposes the Commissioner may, when he thinks fit, require the licensee to provide a space or passage within the premises for carts for loading and unloading purposes.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_417.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/33989816/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[A Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall fix a scale of fees to be paid in respect of premises licensed under sub-section (1):</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Proviso omitted by Act 7 of 2004, section 5 (w.e.f. 17-12-2004)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_418\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/198017569/\">418.</a> Seizure of certain animals.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_418.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/134092417/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any horses, cattle or other quadruped animals or birds are kept on any premises in contravention of the provisions of section 417, or are found abandoned and roaming or tethered on any street or public place or on any land belonging to the Corporation, the Commissioner or any officer empowered by him may seize them and may cause them to be impounded or removed to such place as may be appointed by the Government or [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> for this purpose and the cost of seizure of these animals or birds and of impounding or removing them and of feeding and watering them shall be recoverable by sale by auction of these animals or birds:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that anyone claiming such animal or bird may, within seven days of the seizure get them released on his paying all expenses incurred by the Commissioner in seizing, impounding or removing and in feeding and watering such animal or bird, and on his producing a licence for keeping these animals and birds issued under the provisions of section 417.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_418.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/95554308/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Whenever the Commissioner is of opinion that the user of any premises for any of the purposes referred to in sub-section (1) of section 417 is causing a nuisance and such nuisance should be immediately stopped, the Commissioner may order the owner or the occupier of the premises to stop such nuisance within such time as may be specified in the order and in the event of the failure of the owner or occupier to comply with such order, the Commissioner may himself or by an officer subordinate to him cause such user to be stopped.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_418.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/46422507/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Without prejudice to the foregoing provisions of this section any person by whom or at whose instance any horses, cattle or other quadruped animals or birds are so kept, abandoned or tethered, shall also be punishable under this Act.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_419\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/44208732/\">419.</a> Power of Commissioner to prevent use of premises in particular areas for purposes referred to in section 417.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_419.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98504889/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may give public notice of his intention to declare that in any area specified in the notice no person shall use any premises for any of the purpose referred to in sub-section (1) of section 417, which may be specified in such notice.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_419.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/178368668/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No objections to any such declaration shall be received after a period of one month from the publication of the notice.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_419.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/123622234/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall consider all objections received within the said period, giving any person affected by the notice an opportunity of being heard during such consideration, and may thereupon make a declaration in accordance with the notice published under sub-section (1) with such modifications, if any, as he may think but not so as to extend its application.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_419.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/37606303/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every such declaration shall be published in the Official Gazette and in such other manner as the Commissioner may determine, and shall take effect from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_419.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/141164551/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, in any area specified in any declaration published under sub-section (4), use any premises for any of the purposes referred to in section 417 specified in the declaration and the Commissioner shall have the power to stop the use of any such premises by such means as he considers necessary.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_420\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/180114144/\">420.</a> Licences for hawking articles, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall, without or otherwise than in conformity with the terms of a licence granted by the Commissioner in this behalf,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_420.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/47814179/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">hawk or expose for sale in any place any article whatsoever whether it be for human consumption or not;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_420.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/100223681/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">use in any place his skill in any handicraft or for rendering services to and for the convenience of the public for the purposes of gain or making a living.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_421\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/22184658/\">421.</a> Eating houses, etc., not to be used without licence from the Commissioner.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_421.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/8277441/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person shall, without or otherwise than in conformity with the terms of a licence granted by the Commissioner in this behalf, keep any eating house, lodging house, hotel, boarding house, tea shop, coffee house, cafe, restaurant, refreshment room or any place where the public are admitted for repose or for the consumption of any food or drink or any place where food is sold or prepared for sale.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_421.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/8920556/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may at any time cancel or suspend any licence granted under sub-section (1) if he is of the opinion that the premises covered thereby are not kept in conformity with the condition of such licence or with the provisions of any bye-law made in this behalf, whether the licensee is prosecuted under this Act or not.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_422\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/99845209/\">422.</a> Licensing and control of theatres, circuses and places of public amusement.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall, without or otherwise than in conformity with the terms of a licence granted by the Commissioner in this behalf, keep open any theatre, circus, cinema house, dancing hall or other similar place of public resort, recreation or amusement:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that nothing in this section shall apply to private performances in any such place.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_423\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/25008874/\">423.</a> Power of Commissioner to stop use of premises used in contravention of licences.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- If the Commissioner is of opinion that any eating house, lodging house, hotel, boarding house, tea shop, coffee house, cafe, restaurant, refreshment room or other place where the public are admitted for repose or for consumption of any food or drink or where food is sold or prepared for sale or any theatre, circus, cinema house, dancing hall or similar other place of public resort, recreation or amusement is kept open without a licence or otherwise than in conformity with the terms of a licence granted in respect thereof, he may stop the use of any such premises for any such purpose for a specified period by such means as he may consider necessary.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Inspection of places of Sales, etc.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_424\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/105181313/\">424.</a> Power of Commissioner to inspect places where unlawful slaughter of animals, etc, is suspected.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\u0097 (1) If the Commissioner or any person authorised by him in this behalf has reason to believe that any animal intended for human consumption is being slaughtered or that the flesh of any such animal is being sold or exposed for sale, in any place or manner not duly authorised under this Act, he may, at any time by day or night without notice, inspect such place for the purpose of satisfying himself as to whether any provision of this Act or of any bye-law under this Act at the time in force is being contravened thereat and may seize any such animal or the carcass of such animal or such flesh found therein.</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_424.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/74276810/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner may remove and sell by auction or otherwise dispose of any animal or carcass of any animal or any flesh seized under sub-section (1).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_424.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/121413602/\">(3)</a></span><span
