class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If within one month of such seizure the owner of the animal, carcass or flesh face to appear and prove his claim to the satisfaction of the Commissioner or if the owner is convicted of an offence under this Act in respect of such animal, carcass or flesh, the proceeds of any sale under sub-section (1) shall vest in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_424.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/169325100/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person slaughtering any animal or selling or exposing for sale the flesh of any such animal in any place or manner not duly authorised under the provisions of this Act may be arrested by any police officer without a warrant.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_424.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98655588/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No claim shall lie against any person for compensation for any damage necessarily caused by any such entry or by the use of any force necessary for affecting such entry.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XXI<br/>Improvement</h2>\n<section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_425\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/48764390/\">425.</a> Improvement scheme.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Where the Commissioner upon information in his possession is satisfied as respects any area\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_425.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/17955537/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the buildings in that area are by reason of disrepair or sanitary defects unfit for human habitation or are by reason of their bad arrangement, or the narrowness or bad arrangement of the streets or the want of light, air, ventilation or proper conveniences, dangerous or injurious to the health of the inhabitants of the area; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_425.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/98972788/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">that the most satisfactory method of dealing with the conditions in the area is the re-arrangement and reconstruction of the streets and buildings in the area in accordance with an improvement scheme, he may frame an improvement scheme in respect of the area in accordance with the bye-laws made in this behalf.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_426\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/39652082/\">426.</a> Matters to be provided for in an improvement scheme.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_426.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/166088029/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">An improvement scheme may provide for all or any of the following matters, namely:\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/155964556/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the acquisition by agreement or under the Land Acquisition Act, 1894 (1 of 1894), of any property necessary for or affected by the execution of the scheme;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/109695744/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the relaying out of any land comprised in the scheme;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/77629762/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the redistribution of sites belonging to owners of property comprised in the scheme;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/184712513/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the closure or demolition of buildings or portions of buildings unfit for human habitation;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/7600332/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the demolition of obstructive buildings or portions thereof;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45468947/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the construction and reconstruction of buildings;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/97659315/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the construction and alteration of streets;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.h\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/51246497/\">(h)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the water supply, street lighting, drainage and other conveniences;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/139912581/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the provision of open spaces for the benefit of any area comprised in the scheme;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.j\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/154103397/\">(j)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the sanitary arrangements required for the area comprised in the scheme;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.k\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/169895209/\">(k)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the provision of accommodation for any class of the inhabitants;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.l\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/80525442/\">(l)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the provision of facilities for communication;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.m\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/74024915/\">(m)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the sale, letting or exchange of any property comprised in the scheme;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_426.1.n\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/41175451/\">(n)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any other matter for which, in the opinion of the Commissioner it is expedient to make provision with a view to the improvement of the area to which the scheme relates.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_426.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/77588414/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where any land is designated in an improvement scheme as subject to acquisition or is required by the scheme to be kept as an open space, then, if at the expiration of ten years from the date of sanction of the scheme by the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> under sub-section (2) of section 427, the land is not acquired by the Commissioner, the owner of the land may serve on the Commissioner a notice requiring his interest in the land to be so acquired.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_426.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/127286127/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the Commissioner fails to acquire the land with a period of six months from the receipt of the notice, the improvement scheme shall have effect after the expiration of the said six months as if the land were not designated as subject to acquisition by the Commissioner or were not required to be kept as an open space.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_427\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/148890658/\">427.</a> Submission of improvement scheme to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> for approval and to the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> for sanction.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_427.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/86457972/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every improvement scheme shall, as soon as may be after it has been framed, be submitted by the Commissioner for approval to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may either approve the scheme without modifications or with such modifications as it may consider necessary or reject the scheme with directions to the Commissioner to have a fresh scheme framed according to such directions.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_427.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/114142202/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No improvement scheme approved by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> under sub-section (1) shall be valid unless it has been sanctioned by the Central [Government.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_428\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/170079015/\">428.</a> Rehousing scheme.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner while framing an improvement scheme under this Chapter for any area may also frame a scheme (hereafter in this Act referred to as the rehousing scheme), for the construction, maintenance and management of such and so many buildings as he may consider necessary for providing accommodation for persons who are likely to be displaced by the execution of the improvement scheme.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_429\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/39680259/\">429.</a> Improvement scheme and rehousing scheme to comply with the master plan and zonal development plan.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No improvement scheme or rehousing scheme framed under this Chapter after a master plan for Delhi or a zonal development plan for any part thereof has been prepared in accordance with law shall be valid unless such scheme is in conformity with the provisions of the master plan or the zonal development plan.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XXII<br/>Powers, Procedure, Offences and Penalties</h2>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Licences and written permissions</span></span><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_430\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/167012043/\">430.</a> Signature, conditions, duration, suspension, revocation, etc, of licences and written permissions.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_430.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/9768689/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Whenever it is provided in this Act or any bye-law made thereunder that a licence or a written permission may be granted for any purpose, such licence or written permission shall be signed by the Commissioner or by the officer empowered to grant the same under this Act or the bye-laws made thereunder or by any municipal officer authorised by the Commissioner or such officer in this behalf and shall specify in addition to any other matter required to be specified under any other provision of this Act or any provision of any bye-law made thereunder\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_430.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/78004043/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the date of the grant thereof;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_430.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/119664815/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the purpose and the period (if any) for which it is granted;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_430.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/2718564/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">restrictions or conditions, if any, subject to which it is granted;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_430.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/55538129/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the name and address of the person to whom it is granted; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_430.1.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/19833286/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the fee, if any, paid for the licence or written permission.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_430.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/141427062/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Except as otherwise provided in this Act or any bye-law made thereunder, for every such licence or written permission a fee may be charged at such rate as may from time to time be fixed by the Commissioner with the sanction of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and such fee shall be payable by the person to whom the licence or written permission is granted.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_430.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/145094036/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Save as otherwise provided in this Act or any bye-law made thereunder any licence or written permission granted under this Act or any bye-law made thereunder may at any time be suspended or revoked by the Commissioner or by the officer by whom it was granted, if he is satisfied that it has been secured by the grantee through misrepresentation or fraud or if any of its restrictions or conditions has been infringed or evaded by the grantee, or if the grantee has been convicted for the contravention of any of the provisions of this Act or any bye-law made thereunder relating to any matter for which the licence or permission has been granted:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that\u0097 (a) before making any order of suspension or revocation reasonable opportunity should be accorded to the grantee of the licence or the written permission to show cause why it should not be suspended or revoked;</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_430.3.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/33077649/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">every such order shall contain a brief statement of the reasons for the suspension or revocation of the licence or the written permission.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_430.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/32904837/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When any such licence or written permission is suspended or revoked, or when the period for which the same was granted has expired, the grantee shall, for all purposes of this Act or any bye-law made thereunder, be deemed to be without a licence or written permission until such time as the order suspending or revoking the licence or written permission is rescinded or until the licence or written permission is renewed.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_430.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/41685434/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every grantee of any licence or written permission granted under this Act shall at all reasonable times, while such licence or written permission remains in force, if so required by the Commissioner or the authority by whom it was granted, produce such licence or written permission.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Entry and inspection</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_431\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/86155572/\">431.</a> Powers of entry and inspection.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner [<b class=\"akn-b\">*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words the \"General Manager (Electricity)\" opmitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 102 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> [</b>*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words \"or the General Manager (Transport)\" omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> or any municipal officer or other municipal employee authorised in this behalf by [him] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 102, for \"any of the aforesaid municipal authorities\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> or empowered in this behalf by or under any provision of this Act, may enter into or upon any land or building with or without assistants and workmen\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_431.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/45917779/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the purpose of ascertaining whether there is or has been on or in connection with the land or building any contravention of the provisions of this Act or any bye-law made thereunder;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_431.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/151436558/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the purpose of ascertaining whether or not circumstances exist which would authorise or required the Commissioner [<b class=\"akn-b\">*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words the \"General Manager (Electricity)\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 102 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span> [</b>*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words or the \"General Manager (Transport)\" omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> or any municipal officer or employee authorised or empowered in this behalf to take any action or execute any work under this Act or any bye-law made thereunder;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_431.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/198817673/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the purpose of taking any action or executing any work authorised or required by this Act or bye-law made thereunder;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_431.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/3038054/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to make any inquiry, inspection, examination, measurement, valuation or survey authorised or required by or under this Act or necessary for the proper administration of this Act;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_431.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/89148667/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">generally for the purpose of efficient discharge of the functions by any of the municipal authorities under this Act or any bye-law made thereunder.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_432\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/40540793/\">432.</a> Power to enter land adjoining land in relation to any work.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_432.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/136469994/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[The Commissioner or any person authorised by him in this behalf] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 103, for certain words (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words or the \"General Manager (Transport)\" omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch, II (w.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> or empowered in this behalf by or under any provision of this Act, may enter on any land within fifty yards of any work authorised by or under this Act with or without assistants and workmen for the purpose of depositing thereon any soil, gravel, stone or other materials or for obtaining access to such work or for any other purposes connected with the execution of the same.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_432.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/26300570/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The person so authorised shall, before entering on any such land, state the purpose thereof, and shall, if so required by the owner or occupier thereof, fence off so much of the land as may be required for such purpose.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_432.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/81011168/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The person so authorised shall, in exercising any power conferred by this section, do as little damage as may be, and compensation shall be payable by the Corporation in accordance with bye-laws made in this behalf to the owner or occupier of such land or to both for any such damage, whether permanent or temporary.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_433\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/109769767/\">433.</a> Breaking into building.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_433.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/44534245/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">It shall be lawful for [the Commissioner or any person authorised by him in this behalf] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 104, for certain words (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words or the \"General Manager (Transport)\" omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> or empowered in this behalf by or, under any provision of this Act, to make any entry into any place, and to open or cause to be opened any door, gate or other barrier\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_433.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/138960141/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if he considers the opening thereof necessary for the purpose of such entry; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_433.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/69720242/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if the owner or occupier is absent or being present refuses to open such door, gate or barrier.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_433.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/7903435/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Before making any entry into any such place or opening or causing to be opened any such door, gate or other barrier, the Commissioner, [<b class=\"akn-b\">*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words the \"General Manger (Electricity)\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 104 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> [ </b>*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words or the \"General Manager (Transport)\" omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> or the person authorised or empowered in this behalf, shall call upon two or more respectable inhabitants of the locality in which the place to be entered into is situate, to witness the entry or opening and may issue an order in writing to them or any of them so to do.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_433.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/143780479/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A report shall be made to the Standing Committee as soon as may be after any entry has been made into any place or any door, gate or other barrier has been opened under this section.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_434\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/80110637/\">434.</a> Time of making entry.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Save as otherwise provided in this Act or any bye-law made thereunder, no entry authorised by or under this Act shall be made except between the hours of sunrise and sunset.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_435\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/163442482/\">435.</a> Consent ordinarily to be obtained.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Save as otherwise provided in this Act or any bye-law made thereunder, no land or building shall be entered without the consent of the occupier, or if there is no occupier, of the owner thereof and no such entry shall be made without giving the said owner or occupier, as the case may be, not less than twenty-four hours' written notice of the intention to make such entry:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no such notice shall be necessary if the place to be inspected is a factory or workshop or trade premises or a place used for any of the purposes specified in section 417 or a stable for horses or a shed for cattle or a latrine or urinal or a work under construction, or for the purpose of ascertaining whether any animal intended for human food is slaughtered in that place in contravention of this Act or any bye-law made thereunder.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_436\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/107884162/\">436.</a> Regard to be had to social or religious usages.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- When any place used as a human dwelling is entered under this Act, due regard shall be paid to the social and religious customs and usages of the occupants of the place entered, and no apartment in the actual occupancy of a female shall be entered or broken open until she has been informed that she is at liberty to withdraw and every reasonable facility has been afforded to her withdrawing.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_437\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/28172622/\">437.</a> Prohibition of obstruction or molestation in execution of work.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall obstruct or molest any person authorised or empowered by or under this Act or any person with whom [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or any of the municipal authorities specified in section 44 has lawfully contracted, in the execution of his duty or of anything which he is authorised or empowered or required to do by virtue or in consequence of any of the provisions of this Act or any bye-law made thereunder, or in fulfilment of his contract, as the case may be.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Public notices and advertisements</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_438\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/84605913/\">438.</a> Public notices how to be made known.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Every public notice given under this Act or any bye-law made thereunder shall be in writing under the signature of [the Commissioner or of any municipal officer authorised by him in this behalf] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 105, for certain words (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words or the \"Genral Manager (Transport\" omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span>, and shall be widely made known in the locality to be affected thereby, by affixing copies thereof in conspicuous public places within the said locality or by publishing the same by beat of drum or by advertisement in local newspapers or by any two or more of these means and by any other means that the [Commissioner] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 105, for \"appropriate municipal authority\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> may think fit.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_439\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/24791466/\">439.</a> Newspapers in which advertisements or notices to be published.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whenever it is provided by this Act or any bye-law made thereunder that notice shall be given by advertisement in local newspapers, or that a notification or information shall be published in local newspapers, such notice, notification or information shall be inserted, if practicable, in at least three newspapers in such languages as [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may from time to time specify in this behalf:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that if [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> publishes a municipal journal, a publication in that journal shall be deemed to be a publication in a newspaper of the language in which the said journal may be published</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Evidence</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_440\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/180220534/\">440.</a> Proof of consent, etc., of Commissioner, General Managers, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whenever under this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder, the doing of, or the omission to do, anything or the validity of anything depends upon the approval, sanction, consent, concurrence, declaration, opinion of satisfaction of the Commissioner [or of any municipal officer, a written document signed by the Commissioner] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 1006, for certain words (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span> [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words or the \"General Manager (Transport)\" omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.r.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> or officer purporting to convey or set forth such approval, sanction, consent, concurrence, declaration, opinion or satisfaction shall be sufficient evidence thereof.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Notices, etc.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_441\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/120066361/\">441.</a> Notices, etc, to fix reasonable time.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Where any notice, bill, order or requisition issued or made under this Act of any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder requires anything to be done for the doing of which no time is fixed in this Act or the rule, regulation or bye-law, the notice, bill, order or requisition shall specify a reasonable time for doing the same.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_442\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/24720451/\">442.</a> Signature on notices, etc, may be stamped.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [(1) Every licence, written permission, notice, bill, summons or other document which is required by this Act or any rule, regulation or by-law made thereunder to bear the signature of the Commissioner or of any municipal officer, shall be deemed to be properly signed if it bears a fascimile of the signature of the Commissioner or officer, as the case may be, stamped thereupon.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 107, for the sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_442.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/178753082/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Nothing in sub-section (1) shall be deemed to apply to a cheque drawn upon the Municipal Fund under section 101.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_443\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/85004589/\">443.</a> Notices, etc, by whom to be served or issued.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- All notices, bills, summonses and other documents required by this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder to be served upon, or issued to, any person, shall be served or issued by municipal officers or other municipal employees or by other persons authorised by [the Commissioner.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 108, for certain words (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_444\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/154525027/\">444.</a> Service of notices, etc.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_444.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/14105730/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every notice, bill, summons, order, requisition or other document required or authorised by this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder to be served or issued by or on behalf of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> , or by any of the municipal authorities specified in section 44 or any municipal officer, on any person shall, save as otherwise provided in this Act or such rule, regulation or bye-law, be deemed to be duly served\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_444.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/157629370/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where the person to be served is a company, if the document is addressed to the secretary of the company at its registered office or at its principal office or place of the business and is either\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">sent by registered post, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">delivered at the registered office or at the principal office or place of business of the company;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_444.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/62195511/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where the person to be served is a partnership, if the document is addressed to the partnership at its principal place of business, identifying it by the name or style under which its business is carried on, and is either\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">sent by registered post, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">delivered at the said place of business;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_444.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/107589746/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">where the person to be served is a public body, or a corporation, society or other body, if the document is addressed to the secretary, treasurer or other head officer of that body, corporation or society at its principal office, and is either\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">sent by registered post, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">delivered at that office;</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_444.1.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/43725025/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">in any other case, if the document is addressed to the person to be served and\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">is given or tendered to him, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if such person cannot be found, is affixed on some conspicuous part of his last known place of residence or business, if within the Union Territory of Delhi, or is given or tendered to some adult member of his family or is affixed on some conspicuous part of the land or building, if any, to which it relates, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subparagraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(iii)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">is sent by registered post to that person.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_444.1A\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/159729664/\">(1A)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The service of notices, summons and other documents referred to in sub-section (1) may be made by delivering or transmitting a copy thereof by registered post acknowledgment due, addressed to the defendant or his agent empowered to accept the service or by speed post or by such courier services as are approved by the High Court or by any other means of transmission of documents (including fax message or electronic mail service) as may be provided by rules made by the High Court.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_444.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/171872375/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any document which is required or authorised to be served on the owner or occupier of any land or building may be addressed \"the owner\" or \"the occupier\", as the case may be, of that land or building (naming that land or building) without further name or description, and shall be deemed to be duly served\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_444.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/87132720/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if the document so addressed is sent or delivered in accordance with clause (d) of sub-section (1); or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_444.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/41999040/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">if the document so addressed or a copy thereof so addressed, is delivered to some person on the land or building or, where there is no person on the land or building to whom it can be delivered, is affixed to some conspicuous part of the land or building.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_444.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/50036435/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where a document is served on a partnership in accordance with this section, the document shall be deemed to be served on each partner.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_444.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/54610936/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">For the purpose of enabling any document to be served on the owner of any premises the Commissioner may by notice in writing require the occupier of the premises to state the name and address of the owner thereof.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_444.5\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/54727368/\">(5)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where the person on whom a document is to be served is a minor, the service upon his guardian or any adult member of his family shall be deemed to be service upon the minor.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_444.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/189514274/\">(6)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Nothing in sections 442 and 443 and in this section shall apply to any summons issued under this Act by a court.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_444.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/55673403/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A servant is not a member of the family within the meaning of this section.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_445\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/182701048/\">445.</a> Service of bills for tax or notice of demand by ordinary post.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Notwithstanding anything contained in sections 443 and 444 a bill for any tax or a notice of demand may be served by sending it by ordinary post with a prepaid letter under a certificate of posting addressed to the appropriate person specified in section 444 at his last known place of residence or business and in proving the service of every bill or notice so sent it shall be sufficient to prove that the letter was properly addressed and posted under a certificate of posting.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_446\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/14878025/\">446.</a> Powers in case of non-compliance with notice, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- In the event of non-compliance with the terms of any notice, order or requisition issued to any person under this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder; requiring such person to execute any work or to do any act it shall be lawful for the authority or officer at whose instance the notice, order or requisition has been issued, whether or not the person in default is liable to punishment for such default or has been prosecuted or sentenced to any punishment therefor, after giving notice in writing to such person, to take such action or such steps as may be necessary for the completion of the act or the work required to be done or executed by such person and all the expenses incurred on such account shall be payable to the Commissioner on demand and if not paid within ten days after such demand, shall be recoverable as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Recovery of expenses</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_447\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/68495620/\">447.</a> Liability of occupier to pay in default of owner.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_447.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/121646380/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If any notice, order or requisition has been issued to any person in respect of property of which he is the owner, the authority or officer at whose instance such notice, order or requisition has been issued, may require the occupier of such property or of any part thereof to pay to him, instead of to the owner, any rent payable by him in respect of such property, as it falls due up to the amount recoverable from the owner under section 446:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that if the occupier refuses to disclose the correct amount of the rent payable by him or the name or address of the person to whom it is payable, the authority or officer may recover from the occupier the whole amount recoverable under section 446 as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_447.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/143871895/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any amount recovered from an occupier instead of from an owner under sub-section (1), shall, in the absence of any contract between the owner and the occupier to the contrary, be deemed to have been paid to the owner.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_448\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/142498556/\">448.</a> Execution of work by occupier in default of owner and deduction of expenses from rent.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whenever the owner of any land or building fails to execute any work which he is required to execute under this Act or any bye-law made thereunder, the occupier, if any, of such land or building may, with the approval of the Commissioner, execute the said work and he shall, subject to any contract between the owner and occupier to the contrary, be entitled to recover from the owner the reasonable expenses incurred by him in the execution of the work and may deduct the amount thereof from the rent payable by him to the owner.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_449\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/140219131/\">449.</a> Relief to agents and trustees.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_449.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/116699098/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where any person, by reason of his receiving rent of immovable property as a receiver, agent or trustee, or of his being as a receiver, agent or trustee the person who would receive the rent if the property were let to a tenant, would under this Act or any bye-law made thereunder, be bound to discharge any obligation imposed on the owner of the property for the discharge of which money is required, he shall not be bound to discharge the obligation unless he has, or but for his own improper act or default might have had funds in this hands belonging to the owner sufficient for the purpose. (2) The burden of providing any fact entitling a receiver, agent or trustee to relief under sub-section (1) shall lie upon him.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_449.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/172269695/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where any receiver, agent or trustee has claimed and established his right to relief under this section, the Commissioner may, by notice in writing require him, to apply to the discharge of his obligation as aforesaid the first moneys which may come to his hands on behalf, or for the use, of the owner and on failure to comply with the notice, he shall be deemed to be personally liable to discharge the obligation.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Payment of compensation</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_450\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/176814620/\">450.</a> [] General power to pay compensation. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 109, for section 450 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- In any case not otherwise provided for in this Act or in any bye-law made thereunder, the Commissioner, with the previous approval of the Standing Committee, may pay compensation to any person who sustains damage by reason of the exercise of any of the powers vested by this Act or any bye-law in the Commissioner or in any municipal officer or other municipal employee.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_451\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/141044033/\">451.</a> Compensation to be paid by offenders for damage caused by them.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_451.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/86695939/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any person who has been convicted of an offence against this Act or any bye-law made thereunder shall, notwithstanding any punishment to which he may have been sentenced for the said offence, be liable to pay such compensation for any damage to the property of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> resulting from the said offence as the appropriate municipal authority may consider reasonable.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_451.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/133430736/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In the event of a dispute regarding the amount of compensation payable under sub-section (1) such amount shall, on application made to him, be determined by the magistrate before whom the said person was convicted of the said offence; and on non-payment of the amount of compensation so determined the same shall be recovered under a warrant from the said magistrate as if it were a fine imposed by him on the person liable therefor.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Recovery of expenses or compensation in case of dispute</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_452\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/133865804/\">452.</a> Reference to the court of the district judge in certain cases.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_452.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/138413485/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If, when the Commissioner demands payment of any expenses referred to in section 446, his right to demand the same or the amount of the demand is disputed within ten days after such demand, the Commissioner shall [refer the case for determination <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 8 for certain words (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span>\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_452.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/27744171/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to the Appellate Tribunal, if such demand relates to the expenses incurred in taking necessary action or steps for the completion of any act or work required to be done or executed in the event of non-compliance with any notice, order or requisition under sections 317, 325, 343, 344 and 345; <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 8 for certain words (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_452.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/78859925/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to the court of the district of Delhi, in any other case.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 8 for certain words (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_452.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/183874670/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner shall, pending the decision on any such reference, defer further proceedings for the recovery of the sum claimed by him, and shall, after the decision, proceed to recover only such amount, if any, as is thereby declared to be due in the manner referred to in section 446.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_453\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/23419240/\">453.</a> Application to the court of the district judge in other cases.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_453.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/50130023/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where, in any case not provided for by section 452, [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> of any municipal authority or any municipal officer or other municipal employee is required by this Act or by any bye-law made thereunder to pay any expenses or any compensation, the amount to be so paid and if necessary, the apportionment of the same, shall, in case of dispute, be determined by the court of the district judge of Delhi on application having been made to it for this purpose at any time within one year from the date when such expenses or compensation first became claimable.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_453.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/176803955/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the amount of any expenses or compensation ascertained in accordance with sub-section (1) is not paid by the person liable therefor on demand, it shall be recoverable as if the same were due under a decree passed by the court of the district judge in an original suit tried by it.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_454\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/38311532/\">454.</a> Power to sue for expenses or compensation.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Instead of proceeding in the manner aforesaid for the recovery of any expenses or compensation of which the amount due has been ascertained as hereinbefore provided, or after such proceedings have been taken unsuccessfully or with only partial success, the sum due or the balance of the sum due, as the case may be, may be recovered by a suit brought against the person liable for same in any court of competent jurisdiction.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Recovery of certain dues</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_455\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/169660768/\">455.</a> Mode of recovery of certain dues.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- In any case not expressly provided for in this Act or any bye-law made thereunder any due to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> on account of any charge, costs, expenses, fees, rates or rent or on any other account under this Act or any such bye-law may be recoverable from any person from whom such sum is due as an arrear of tax under this Act:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no proceedings for the recovery of any sum under this section shall be commenced after the expiry of three years from the date on which such sum becomes due.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Obstruction of owner by occupier</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_456\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/71096010/\">456.</a> Right of owner to apply to the court of the district judge in case of obstruction by occupier.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_456.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/132654911/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The owner of any land or building may, if he is prevented by the occupier thereof from [complying with\u0097 <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 9, for certain words (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_456.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/73389515/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the provisions of section 317, section 325, section 343, section 344, section 345 or section 347 or any bye-law made thereunder or with any notice or order issued under any such provision, apply to the Appellate Tribunal; and <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 9, for certain words (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_456.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12633974/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any other provision or any bye-law made thereunder or with any notice, order or requisition issued under such provision, apply to the court of the district judge of Delhi, and where such application is made] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 9, for certain words (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span>, within any time that may be fixed for the compliance with such provision or notice, order or requisition the owner shall not be liable for his failure to comply with the provision, or notice, order or requisition within the time so fixed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_456.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/89029233/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[The Appellate Tribunal or the court, as the case may be] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 9, for \"The Court\" (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> on receipt of such application, may make a written order requiring the occupier of the land or building to afford all reasonable facilities to the owner for complying with the said provision or notice, order or requisition and may also, if it thinks fit direct that the costs of such application and order be paid by the occupier.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_456.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/199862505/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">After eight days from the date of the order referred to in sub-section (2), the occupier shall afford all such reasonable facilities to the owner for the purpose aforesaid as may be specified in the order; and in the event of his continued refusal to do so, the owner shall be discharged during the continuance of such refusal, from any liability which may have been otherwise incurred by reason of his failure to comply with the said provision or notice, order or requisition.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Proceedings before the court of the district judge</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_457\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/37376628/\">457.</a> General powers and procedure of the court of the district judge.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The procedure provided in the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 (5 of 1908), in regard to suits shall be followed, as far as it can be made applicable, in the disposal of applications, appeals or references that may be made to the court of the district judge of Delhi under this Act or any bye-law made thereunder.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_458\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/187861728/\">458.</a> Fees in Proceedings before the court of the district judge.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_458.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/163727317/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 110 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, prescribe what fee shall be paid\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_458.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/94359437/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">on any application, appeal or reference under this Act or any bye-law made thereunder to the court of the district judge of Delhi; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_458.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/199770821/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">for the issue, in connection with any inquiry or proceedings before that court under this Act or such bye-law, of any summons or other process:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the fee, if any, prescribed under clause (a) shall not, in cases in which the value of the claim or subject-matter is capable of being estimated in money, exceed the fees leviable for the time being under the provisions of the Court-fees Act, 1870 (7 of 1870), in cases in which the amount of the claim or subject-matter is of a like amount.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_458.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/65749265/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 110 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government may, by like notification, determine the person by whom the fee, if any, prescribed under clause (a) of sub-section (1), shall be payable.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_458.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/18213468/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No application, appeal or reference shall be received by the court of the district judge until the fee, if any, prescribed therefor under clause (a) of sub-section (1) has been paid:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the court may, in any case in which it thinks fit so to do,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_458.3.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/141647981/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">receive an application, appeal or reference made by or on behalf of a poor person, and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_458.3.ii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/46668055/\">(ii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">issue process on behalf of any such person, without payment or on part payment of the fees prescribed under this section.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_459\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/35514048/\">459.</a> Repayment of half fees on settlement before hearing.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whenever any application, appeal or reference made under this Act or any bye-law made thereunder to the court of the district judge is settled by agreement between the parties before the hearing, half the amount of all fees paid up to that time shall be repaid by the court to the parties by whom the same have respectively been paid.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_460\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/186029601/\">460.</a> Power of the court of the district judge to delegate certain powers and to make rules.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The court of the district judge of Delhi may\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_460.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/4277736/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">delegate, either generally or specially, to the court of an additional district judge, power to receive applications, [election petitions] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1961, section 18 (w.e.f. 12-9-1961).]</span>, appeals and references under this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder, and to hear and determine such applications, [election petitions] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1961, section 18 (w.e.f. 12-9-1961)]</span>, appeals and references;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_460.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/188924092/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">with the approval of the [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 111 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>Government, make rules not inconsistent with this Act or any rule, regulation or by-law made thereunder, providing for any matter connected with the exercise of the jurisdiction conferred upon the court by this Act which is not herein specifically provided for.</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Offences and penalties</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_461\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/156611005/\">461.</a> Punishment for certain offences.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-blockList\"><span class=\"akn-listIntroduction\">- [(1)] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Section 461 re-numbered as sub-section (1) thereof by Act 42 of 1984, section 10 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> Whoever\u0097</span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(a)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">contravenes any provision of any of the sections, sub-sections, clauses, provisos or other provisions of this Act mentioned in the first column of the Table in the Twelfth Schedule; or</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(b)</span><span class=\"akn-blockList\"><span class=\"akn-listIntroduction\">fails to comply with any order or direction lawfully given to him or any requisition lawfully made upon him under any of the said sections, sub-sections, clauses, provisos or other provisions, shall be punishable\u0097</span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(i)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">with fine which may extend to the amount, or with imprisonment for a term which may extend to the period, specified in that behalf in the third column of the said Table or with both; and</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(ii)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">in the case of a continuing contravention or failure, with an additional fine which may extend to the amount specified in the fourth column of that Table for every day during which such contravention or failure continues after conviction for the first such contravention or failure.</span></span></span></span></span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_461.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/40451674/\">(2)</a></span><span 320 or sub-section (1) of section 321 or sub-section (1) of section 325 or section 339, in relation to any street which is a public street, shall be punishable with simple imprisonment which may extend to six months or with fine which may extend to five thousand rupees or with both.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1984, section 10 (w.e.f. Punishment for offences relating to terminal tax.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whoever brings within the Union territory of Delhi any goods liable to terminal tax without the payment of such tax shall, on conviction, be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees or with both, and the court trying an offence under this section may, on such conviction, also confiscate the goods in respect of which the offence has been committed.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Sections 463 and 464 omitted by ordinance no. 21 (w.r.e.f. 30-1-1993)]</span>464. Penalty for evasion of terminal taxes.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">- Where any goods imported into Delhi are liable to the payment of terminal tax, any person who, with the intention of evading payment of the tax introduces or attempts to introduce or causes or abets the introduction of any such goods within the Union territory of Delhi, upon which payment of terminal tax due on such introduction, has neither been made nor tendered, shall be punishable with fine which may extend to ten times the amount of such terminal tax.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_465\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/151758299/\">465.</a> General penalty.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Whoever, in any case in which a penalty is not expressly provided by this Act, fails to comply with any notice, order or requisition issued under any provision thereof, or otherwise contravenes any of the provisions of this Act, shall be punishable with fine which may extend to one hundred rupees, and in the case of a continuing failure or contravention, with an additional fine which may extend to twenty rupees for every day after the first during which he has persisted in the failure or contravention.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_466\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/136824815/\">466.</a> Offences by companies.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_466.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/105081999/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where an offence under this Act has been committed by a company, every person who, at the time the offence was committed, was in charge of, and was responsible to, the company for the conduct of the business of the company, as well as the company, shall be deemed to be guilty of the offence and shall be liable to be proceeded against and punished accordingly:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that nothing contained in this sub-section shall render any such person liable to any punishment provided in this Act if he proves that the offence was committed without his knowledge or that he exercised all due diligence to prevent the commission of such offence.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_466.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/47601603/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-section (1) where an offence under this Act has been committed by a company and it is proved that the offence has been committed with the consent or connivance of or is attributable to any neglect on the part of, any director, manager, secretary or other officer of the company, such director, manager, secretary or other officer shall also be deemed to be guilty of that offence and shall be liable to be proceeded against and punished accordingly.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Explanation.\u0097For the purposes of this section,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_466.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/131297950/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"company\" means a body corporate, and includes a firm or other association of individuals; and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_466.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/153239156/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"director\" in relation to a firm means a partner in the firm.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_466A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/160379132/\">466A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 42 of 1984, section 11 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985)]</span> Certain offences to be cognizable.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-blockList\"><span [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 115 (w.e.f. 1-10-993)]</span> Government.</span></span></section><section jurisdiction over the whole of Delhi.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_468.6\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/180936983/\">(6)</a></span><span
