section 115, for the \"Code of Criminal Procedure, 1898 (5 of 1898)\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993) ]</span>, all municipal magistrates appointed under this Act shall be deemed to be magistrates appointed under [section 16] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 115, for section 12 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> of the said Code.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_468.7\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/103945267/\">(7)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Nothing in this section shall be deemed to preclude any magistrate appointed hereunder from trying any offence under any other law.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Sections 467 of 473 omitted in relation to the road transport services in the Union Territory of Delhi vide Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span>470. Cognizance of offences.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">- All offences against this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder, whether committed within or without the limits of Delhi, shall be cognizable by a municipal magistrate and such magistrate shall not be deemed to be incapable of taking cognizance of any such offence or of any offence under any enactment which is repealed by, or which ceases to have effect under, this Act by reason only of his being liable to pay any municipal tax or rate or benefited out of the Municipal Fund.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Sections 467 of 473 omitted in relation to the road transport services in the Union Territory of Delhi vide Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> 471. Limitation of time for prosecution.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall be liable to punishment for any offence against this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder, unless complaint of such offence is made before a municipal magistrate within six months next after\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_468.7.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/190295906/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the date of the commission of such offence, or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_468.7.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/149405288/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the date on which the commission or existence of such offence was first brought to the notice of the complainant.</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Sections 467 of 473 omitted in relation to the road transport services in the Union Territory of Delhi vide Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> 472. Power of magistrate to hear cases in absence of accused when summoned to appear.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">- If any person summoned to appear before a magistrate to answer a charge of an offence against this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder fails to appear at the time and place mentioned in the summons, or on any date to which the hearing of the case is adjourned, the magistrate may hear and determine the case in his absence, if\u0097</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(a)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">service of the summons is proved to his satisfaction, and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(b)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">no sufficient cause is shown, for the non-appearance of such person.</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Sections 467 of 473 omitted in relation to the road transport services in the Union Territory of Delhi vide Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> 473. Complaints concerning nuisances and procedure therefor.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(1)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Commissioner, [or any municipal officer or other municipal employee authorised by him] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 116, for certain words (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> in this behalf or any person who resides or owns property in Delhi, may complaint to a municipal magistrate of the existence of any nuisance.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(2)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Upon the receipt of any such complaint the magistrate, after making such inquiry as he thinks necessary, may by written order direct the person responsible for the nuisance or the owner of the land or building on which the nuisance has taken place, to take such measures as to such magistrate may seem practicable and reasonable, and within such period as may be specified in the order, for abating, preventing, removing or remedying such nuisance and may direct [the Commissioner] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 116, for \"any of the appropriate municipal authorities\" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> to put into force any of the provisions of this Act or any bye-law made thereunder.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(3)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The magistrate may further direct the person found responsible for the nuisance to pay to the complainant such reasonable costs of and relating to the said complaint as he shall determine, inclusive of compensation for the complainant's loss of time in prosecuting such complaint.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(4)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Where in the opinion of the magistrate immediate action to prevent the nuisance is necessary he may dispense with the inquiry as required by sub-section (2) and make such order as he considers necessary forthwith.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(5)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If the person directed to take action by an order under sub-section (2) or sub-section (3) fails to do so within the period specified in the order, the Commissioner [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words \"or any other appropriate municipal authority\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 116 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> may on the expiry of the said period proceed to take action as directed in the order or may take such other measures to abate, prevent, remove or remedy the nuisance as he considers necessary, and all expenses incurred in that connection shall be recoverable from the person against whom the magistrate has made the order as an arrear of tax under this Act.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Powers and duties of police officers</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_474\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/125843725/\">474.</a> Arrest of offenders.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_474.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/74922101/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any police officer may arrest any person who commits in his view any offence against this Act or against any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder if\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_474.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/101456014/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the name and address of such person be unknown to him, and</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_474.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/79506818/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">such person on demand declines to give his name and address or gives a name and address which such officer has reason to believe to be false.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_474.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/66799900/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No person so arrested shall be detained in custody after his true name and address are ascertained or, without the order of the nearest magistrate for a period longer than twenty-four hours from the time of arrest exclusive of the time necessary for the journey from the place of arrest to the court of such magistrate.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_475\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/116845495/\">475.</a> Duties of police officers.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- It shall be the duty of all police officers to give immediate information to Commissioner [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words \"or any other appropriate municipal authority\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 117 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> of the commission of, or the attempt to commit any offence against this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder and to assist all municipal officers and other municipal employees in the exercise of their lawful authority.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Legal proceedings</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_476\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/174916821/\">476.</a> (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_477\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/14245333/\">477.</a> Protection of action of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No suit or prosecution shall be entertained in any court against [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or against any municipal authority or against any municipal officer or other municipal employee or against any person acting under the order or direction of any municipal authority or any municipal officer or other municipal employee, for anything which is in good faith done or intended to be done, under this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_478\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/18815516/\">478.</a> Notice to be given of suits.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_478.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/65680424/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No suit shall be instituted against [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or against any municipal authority or against any municipal officer or other municipal employee or against any person acting under the order or direction of any municipal authority or any municipal officer or other municipal employee, in respect of any act done, or purporting to have been done, in pursuance of this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder until the expiration of two months after notice in writing has been left at the municipal office and, in the case of such officer, employee or person, unless notice in writing has also been delivered to him or left at his office or place of residence, and unless such notice states explicitly the cause of action, the nature of the relief sought, the amount of compensation claimed, and the name and place of residence of the intending plaintiff, and unless the plaint contains a statement that such notice has been so left or delivered.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_478.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/61137631/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">No suit, such as is described in sub-section (1), shall unless it is a suit for the recovery of immovable property or for a declaration of title thereto, be instituted after the expiry of six months from the date on which the cause of action arises.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_478.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/177745149/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Nothing in sub-section (1) shall be deemed to apply to a suit in which the only relief claimed is an injunction of which the object would be defeated by the giving of the notice or the postponement of the institution of the suit.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XXIII<br/>Rules, Regulations and Bye-laws</h2>\n<section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_479\"><h3><a Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> is empowered to make under this Act may provide that any contravention thereof shall be punishable with fine which may extend to one hundred rupees.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_479.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/56524292/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 119, for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).]</span> [ Every rule made under clause (8) of section 22 and section 31] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 17(a), for \"Every rule made under this Act, every notification issued under sub-section (2) of secton 3A and sub-section (2) of section 52 and bye-laws made by the Central Government under section 349A\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).]</span> shall be laid as soon as may be after it is made or issued before each House of Parliament, while it is in session for a total period of thirty days which may be comprised in one session or in two or more successive sessions, and if, before the expiry of the session immediately following the session or the successive sessions aforesaid, both Houses agree in making any modification in the rule, bye-law or notification or both Houses agree that the rule, bye-law or notification should not be made or issued, the rule, bye-law or notification shall thereafter have effect only in such modified form or be of no effect, as the case may be; so, however, that any such modification or annulment shall be without prejudice to the validity of anything previously done under that rule, bye-law or notification.]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_479.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/153120979/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span under section 22(8) and section 31 of this Act, every notification issued under sub-section (2) of section 3A and sub-section (2) of section 52 and bye-law made by the Government under section 349A shall be laid, as soon as may be after i 's made or issued, before the Legislative Assembly of Delhi, while it is in session for a total period of thirty days, which may be comprised in one session or in two or more successive sessions, 4nd if, before the expiry of the session immediately following the session or the successive sessions aforesaid, the Legislative Assembly agrees in making any modification in the rule, bye-laws or notification or the Legislative Assembly agrees that the rule or bye-laws or notification should not be made or issued, the rule or bye-laws or notification shall thereafter have effect only in such modified form or be of no effect, as the case may be; so, however, that any such modification or annulment shall be without prejudice to the validity of anything previously done under that rule or bye-law or notification.]</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_480\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/82047955/\">480.</a> Supplemental and any bye-law so made may be altered or rescinded by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> in the exercise of its powers under sub-section (1)</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_481A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/130521135/\">481A.</a> [] [[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(18), for section 481(A) (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). it was inserted by Act 20 of 1983, section 2 and Sch. (w.e.f. 15-3-1984). Section 481(A), before substitution by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, stood as under:</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\"481A. Regulations and bye-laws to be laid before Parliament.- The Central Government shall cause every regulation made under this Act and every bye-law made under section 481 to be laid, as soon as may be after it is made, before each House of Parliament, while it is in session, for a total period of thirty days which may be comprised in one session or in two or more successive sessions, and if, before the expiry of the session immediately following the session or the successive sessions aforesaid both Houses agree in making any modification in the regulation or bye-law or both Houses agree that the regulation or bye-law should not be made, the regulation or bye-law shall thereafter, have effect only in such modified form or be of no effect, as the case may be; so, however, that any such modification or annulment shall be without prejudice to the validity of anything previously done under that regulation or bye-law.\"]] Regulations and bye-laws to be laid before Parliament.- The Government shall cause every regulation made under this Act and every bye-law made under section 481 to be laid, as soon as may be after it is made, before each House of Parliament, while it is in session, for a total period of thirty days which may be comprised in one session or in two or more successive sessions, and if, before the expiry of the session immediately following the session or the successive sessions aforesaid both Houses agree in making any modification in the regulation or bye-law or both Houses agree that the regulation or bye-law should not be made, the regulation or bye-law shall thereafter, have effect only in such modified form or be of no effect, as the case may be; so, however, that any such modification or annulment shall be without prejudice to the validity of anything previously done under that regulation or bye-law.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_482\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/107112020/\">482.</a> Penalty for breaches of bye-laws.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_482.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/192347905/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any bye-law made under this Act may provide that a contravention thereof shall be punishable\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_482.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/138279820/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees; or</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_482.1.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/83286462/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">with fine which may extend to five hundred rupees and in the case of a continuing contravention, with an additional fine which may extend to twenty rupees for every day during which such contravention continues after conviction for the first such contravention</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_482.1.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/48364805/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">with fine which may extend to twenty rupees for every day during which the contravention continues, after the receipt of a notice from the Commissioner or any municipal officer duly authorised in that behalf, by the person contravening the bye-law requiring such person to discontinue such contravention:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">provided that contravention of any bye-law relating to the road transport services may be punishable with imprisonment which may extend to three months, or with fine which may extend to fifteen hundred rupees, or with both.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_482.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/189826480/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any such bye-law also provide that a person contravening the same shall be required to remedy so far as lies in his power, the mischief, if any caused by such contravention.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_483\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/21298355/\">483.</a> Supplemental provisions respecting bye-laws.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_483.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/170862336/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Any power to make bye-laws conferred by this Act is conferred subject to the conditions of the bye-laws being made after previous publication and in the case of such bye-laws being made by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a) for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> of their not taking effect until they have been approved by the [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 121 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government and published in the Official Gazette.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_483.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/150202962/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 121 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government in approving a bye-law may make any change therein which appears to it to be necessary.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_483.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/9433240/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 121 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government may, after previous publication of its intention cancel any bye-law which it has approved, and thereupon the bye-law shall cease to have effect.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_484\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/151710454/\">484.</a> Bye-laws to be available for inspection and purchase.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_484.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/128933581/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">A copy of all bye-laws made under this Act shall be kept at the municipal office and shall, during office hours, be open free of charge to inspection by any inhabitant of Delhi.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_484.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/69072517/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Copies of all such bye-laws shall be kept at the municipal office and shall be sold to the public at cost price either singly or in collections at the option of the purchaser.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XXIV<br/>Control</h2>\n<section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_484A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/101248493/\">484A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 19 (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> Director of Local Bodies.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_484A.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/140117429/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Government shall appoint a Director of Local Bodies to assist the Government and discharge functions including</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_484A.1.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/62007891/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to coordinate the functions of the Corporations in respect of the common facilities and services that are under the control and management of the Corporation in whose area they are located;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_484A.1.ii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/128242801/\">(ii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to decide, in the interim, the utilization of various assets and discharge of liabilities by the Corporations;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_484A.1.iii\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/104759787/\">(iii)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to frame the recruitment rules for various posts;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_484A.1.iv\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/30346088/\">(iv)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to resolve the functional and administrative anomalies or difficulties arising, if any, after constitution of the three corporations in consultation with the Commissioner(s) thereof;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_484A.1.v\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/74376319/\">(v)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to coordinate the collection and sharing of Toll Tax from Toll centres/ gates that are under the control of respective Corporations in which they are located on the basis of such principles as may be prescribed.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_484A.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/53557562/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Director of Local Bodies shall exercise such powers of the Government in relation to the affairs of the Corporations (not being power under sections 487 to 490), as the Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette and subject to the conditions and restrictions (including the condition of review by itself), specify in the notification.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_484A.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/161387867/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The terms and conditions of service and the tenure of office of the Director of Local Bodies shall be such as the Government may, by rules, prescribe.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_484A.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/69063161/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Government shall make available to the Director of Local Bodies such staff as the Government considers necessary for the exercise of the powers conferred on him under sub-section (2).]</span><span class=\"akn-p\"><span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[omitted by act 10 of 2022]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_485\"><h3><a 1-10-1993)]</span> to require production of documents.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Central Government [or the Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 122 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> may at any time require the Commissioner\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_485.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/142974333/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to produce any record, correspondence, plan or other document in his possession or under his control;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_485.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/56249214/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to furnish any return, plan estimate, statement, account or statistics relating to the proceedings, duties or works of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or any of the municipal authorities;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_485.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/71070407/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">to furnish or obtain and furnish any report.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_486\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/83854339/\">486.</a> Inspection.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Central Government [or the Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 122 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> may depute any person in the service of Government to inspect or examine any municipal department or office or any service or work undertaken by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or any of the Municipal authorities or any property belonging to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and to report thereon and [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and every municipal authority and all municipal officers and other municipal employees shall be bound to afford the person so deputed access at all reasonable times to the premises and properties of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and to all records, accounts and other documents the inspection of which he may consider necessary to enable him to discharge his duties.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_487\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/46197080/\">487.</a> Directions by Central Government.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_487.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/135192485/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If, [whether on receipt of a report or on receipt] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 123, for \"whether on receipt\" of (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> of any information of report obtained under section 485 or section 486 or otherwise, the Central Government is of opinion\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_487.1.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/94739619/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span 13-1-2012)]</span> or any municipal authority by or under this Act has not been performed or has been performed in an imperfect, insufficient or unsuitable manner, or</span></span></section><section not been made for the performance of any such duty,</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">it may direct [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or the municipal authority concerned, within such period as it thinks Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or the municipal authority concerned shall comply with such direction:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that, unless in the opinion of the Central Government the immediate execution of such order is necessary, it shall period fixed by a direction made under sub-section (1) of section 487, any action the taking of which has been directed under that sub-section has not been duly taken, the Central Government may make arrangements for the taking of such action and may direct that all expenses connected therewith shall be defrayed out of the Municipal Fund.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_489\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/183538663/\">489.</a> Power of Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b) for \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> to give directions in relation to primary schools, etc.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_489.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/165133001/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may give [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> all such directions as it considers necessary in respect of subjects, curricula, text books, standards and methods of teaching in primary schools vested in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or maintained wholly or partly by grants paid out of the Municipal Fund and in respect of such other matters as that Government considers necessary and [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall comply with all such directions.</span></span></section><section appointed by the Central Government in this behalf to inspect any such school; and all reasonable facilities shall be given to such officer in connection with the after considering the report of inspection made by such officer, may give [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> such directions as it considers necessary and [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall comply with such directions.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_490\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/65913736/\">490.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 124, for section 490 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Dissolution of [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>\n</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_490.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/184858177/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If, in the opinion of the Central Government, [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> persistently makes default in the performance of the duties imposed on it by or under this Act or exceeds or abuses its powers, the Central Government may by an order published, together with a statement of reasons therefore, in the Official Gazette, dissolve [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be given a reasonable opportunity of being heard before its dissolution.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_490.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/112373440/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">When [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> is dissolved by an order under sub-section (1),\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_490.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/140530318/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_490.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/150700470/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">during the period of dissolution of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, all powers and duties conferred and imposed upon [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> by or under this Act or any other law, shall be exercised and performed by such officer or authority as the Central Government may appoint in that behalf;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_490.2.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/175018919/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span 13-1-2012)]</span> shall, until it is re-constituted, vest in the Central Government.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_490.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be completed before the expiration of a period of six months from the date of its dissolution.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_490.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/37455159/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span National Capital Territory of Delhi as soon as may be, after it has been made.</span></span></section></section></section><section class=\"akn-chapter\"><h2>Chapter XXV<br/>Miscellaneous</h2>\n<section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_490A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/56298321/\">490A.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 125 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Delegation of power by the Central Government.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, direct that any power exercisable by it under this Act shall, subject to such conditions, if any, as may be specified in the notification be exercisable by the Government or any of its officers or by the Commissioner or any other authority.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_490B\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/42438837/\">490B.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 20 (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> Delegation of power by the Government.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, diect that any power exercisable by it under this Act shall, subject to such conditions, if any, as may be specified int he notification, be exercisable by any of its officers or by Commissioner or by any other authority.]</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_491\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/155617030/\">491.</a> Power to delegate functions of Commissioner.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- The Commissioner may by order direct that any power conferred or any duty imposed on him by or under this Act shall, in such circumstances and under such conditions, if any, as may be specified in the order, be exercised and performed also by any municipal officer or other municipal employee specified in the order.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_492\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/28309865/\">492.</a> Validity of notices and other documents.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No notice, order, requisition, licence, permission in writing or any other document issued under this Act shall be invalid merely by reason of defect of form.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_493\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/10614932/\">493.</a> Admissibility of document or entry as evidence.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- A copy of any receipt, application, plan, notice, order or other document or of any entry in a register in the possession of any municipal authority shall, if duly certified by the legal keeper thereof or other person authorised by the Commissioner in this behalf, be admissible in evidence of the existence of the document or entry, and shall be admitted as evidence of the matters and transactions therein recorded in every case where, and to the same extent to which, the original document or entry would, if produced, have been admissible to prove such matters and transactions.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_494\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/29383341/\">494.</a> Evidence of Municipal officer or employee.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No municipal officer or other municipal employee shall, in any legal proceedings to which the Corporation is not a party, be required to produce any register or document the contents of which can be proved under section 493 by a certified copy, or to appear as a witness to prove any matter or transaction recorded therein save by order of the court made for special cause.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_495\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/140707044/\">495.</a> Prohibition against obstruction of Mayor or any municipal authority, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall obstruct or molest [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or any municipal authority, the Mayor or the Deputy Mayor, any councillor [*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Ed- The words \"or alderman\" have become redundent as the reference to alderman omitted by act 67 of 1993 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993, see section 9 of the Act)]</span> or alderman or any person employed by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or any person with whom the Commissioner has entered into a contract on behalf of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, in the performance of their duty or of anything which they are empowered or required to do by virtue or in consequence of any provision of this Act or of any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_496\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/69228334/\">496.</a> Prohibition against removal of mark.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall remove any mark set up for the purpose of indicating any level or direction incidental to the execution of any work authorised by this Act or of any rule or bye-law made thereunder.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_497\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/105187169/\">497.</a> Prohibition against removal or obliteration of notice.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall, without authority in that behalf, remove, destroy, deface or otherwise obliterate any notice exhibited by or under orders of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or any municipal authority or any municipal officer or other municipal employee specified by the Commissioner in this behalf.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_498\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/154890006/\">498.</a> Prohibition against unauthorised dealings with public place or materials.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- No person shall, without authority in that behalf, remove earth, sand or other material or deposit any matter or make any encroachment from, in, or on any land vested in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or in any way obstruct the same.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_499\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/156406832/\">499.</a> Liability of Commissioner, etc. , for loss, waste or misapplication of Municipal Fund or property.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_499.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/155093212/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">[Every councillor and every person referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3, the Commissioner] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 126, for certain words (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span>, [<b class=\"akn-b\">*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words \"the General Manager (Transport)\" omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.r.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> and every municipal officer and other municipal employee shall be liable for the loss, waste or misapplication of any money or other property owned by or vested in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, of such loss, waste or misapplication is a direct consequence of his neglect or misconduct and a suit for compensation may be instituted against him by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> with the previous sanction of the [</b>*] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, sec.126 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government or by the [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word Central omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 126 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_499.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/120727624/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every such suit shall be instituted within three years after the date on which the cause of action arose.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_500\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/35158057/\">500.</a> Councillors and municipal officers and employees to be public servants.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- [Every councillor and every person referred to in clause (b) sub-section (3) of section 3, the Commissioner] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 67 of 1993, section 127, for certain words (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The words \"General Manager (Transport)\" omitted by Act 71 of 1971, section 7 and Sch. II (w.r.e.f. 3-11-1971)]</span> and every municipal officer and other municipal employee shall be deemed to be a public servant within the meaning of section 21 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860), and in the definition of \"legal remuneration\" in section 161 of that Code the word \"Government\" shall, for the purpose of this section, be deemed to include [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_501\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/143501080/\">501.</a> Annual administration report.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\u0097 (1) As soon as may be after the 1st day of April in every year and not later than such date as may be fixed by the [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word Central omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 128 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government in this behalf, [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall submit to that Government a detailed report of the municipal Government of Delhi during the preceding year in such form as that Government may direct.</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_501.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/42763668/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The 13-1-2012)]</span> shall consider it and forward the same to the [***] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[The word \"Central\" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, section 128 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Government with its resolution thereon, if any.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_501.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or any municipal authority or any municipal officer or other municipal employee of any law for the time being in force.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_503\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/64445696/\">503.</a> Exemption of diplomatic or consular missions from payment of tax, etc.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\u0097 The Central Government may, by order in the Official Gazette, exempt from the payment of any tax, rate, fee or other charge payable under the provisions of this Act, any diplomatic or consular mission of a foreign State or the High Commission of a Commonwealth country and any official of such mission or High Commission.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_504\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/67867395/\">504.</a> Construction of references.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span 1955</a>).</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_508\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/199989544/\">508.</a> Special provisions as to Red Fort area.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_510\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/184170781/\">510.</a> Provisions relating to existing local authorities in Delhi till the establishment of [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-blockList\"><span class=\"akn-listIntroduction\">\u0097 (1) Notwithstanding anything contained in the Punjab Municipal Act, 1911 (Punjab Act 3 of 1911), or as the case may be, the Punjab District Boards Act, 1883 (20 of 1883), as in force in Delhi, as from the commencement of this Act,\u0097</span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(a)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">the class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(b)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">all the powers, duties and functions which may, under any of the aforesaid Acts or any other law, be exercised and performed data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, be exercised and performed by a person (whether an officer of Government or not) to be appointed by the Central Government with such designation as it may specify:</span></span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the same person may be appointed in respect of all the aforesaid local authorities.</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_510.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/15715636/\">(2)</a></span><span corporate.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_511\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/29966986/\">511.</a> Provisions as to employees of bodies and local authorities whose Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> had not been established, and shall continue to do so unless and until such tenure, remuneration and terms and conditions are duly altered by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the tenure, remuneration and terms and conditions of service of any such officer or other employee shall not be altered to his disadvantage without the previous sanction of the Central [Government] section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be deemed to be service rendered under [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>.</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_511.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a functions under this Act as the Commissioner may think proper and every such officer or other employee shall discharge those functions accordingly.</span></span></section></section><section
