href=\"/doc/48072031/\">511B.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Act 67 of 1993, section 133 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993)]</span> Special provision as to transferred functions.</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_511B.1\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/184188992/\">(1)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In this section, \"transferred functions\" means such functions of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> which immediately before the commencement of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 1993 were the functions of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> but as from such commencement become the functions of any other authority or functionary hereinafter called the \"new authority\".</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_511B.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/92772417/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">On and from such commencement,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/174940640/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all lands and buildings (together with all interests of whatsoever nature and kind therein) vested in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> immediately before such commencement and used for the purposes of \"transferred functions\" shall pass to and vest in the new authority concerned;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/171952240/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all stores, articles and other movable properties belonging to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> immediately before such commencement and utilised for or in connection with the \"transferred functions\" shall pass to and vest in the new authority concerned;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.2.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/56076312/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all appointment, notifications, orders, schemes, rules, forms, notices or bye-laws made or issued or any licence or permissions granted by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> immediately before such commencement in connection with the \"transferred functions\" shall continue in force and be deemed to have been made, issued or granted by the new authority concerned unless and until they are superseded by any appointment, notification, order, scheme, rule, form, notice or bye-laws made or issued or any licence or permission granted by the new authority concerned;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.2.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/124005514/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all debts, obligations and liabilities incurred, all contracts entered into and all matters and things engaged to be done by, with or for, [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> immediately before such commencement for or in connection with the \"transferred functions\" shall be deemed to have been incurred, entered into, engaged to be done by, with or for, the new authority concerned;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.2.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/181234611/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all assessments, valuations, measurements or divisions made by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> immediately before such commencement in or in connection with the \"transferred functions\" shall continue in force and be deemed to have been made by the new authority concerned unless and until they are superseded by any assessment, valuation, measurement or division made by that authority;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.2.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/101957190/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all rates, taxes, fees, rents and other sums of money due to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> in relation to the \"transferred functions\" immediately before such commencement shall be deemed to be due to the new authority concerned;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.2.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/61123081/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all rates, fees, rents and other charges leviable in, or in relation to, the \"transferred functions\" shall, unless and until they are varied by the new authority concerned continue to be levied at the same rate at which they were being levied by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> immediately before such commencement;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.2.h\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/40356821/\">(h)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all suits, prosecutions and other legal proceedings instituted or which might have been instituted by or against [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> immediately before such commencement for any matter in relation to the \"transferred functions\" may be continued or instituted by or against the new authority concerned;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.2.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/165503374/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">every officer and other employee serving under [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> immediately before such commencement in connection with the \"transferred functions\" shall be transferred to and become an officer or other employee of the new authority concerned with such designation as such authority may determine and hold office by the same tenure and at the same remuneration and on the same terms and conditions of service as he would have held the same if the new authority concerned had not been established and shall continue to do so unless and until such tenure, remuneration and terms and conditions are duly altered by that authority:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the tenure, remuneration and terms and conditions of service of any such officer or other employee shall not be altered to his disadvantage without the previous sanction of the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that any service rendered by any such officer or other employee before such commencement shall be deemed to be service rendered under the new authority concerned: Provided also that the new authority concerned may employ any such officer or other employee in the discharge of such functions as it may think proper and every such officer or other employee shall discharge those functions accordingly.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_511B.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/124450041/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">As soon as may be after the commencement of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 1993, the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[ Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall decide,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.3.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/90746555/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">which stores, articles and other movable properties referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (2) have been utilised by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> for or in connection with the \"transferred functions\";</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.3.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/110673543/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">which debts, obligations, liabilities, contracts, matters and things referred to in clause (d) of the said sub-section have been incurred, entered into or engaged to be done by, with or for, [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> for or in connection with the \"transferred functions\";</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_511B.3.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/196189059/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">which officers and other employees referred to in clause (i) of that sub-section served under [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> in connection with the \"transferred functions\".</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_511B.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/71258552/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In case of any dispute in relation to any of the matters referred to in the various clauses of sub-section (2) other than clauses (b), (d) and (i), the dispute may be referred to the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or the new authority concerned and the decision of that Government shall be final.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_512\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/10527604/\">512.</a> Special provisions as to the area transferred from New Delhi to Delhi.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\u0097 (1) In this section \"transferred area\" means that area of Delhi which immediately before the commencement of this Act is included within the local limits of the New Delhi Municipal Committee but as from such commencement is included in and forms part of Delhi by virtue of the provisions of this Act.</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_512.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/186677587/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">As from the establishment of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/57345645/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all lands and buildings (together with all interest of whatsoever nature and kind therein) situated in the transferred area and vested in the New Delhi Municipal Committee immediately before such establishment shall pass to and vest in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/162768176/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all stores, articles and other movable properties belonging to the New Delhi Municipal Committee immediately before such establishment and utilised for or in connection with the transferred area shall pass to and vest in [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.2.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/13987953/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all appointments, notifications, orders, schemes, rules, forms, notices or bye-laws made or issued or any licence or permission granted by the New Delhi Municipal Committee immediately before such establishment in or in connection with thetransferred area shall, in so far as they are not inconsistent with the provisions of this Act continue in force and be deemed to have been made, issued or granted under the provisions of this Act unless and until they are superseded by any appointment, notification, order, scheme, rule, form, notice or bye-law made or issued or any licence or permission granted under the said provisions;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.2.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/143542963/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all debts, obligations and liabilities incurred, all contracts entered into and all matters and things engaged to be done by, with or for the New Delhi Municipal Committee immediately before such establishment for or in connection with the transferred area shall be deemed to have been incurred, entered into, engaged to be done by, with or for [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or the municipal authority concerned;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.2.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/172437437/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all assessments, valuations, measurements or divisions made by the New Delhi Municipal Committee immediately before such establishment in or in connection with the transferred area shall in so far as they are not inconsistent with the provisions of this Act, continue in force and be deemed to have been made under the provisions of this Act unless and until they are superseded by any assessment, valuation, measurement or division made by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or the municipal authority concerned under the said provisions;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.2.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/112566123/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all rates, taxes, fees, rents and other sums of money due to the New Delhi Municipal Committee in, or in relation to, the transferred area immediately before such establishment shall be deemed to be due to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.2.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/50063098/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all rates, taxes, fees, rents and other charges leviable in, or in relation to, transferred area shall unless and until they are varied by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>, continue to be levied at the same rate at which they were being levied by the New Delhi Municipal Committee immediately before such establishment;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.2.h\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/54771141/\">(h)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all suits, prosecutions and other legal proceedings instituted or which might have been instituted by or against the New Delhi Municipal Committee immediately before such establishment for any matter in relation to the transferred area may be continued or instituted by or against [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.2.i\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/186161073/\">(i)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">every officer and other employee serving under the New Delhi Municipal Committee immediately before such establishment in connection with the transferred area shall be transferred to and become an officer or other employee of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> with such designation as the Commissioner may determine and hold office by the same tenure and at the same remuneration and on the same terms and conditions of service as he would have held the same if [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> had not been established and shall continue to do so unless and until such tenure, remuneration and terms and conditions are duly altered by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>:</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that the tenure, remuneration and terms and conditions of service of any such officer or other employee shall not be altered to his disadvantage without the previous sanction of the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided further that any service rendered by any such officer or other employee before the establishment of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be deemed to be service rendered under [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided also that the Commissioner may employ any such officer or other employee in the discharge of such functions under this Act as the Commissioner may think proper and every such officer or other employee shall discharge those functions accordingly.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_512.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/14047009/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">As soon as may be after the commencement of this Act, the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall decide\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.3.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/143832684/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">which stores, articles and other movable properties referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (2) have been utilised by the New Delhi Municipal Committee for or in connection with the transferred area;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.3.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/8915055/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">which debts, obligations, liabilities, contracts, matters and things referred to in clause (d) of the said sub-section have been incurred, entered into or engaged to be done by, with or for the New Delhi Municipal Committee for or in connection with the transferred area;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_512.3.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/28783619/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">which officer and other employees referred to in clause (i) of that sub-section served under the said Committee in connection with the transferred area.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_512.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/166311760/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In case of any dispute in relation to any of the matters referred to in the various clauses of sub-section (2) other than clauses (b), (d) and (i), the dispute may be referred to the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or the New Delhi Municipal Committee and the decision of that Government shall be final.</span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_513\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/164719244/\">513.</a> Expenditure in connection with the municipal affairs from the commencement of this Act to the adoption of the budget by [a Corporation.] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>\n</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\u0097 (1) Any expenditure incurred during the period between the commencement of this Act and the establishment of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> under any of the provisions of this Act shall be borne by the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and the amount of the expenditure so incurred shall on such establishment be recoverable by that Government out of the Municipal Fund.</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_513.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/53735984/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">If in respect of the period between the establishment of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> and the adoption of the first budget by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> further expenditure from the Municipal Fund becomes necessary over and above the expenditure thereto for authorised for that year by the sanctioned budget estimates of the various bodies and local authorities specified in the Second Schedule, [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall adopt a supplementary statement showing the estimated amount of that expenditure.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_513.3\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/192981877/\">(3)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Every item of expenditure shown in the supplementary statement as adopted by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall be deemed to be expenditure covered by a current budget-grant within the meaning of section 102.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_513.4\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/121764208/\">(4)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The supplementary statement shall be prepared, presented and adopted in such manner and shall provide for such matters as may be determined by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_514\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/127976797/\">514.</a> Limits of New Delhi Municipality.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\u0097 Notwithstanding anything contained in the Punjab Municipal Act, 1911 (Punjab Act 3 of 1911), as applicable to New Delhi Municipality or in any notification issued thereunder, the limits of that Municipality shall be as described in the First Schedule.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_514A\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/109795436/\">514A.</a> Notwithstanding anything contained in this Act, the Central Government may, if necessary, appoint a person to be called the Special Officer, to exercise the power and discharge the functions of the Corporation until the date on which the first meeting of the Corporation is held after the commencement of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2022. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[susbtituted by act 10 of 2022]</span>\n</h3></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_514AA\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/123917011/\">514AA.</a> On and from the commencement of the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2022,\u2014</h3>\n<section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_514AA.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/107914321/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the North Delhi Municipal Corporation, the South Delhi Municipal Corporation and the East Delhi Municipal Corporation (hereafter referred to as</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">the erstwhile Corporations) shall be subsumed with, and become part of the Municipal Corporation of Delhi;</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_514AA.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/39836474/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any reference to the erstwhile Corporations in any contract or other instrument shall be deemed as a reference to the Municipal Corporation of</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Delhi;</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_514AA.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/142409691/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all properties, movable and immovable, of or belonging to the erstwhile Corporations shall vest in the Municipal Corporation of Delhi;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_514AA.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/154543338/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all the rights and liabilities of the erstwhile Corporations shall be transferred to, and be the rights and liabilities of, the Municipal Corporation of</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Delhi;</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_514AA.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/49528663/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any pending proceedings, including any disciplinary, arbitration, appeal or other legal proceedings, of whatever nature, by or against the erstwhile</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-hcontainer\" data-name=\"hcontainer\"><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Corporations shall be continued or enforced by or against the Municipal Corporation of Delhi;</span></span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_514AA.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/41590954/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any rules, regulations and bye-laws made prior to such commencement, shall, in so far as they are consistent with the provisions of the Act, continue to</span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">be applicable till new rules, regulations and bye-laws are made.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_514B\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/139478942/\">514B.</a> [] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Inserted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 21 (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> Overriding effect of the provisions of the Delhi Development Act 1957.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">- Notwithstanding anything contained in this Act, in case of any repugnance between the provisions of this Act and the provisions of the Delhi Development Act 1957, the provisions of the Delhi Development Act, 1957 shall prevail over the provisions of this Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_515\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/115858829/\">515.</a> Power to remove difficulties.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">\u0097 If any difficulty arises in relation to the transition from the provisions of any of the enactments referred to in section 516, or in giving effect to the provisions of this Act, the Central [Government] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(b), \"Central Government\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> may, by order as occasion requires, do anything which appears to it to be necessary for the purpose of removing the difficulty:</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Provided that no such order shall be made after the expiration of two years from the establishment of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-section\" id=\"section_516\"><h3><a href=\"/doc/82045292/\">516.</a> Repeal, etc, and savings.</h3>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-blockList\"><span class=\"akn-listIntroduction\">\u0097 (1) As from the date of the establishment of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>,\u0097</span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(a)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">the Delhi Joint Water and Sewage Board Act, 1926 (23 of 1926), and the Delhi Road Transport Authority Act, 1950 (13 of 1950), shall stand repealed; and</span></span><span class=\"akn-item\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(b)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">the enactments specified in the Thirteenth Schedule shall cease to have effect within Delhi.</span></span></span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\" id=\"section_516.2\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/109314671/\">(2)</a></span><span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Notwithstanding the provisions of sub-section (1) of this section or of clause (a) of sub-section (2) of section 286,\u0097</span></span><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_516.2.a\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/156622645/\">(a)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">any appointment, notification, order, scheme, rule, form, notice or bye-law made or issued, and any licence or permission granted under any of the Acts or enactments referred to in sub-section (1) of this section or under the Act referred to in clause (a) of sub-section (2) of section 286 and in force immediately before the establishment of [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> shall, in so far as it is not inconsistent with the provisions of this Act, continue in force and be deemed to have been made, issued or granted, under the provisions of this Act, unless and until it is superseded by any appointment, notification, order, scheme, rules, form, notice or bye-law made or issued or any licence or permission granted under the said provisions;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_516.2.b\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/61958223/\">(b)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all debts, obligations and liabilities incurred, all contracts entered into and all matters and things engaged to be done by, with or for any of the bodies or local authorities specified in the Second Schedule before such establishment shall be deemed to have been incurred, entered into or engaged to be done by, with or for [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or the municipal authority concerned;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_516.2.c\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/74971114/\">(c)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all budget estimates, assessments, valuations, measurements or divisions made by any of the aforesaid bodies or local authorities shall in so far as they are not inconsistent with the provisions of this Act, continue in force and be deemed to have been made under the provisions of this Act unless and until they are superseded by any budget estimate, assessment, valuation, measurement or division made by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> or the municipal authority concerned under the said provisions;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_516.2.d\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/12470569/\">(d)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all properties, movable and immovable and all interest of whatsoever nature and kind therein, vested in any of the aforesaid bodies and local authorities immediately before such establishment shall, with all rights of whatsoever description, used, enjoyed or possessed by any such body or authority, vest in the Corporation;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_516.2.e\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/120857792/\">(e)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all rates, taxes, fees, rents and other sums of money due to any of the aforesaid bodies or local authorities immediately before such establishment shall be deemed to be due to [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span>;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_516.2.f\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/32762123/\">(f)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all rates, taxes, fees, rents, fares and other charges shall, until and unless they are varied by [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span> continue to be levied at the same rate at which they were being levied by the aforesaid bodies or local authorities immediately before such establishment;</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-paragraph\" id=\"section_516.2.g\"><span class=\"akn-num\"><a href=\"/doc/140108389/\">(g)</a></span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">all suits, prosecutions and other legal proceedings instituted or which might have been instituted by or against any of the aforesaid bodies or local authorities may be continued or instituted by or against [a Corporation] <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), \"for the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><span class=\"akn-wrapUp\"><span class=\"akn-p\">The First Schedule</span><span class=\"akn-p\">[see section 2(32) and section 514]</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Boundaries of New Delhi</span><span class=\"akn-p\">The area bounded by-</span><span class=\"akn-p\">the junction of the Pusa Road and Upper Ridge Road towards east along the new Link Road, the Panchkuin Road up to its junction with the Old Gurgaon Road; thence towards northeast along the Old Gurgaon Road and Chelmsford Road upto the New Delhi Railway Station; thence towards south and south-east along the railway lineup to its junction with the Hardinge Bridge; thence towards south along the Mathura Road upto its junction with Lodi Road; thence towards south along the Lodi Road up to its junction with the first road leading to Lodi Colony; thence towards south along the first road leading to Lodi Colony upto its junction with the Ring railway; thence towards west along the railway line up to its junction with the Qutab Road; thence towards south along the Qutab Road up to its junction with Kaushak Nulla; thence towards east along the Kaushak Nulla up to its junction with the boundary of the New Delhi Municipality; thence towards south and thence towards west along the boundary of the New Delhi Municipality and along the south boundary of the Medical Enclave upto its junction with the Ring Road near Gwalior Potteries; thence towards north- west along the Ring Road up to its junction with Kitchner Road, thence towards north along the Upper Ridge Road upto the starting point.</span><span class=\"akn-p\">THE SECOND SCHEDULE</span><span class=\"akn-p\">(See sections 99, 286, 504, 511 and 516)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">BODIES AND LOCAL AUTHORITIES WHOSE All other articles not chargeable under any other class</span></td>\n<td class=\"akn-td\"><span class=\"akn-p\">0.04</span></td>\n</tr>\n</tbody></table></div>\n<span class=\"akn-p\">THE ELEVENTH SCHEDULE</span><span class=\"akn-p\">(See section 417)</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-part\"><h2>Part I</h2>\n<span class=\"akn-intro\"><span class=\"akn-p\">PURPOSES FOR WHICH PREMISES MAY NOT BE USED WITHOUT A LICENCE</span><span class=\"akn-p\">Carrying out any of the following trades or operations connected with trades:-</span></span><section class=\"akn-section\"><h3>1. section 136]</span></span><span class=\"akn-p\">(See section 52)</span><span class=\"akn-p\">POWERS AND FUNCTIONS OF THE WARDS COMMITTEE</span></span><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(1)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Sanction estimates and plans for municipal works to be carried out within the  Zone costing up to rupees one crore, other than works taken up and executed for Delhi  as a whole or those covering more than one Zone, provided that specific provision exists  therefor in the budget sanctioned by [a Corporation]. <span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, section 2(a), for \"the Corporation\" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012)]</span></span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(2)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Call for any report, return, plan, estimate, statement, account or statistics from  the Commissioner, connected with matter pertaining to the municipal administration in  the Zone.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(3)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Scrutinize monthly statements of receipts and disbursements and of the progress  reports in the collection of revenue in the Zone.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(4)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Consider and make recommendations on the proposals regarding estimates of  revenue and expenditure pertaining to the Zone under different heads of account of the  budget before being forwarded to the Commissioner.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(5)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Report on advice upon any matter which 2[a Corporation] may refer to it under  the Act.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(6)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">Deal with such other matters as may be delegated by 21a Corporation] to the  Wards Committee.</span></span></section><section class=\"akn-subsection\"><span class=\"akn-num\">(7)</span><span class=\"akn-content\"><span class=\"akn-p\">In general, exercise all such municipal powers and functions of 2[a Corporation]  as are to be performed exclusively in the Zone concerned other than those relating to  Delhi as a whole or involving two or more Zones.]</span><span class=\"akn-p\"><span class=\"akn-remark\" data-status=\"editorial\">[Substituted by Act 42 of 1984, section 12 (w.e.f. 10-12-1985).]</span></span></span></section></section></section></section></span></span></div>\n\n\n\n\n\n</body></html>",
